05784d10.title: Program Manager - Institute Partnership Manager
05784d10.description:
**Job Description: Program Manager \- Institute Partnership Manager**
**Company:** 
 Masai School
   

  

**Experience:** 
 4–6 Years
   

  

**Location:** 
 Bengaluru (HSR Layout)
   

  

**About Masai School**
 Masai School is one of India's leading outcome\-driven career schools, focused on transforming careers through high\-quality education and strong industry partnerships. We work closely with colleges and institutions to bridge the gap between education and employability.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a proactive and relationship\-driven
 **Program Manager \-** 
**Institute Partnership Manager** 
 to build and strengthen partnerships with colleges, universities, and educational institutions across India. The ideal candidate will be responsible for onboarding new institutes, managing existing partnerships, driving student engagement initiatives, and ensuring the successful execution of collaborative programs.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Ensure end\-to\-end operational compliance with institute agreements, academic policies, regulatory requirements, and internal processes.
* Act as the single point of contact for issue resolution, managing student, faculty, and institute complaints within defined SLAs.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including institute leadership, faculty, program coordinators, and internal cross\-functional teams.
* Coordinate program delivery, academic calendars, assessments, certifications, and learner lifecycle activities.
* Monitor service quality, operational KPIs, and partner satisfaction, driving continuous improvement.
* Conduct regular governance reviews with partner institutes and share performance dashboards and action plans.
* Identify operational risks proactively and implement preventive and corrective actions.
* Ensure seamless coordination between Sales, Academics, Student Success, Product, Finance, and Technology teams for successful program execution.
* Maintain accurate documentation, audit readiness, and MIS reporting for all partner institutions.
* Drive partner retention by delivering a consistently high\-quality operational experience.


**These Responsibilities Can Be Summarized Into Three Pillars**
* Compliance Management: Ensure adherence to contractual, academic, regulatory, and operational commitments.
* Complaint \& Escalation Management: Resolve issues quickly while maintaining high student and partner satisfaction.
* Stakeholder Management: Build trusted relationships with institutes and coordinate effectively across internal teams to ensure successful program delivery.


**Required Skills**
* Excellent relationship management and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong communication, presentation, and negotiation abilities.
* Experience in B2B or institutional sales/partnerships.
* Ability to manage multiple partnerships simultaneously.
* Strong planning, coordination, and execution skills.
* Willingness to travel extensively for institute meetings and events.
* This role requires approximately 30% travel for institute visits, stakeholder meetings, partner engagement, and on\-ground program execution.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, Education, or a related field.
* MBA is preferred.
* Prior experience in EdTech, Higher Education, or Campus Relations will be an added advantage.
* 4–6 years of experience in Institute Coordination, Program Management, or Key Account Management.
* Proven experience in managing relationships with colleges and educational institutions.
* Track record of achieving partnership and business development targets.


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to work with one of India's fastest\-growing EdTech organizations.
* High ownership and autonomy.
* Learning and career growth opportunities.
* Collaborative and fast\-paced work environment.


 If you are passionate about building strategic partnerships and creating opportunities for students while driving institutional growth, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 Skills: stakeholder management,edtech,partnerships,campus partnerships,institutional,program management,partner success,educational institutions

d015799e.title: HR Operations - Engagement Manager
d015799e.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are seeking for an experienced HR Operations \- Engagement Manager with 14\+ years of relevant exposure to join our team. The successful candidate will help in driving the client engagement and satisfaction with HR Operations services through effective communication, support, and relationship management.
   

  

 In this role you will play a key role in:
   

  

* Serve as the primary point of contact for level 2 escalations from client.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with all stakeholders to understand their needs and priorities and ensure timely and effective resolution.
* Provide guidance and support to Team Members and Delivery Manager.
* Collaborate with Client and SMEs to identify opportunities for improving services and processes based on feedback and insights gathered from stakeholders.
* Collaborate with Client and SMEs to identify opportunities for improving services and processes based on feedback and insights gathered from various stakeholders.
* Monitor employee satisfaction with services rendered and identify trends and areas for improvement.
* Lead special projects and initiatives as assigned by senior management.


**Your Profile**
* Proven expertise in HR Services, with a focus on employee engagement, HR service delivery, or HR operations.
* Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to build rapport and credibility with employees and stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
* Excellent communication skills, including written, verbal, and presentation skills.
* Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks and projects in a fast\-paced environment.
* Proven ability to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams and influence stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
* Customer\-centric mindset with a passion for delivering an exceptional employee experience.
* Proficiency in HRIS systems and Microsoft Office Suite.
* Customer\-centric mindset with a passion for delivering an exceptional employee experience.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

423335a5.title: Technical Program Manager
423335a5.description:
**Roles \& Responsibilities** 




  





**Program Management** 



* Lead FATP programs from NPI through production ramp and mass manufacturing.
* Own execution plans, milestones, schedules, and deliverables.
* Ensure successful product launches and manufacturing readiness.



  





**Assembly \& Production Readiness** 



* Ensure readiness of assembly lines, manpower, equipment, consumables, and processes.
* Coordinate production planning to meet customer demand.
* Drive execution across prototype, pilot, and volume production stages.



  





**Test \& Validation Management** 



* Coordinate functional testing, reliability testing, and software flashing activities.
* Ensure test stations and validation equipment are production\-ready.
* Track test performance and failure trends.



  





**Quality \& Yield Improvement** 



* Monitor First Pass Yield (FPY), test yield, and assembly quality metrics.
* Lead issue resolution related to assembly defects and test failures.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to improve product quality.



  





**Cross\-Functional Leadership** 



* Collaborate with Product Engineering, Test Engineering, Manufacturing Engineering, Quality, SCM, Logistics, and Operations teams.
* Facilitate customer program reviews and manufacturing status updates.
* Drive alignment across all functions to meet launch commitment.



  





**Production Ramp \& Customer Delivery** 



* Manage manufacturing ramp\-up and stabilization activities.
* Monitor production output, cycle time, and delivery performance.
* Ensure customer requirements are met in terms of quality, cost, and schedule.



  





 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
 


* First Pass Yield (FPY)
* Test Yield
* Assembly Defect Rate
* Cycle Time
* On\-Time Delivery (OTD)
* Customer Escapes
* Production Output
* Return/Failure Rate

b81226e2.title: Technical Program Manager (TPM)
b81226e2.description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Technical Program Manager (TPM) based in India.**
 This role sits at the intersection of engineering execution and product strategy within fast\-moving AI\-driven environments. You will lead complex, cross\-functional technical programs spanning web platforms, data tooling, and AI\-enabled systems. Acting as the operational backbone of delivery, you will bring structure to ambiguity and ensure teams stay aligned on priorities, timelines, and outcomes. The position requires strong technical fluency combined with excellent program management skills to drive clarity across multiple parallel initiatives. You will collaborate closely with engineering, product, and design teams to define scope, manage dependencies, and ensure smooth execution from planning through launch. This is a high\-impact role where your work directly accelerates product delivery and improves the overall system of execution in a cutting\-edge AI ecosystem.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Own end\-to\-end delivery of complex technical programs across web platforms, data tooling, and AI\-enabled product initiatives.
* Partner with Engineering and Product teams to define scope, milestones, success metrics, and structured delivery plans.
* Run core program rituals such as planning sessions, standups, risk reviews, and retrospectives to ensure alignment and momentum.
* Identify and manage cross\-team dependencies, proactively surface risks, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Develop and maintain clear program documentation including roadmaps, PRDs/tech briefs, RACI matrices, release plans, and postmortems.
* Drive launch readiness activities including QA planning, rollout coordination, observability requirements, and incident response alignment.
* Continuously improve delivery systems, including estimation accuracy, release hygiene, throughput tracking, and communication workflows.


**Requirements**
* 5\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management or similar roles within software, platform, infrastructure, or devtools environments.
* Strong technical fluency across APIs, web systems, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, observability, and basic security concepts.
* Proven ability to manage multiple parallel initiatives in fast\-paced, high\-ambiguity environments.
* Excellent written communication skills with the ability to produce clear, structured documentation and status reporting.
* Experience working in startup or high\-growth environments with a bias toward action and pragmatic decision\-making.
* Strong cross\-functional collaboration skills with engineering, product, and design teams.
* Ability to bring structure to complex problems and drive execution from planning to delivery.


**Benefits**
* Competitive hourly compensation: $50 \- $150 USD/hour depending on experience and location.
* Contract\-based engagement (up to 6 months).
* Fully remote\-first role within a global distributed team.
* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge AI, developer platforms, and data infrastructure products.
* Exposure to high\-impact, fast\-paced technical environments with strong ownership culture.
* Flexible collaboration model supporting autonomy and results\-driven work.


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

4e91fa48.title: Technical Program Manager
4e91fa48.description:
**Who are we?**
 Checkmarx is the leader in application security and ensures that enterprises worldwide can secure their application development from code to cloud. Our consolidated platform and services address the needs of enterprises by improving security and reducing TCO, while simultaneously building trust between AppSec, developers, and CISOs. At Checkmarx, we believe it's not just about finding risk, but remediating it across the entire application footprint and software supply chain with one seamless process for all relevant stakeholders.
   

  

 We are honored to serve more than 1,800 customers, which includes 40 percent of all Fortune 100 companies including Siemens, Airbus, SalesForce, Stellantis, Adidas, Wal\-Mart, and Sanofi.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re hiring a Technical Program Manager to lead and coordinate key technical initiatives that drive customer success and adoption of the Checkmarx One platform. You’ll manage complex, cross\-functional programs—spanning migrations, onboarding, integrations, and custom enterprise projects—to ensure timely, high\-quality delivery and measurable customer outcomes.
   

  

 This role requires a balance of technical fluency, program leadership, and customer focus. You’ll collaborate closely with Engineering, Product, Professional Services, customer success, and security teams to ensure customers achieve success with Checkmarx’s solutions from implementation through long\-term adoption.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead complex, customer\-facing technical programs from planning to execution, ensuring timely and high\-quality delivery.
* Build and optimize program management processes that enhance consistency, visibility, and scalability across global teams.
* Partner with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success to align on scope, dependencies, and milestones.
* Drive continuous improvement across operations by identifying gaps and leading change initiatives.
* Provide executive\-level reporting on program progress, metrics, and success outcomes.
* Act as a trusted technical liaison for enterprise customers, ensuring delivery aligns with their architecture and business goals.


 Requirements:
   

  

* 5\+ years of experience managing complex technical programs in SaaS, cybersecurity, or enterprise software.
* Proven track record leading customer delivery programs such as migrations, onboarding, or integrations.
* PMP or Scrum certification preferred.
* Strong technical understanding of system architecture, APIs, SDLC, and integrations.
* Demonstrated experience building scalable delivery frameworks and improving global operational processes.
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with experience reporting to executives.
* Comfortable collaborating across global, cross\-functional teams.
* Familiarity with security and compliance frameworks (SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, ISO 27001\) preferred.


 What we have to offer:
   

  

 Checkmarx offers a great work environment, professional development, challenging careers, competitive compensation, great work\-life balance, as well as great benefits and perks throughout the year. Checkmarx is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.

d66d91b0.title: Engineering Program Manager 4
d66d91b0.description:
Individual Contributor
   

  

 Employee role: Individual Contributor
   

  

 Looking for a Senior Engineering Program Manager to manage and track the development and implementation process of the Document Cloud Group products and services. The role involves planning, coordination, and collaboration across departmental or cross\-functional teams, focused on delivering new or upgrading existing products. Monitors the project from initiation through delivery including planning and directing schedules and monitoring risks, and timely reporting, timely highlighting issues, risks and challenges, and communicating with stakeholders at all levels. Organizes cross\-functional activities, ensuring completion of the project i.e. product on schedule and within defined constraints. Closely collaborate with Product marketing, Product management, Engineering, Design, Security, Legal and other partner teams to manage relationships and deliver technology solutions.
   

  

 The role demands to drive strategic and tactical decisions ensuring the successful delivery of programs. Partner across program, product, and subject boundaries, working with service, marketing, business, engineering, and product teams to handle dependencies, define schedules, plans, and drive alignment. Lead and coordinate large cross\-functional projects from inception through delivery. Identify and implement process improvements to improve how we deliver value to our customers. Manage changes and risks effectively, ensuring timely and appropriate communication and intelligent adjustments to plans. Provide project clarity and transparency through status and reporting. Evaluate existing processes and drive improvements for team efficiency and effectiveness. Prepare and present achievement reviews to upper management. Act as an agile coach and mentor to support teams in growing efficiency and productivity. Knowledge and experience on AI tools will be added advantage.
   

  

 Requires minimum 10\+ years’ of experience as a Program Manager in SaaS or a related industry. Proven ability to work effectively with highly technical engineering teams. Strong capability to provide structure and vital processes without compromising execution. Experience in leading multi\-functional teams through influence. Proficient with development methodologies and tactics for roadmap, backlog, and development management. Customer\-focused with the ability to rapidly test and validate products and features. Ambitious, with a strong bias to action and a proven track record of tackling unknowns. Excellent interpersonal, analytical, problem\-solving, and conflict resolution skills. Experience managing projects with geographically dispersed team members. Ability to align efforts of disparate groups to achieve a common goal. Outstanding speaking, writing, and presentation skills.
   

  

 BTech/MTech in Computer Science or related field; MBA or equivalent experience is a plus.
   

  

**Internal Personal Skills**
 Creativity, curiosity, and constant learning are celebrated aspects of your career growth journey. Candidate should be flexible and be a fast learner and adapt to new routines and changes.
   

  

 We’re glad that you’re pursuing a new opportunity at Adobe!
   

  

**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

50dd554b.title: Technical Program Manager
50dd554b.description:
**Location:** 

 Bengaluru
 




**Work Mode:** 

 Office
 




  




**About Tracxn** 


 Tracxn is a leading global market\-intelligence platform covering millions of private companies. We power decision\-making for Venture Capital firms, Private Equity, Investment Banks, and Corporates with deep data and insights.
 




  




**About the Role** 


 As a Technical Program Manager (TPM) at Tracxn, you will own and drive the execution of high\-impact technical and data\-driven programs. This role is ideal for professionals with a strong technical background and a problem\-solving mindset.
 





 You will work closely with engineering, data, and business teams to build scalable systems, optimize processes, and develop high\-quality data assets that power Tracxn’s core platform.
 




  




**Key Responsibilities** 
* **Program Ownership:** 

 Take end\-to\-end ownership of designing, executing, and delivering key technical and data programs.
* **Data \& LLM Initiatives:** 

 Develop and implement strategies for data acquisition, enrichment, and quality improvement using AI or Large Language Models (LLMs).
* **Execution \& Planning:** 

 Break down complex technical and data challenges into structured, actionable projects and tasks with clear timelines.
* **Collaboration:** 

 Work closely with cross\-functional teams including engineering, product, and operations to align on requirements and execution.
* **Problem Solving:** 

 Identify gaps and inefficiencies in systems and processes; design and implement scalable technical solutions.
* **Performance Tracking:** 

 Set up monitoring systems and MIS reports to track program performance, data quality, and execution progress.
* **Testing \& Optimization:** 

 Design rigorous testing frameworks and continuously optimize processes using data\-driven insights.
* **Stakeholder Communication:** 

 Clearly communicate strategies, insights, and outcomes to internal stakeholders and leadership.



  




**What We’re Looking For** 

  




* 3 to 9 years of experience in Technical Program Management, Software Development, Data Operations, or related roles

* Strong communication and presentation skills
* High ownership mindset with a process\-driven approach
* Ability to work effectively with cross\-functional teams
* Strong inclination towards continuous learning and improvement



  




**What You Can Expect at Tracxn**

* A transparent, meritocratic culture where everyone explains the “why” behind their decisions.
* A candid and collaborative environment that values learning, curiosity, and open discussions.
* Managers and mentors who invest in your growth with timely, actionable feedback.
* Continuous learning through real\-time projects and cross\-functional exposure.




 If this sounds like you \- or you know someone who’d be a great fit \- send your resume to
 
**careers@tracxn.com** 

 with the subject line
 
**“Technical Program Manager \- Tracxn.”**

c86f67d9.title: Sr. Program Manager, R&D Operations
c86f67d9.description:
Category\-defining tech. Career\-defining work.
   

  

 Lots of tech companies disrupt. But, many fail when they try to scale. We're different. CockroachDB makes it easier for companies to build and scale apps. This is how and why we're helping some of the most innovative companies on the planet. We tackle problems head\-on and focus on solutions that create lasting impact.
   

  

 Because when our customers win, we all win.
   

  

**The Role**
 We are seeking a Senior Technical Program Manager, FinOps to join our Research \& Development Operations team, based in Bengaluru, India. This is a high\-visibility opportunity to define and mature our FinOps capabilities at Cockroach Labs, building on foundational work already underway across our engineering organization and taking our cloud financial management to a new level of rigor, scale, and competitive advantage. You will sit at the intersection of Engineering, Finance, and Operations, responsible for driving cost transparency, surfacing savings opportunities, and ensuring cloud infrastructure spend is managed with discipline and accountability.
   

  

 Cockroach Labs operates a significant cloud infrastructure footprint to power CockroachDB Cloud and our internal engineering environments. As we scale, the ability to understand, attribute, and optimize that spend is critical to our financial health and margin profile. This role will own the FinOps program end\-to\-end: stewarding the tooling that tracks cloud costs, partnering with Engineering and Finance to embed cost accountability across the organization, and building the cost allocation models that feed margin analysis and executive reporting.
   

  

 R\&D Operations plays a crucial role in enabling our organization to exceed customer expectations by shortening feedback loops and accelerating learning. By focusing on coordination and process effectiveness, R\&D Operations minimizes friction and allows teams to concentrate on delivering high\-quality products and services.
   

  

**You Will**
* Own and evolve the FinOps tooling platform used to track, report on, and analyze cloud infrastructure costs across AWS, GCP, and other providers, ensuring the data is accurate, timely, and actionable.
* Establish and run the FinOps operating cadence, including regular cost reviews, budget\-vs\-actuals variance analysis, anomaly detection, and a living optimization backlog with owners, timelines, and dollar\-value targets.
* Build and maintain cost allocation frameworks that attribute cloud spend to products, teams, and customer workloads to support COGS calculation, unit economics, and margin analysis in partnership with Finance.
* Identify and prioritize cloud cost optimization opportunities, including rightsizing, committed use discounts (reserved instances/savings plans), idle resource cleanup, storage tiering, egress reduction, Kubernetes/container cost efficiency, and emerging AI and machine learning infrastructure costs such as GPU compute, model training pipelines, and inference workloads.
* Manage cloud budgets and forecasts in close partnership with Finance and Engineering leadership; explain variances, surface risks early, and drive corrective action before spend exceeds plan.
* Drive cost accountability across Engineering by establishing tagging and labeling standards, showback/chargeback models, and cost\-aware development practices that embed FinOps into the engineering culture.
* Build executive\-level dashboards and reporting to communicate cloud spend trends, savings realized, optimization pipeline, and forecast vs. actuals to senior leadership and the board.
* Partner cross\-functionally with Engineering, Infrastructure, Procurement, and Finance to align cost reduction initiatives with platform roadmap priorities and business goals, without compromising service quality or engineering velocity.
* Define governance frameworks, best practices, and FinOps policies that can scale with the business, including vendor discount strategy, commitment management, and cloud budget governance.


**The Expectations**
 In your first 30 days, you will orient yourself by conducting a thorough review of Cockroach Labs' cloud infrastructure footprint, existing FinOps tooling, and current state of cost attribution and tagging. You will meet with key stakeholders across R\&D and Finance to understand how cloud spend is tracked today, where the gaps are, and what decisions are being made without the data they deserve. Working closely with Finance, you will kick off the design of a tagging hierarchy that will allow cloud infrastructure costs to be viewed and rolled up across the dimensions that matter most: by team, product, environment, and customer workload.
   

  

 By day 60, you will have finalized the tagging taxonomy with Finance sign\-off and begun driving adoption and enforcement across Engineering. You will have established yourself as the SME on our FinOps tooling platform, leading the first internal training, handling configuration changes, and becoming the go\-to resource for questions from budget owners and team leads. You will also have built and published the first cost optimization backlog, identifying the highest\-value efficiency opportunities surfaced by the tool and beginning to execute on the most actionable of them.
   

  

 By day 90, you will have established yourself as the definitive expert on where Cockroach Labs' cloud spend is occurring, and why. You will have partnered with Finance and budget owners to put budgets in place by category, delivered the first quarterly cloud spend report to leadership, and helped teams build the dashboards and showback views they need to make cost\-aware decisions. When anomalies or trends surface, you will be the person who can explain them to an engineer, a finance partner, or an executive, with clarity and confidence.
   

  

**You Have**
* 8\+ years of experience in program management, cloud financial management, or a closely related field, with a proven track record of leading complex, cross\-functional initiatives independently.
* Hands\-on FinOps tooling experience: production\-grade experience with a dedicated FinOps platform (specifically CloudZero, Vantage, or Finout) is required, in addition to proficiency with native CSP cost management tools (AWS Cost Explorer / Cost \& Usage Reports, GCP Billing, Azure Cost Management).
* Strong financial acumen: practical experience with budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and cost allocation methodologies including showback, chargeback, and COGS/margin attribution.
* Deep understanding of cloud pricing models: committed use discounts, reserved instances, savings plans, spot/preemptible pricing, data egress costs, storage tiers, and managed service pricing across major cloud providers.
* Cost allocation and unit economics fluency: demonstrated ability to build or mature cost allocation frameworks that attribute shared infrastructure spend to products or customers in support of gross margin analysis.
* Data analysis skills: comfortable working with large, complex billing datasets and translating raw cost data into actionable insights; experience building BI dashboards in Looker, Tableau, Quicksight, or similar tools.
* Cross\-functional influence: a track record of driving cost governance and cultural change across engineering and finance teams without direct authority, aligning engineers, finance partners, and senior leaders around shared cost accountability.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills: ability to present complex cost data clearly to both technical (infrastructure engineers, SREs) and non\-technical (CFO, board) audiences.
* A demonstrated practice of integrating AI tools into your daily workflow to improve speed, quality, and decision\-making.
* Fluency with AI across core tasks — research, drafting, analysis, planning — used as a default, not an exception.
* FinOps Certified Practitioner (FOCP) or higher (e.g., FinOps Certified Professional) strongly preferred; cloud platform certifications (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and familiarity with the FinOps for AI framework are a plus.
* Experience building or maturing a FinOps practice is a significant differentiator; we are looking for someone comfortable operating in ambiguity, excited to define what great FinOps looks like at Cockroach Labs, and forward\-thinking enough to extend cost governance into emerging areas like AI and machine learning infrastructure.


**The Team**
 This role reports to Colin Minihan, Director of R\&D Operations, and sits within the R\&D Operations organization. You will work in close partnership with Finance and Cloud Engineering, serving as the connective layer between infrastructure cost reality and financial planning and reporting.
   

  

 Colin is responsible for ensuring that operations within the R\&D department are as efficient and impactful as possible. He has built and managed multiple high\-performing program management organizations at various companies, often during crucial growth stages. His love of learning and building extends beyond his profession in software, always looking for the next DIY project or outdoor hobby in the Pacific Northwest.
   

  

 Cockroach Labs is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer building a diverse and inclusive workforce. If you need additional accommodations to feel comfortable during your interview process, please email us at accessibility@cockroachlabs.com.
   

  

 Cockroach Labs has a hybrid work model, with Roachers that are local to one of our offices coming in on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays and working flexibly the rest of the week. While we’ve learned valuable lessons working remotely, nothing can replace the connection, creativity, and fun that occurs when Roachers get together and we are committed to fostering a workplace that encourages collaboration and allows us all to do our best work.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Stock Options
* Medical Insurance
* Vision Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Life and Disability Insurance
* Professional Development Funds
* Flexible Time Off
* Paid Holidays
* Paid Sick Days
* Paid Parental Leave
* Retirement Benefits
* Mental Wellbeing Benefits
* And more!

b4897ff2.title: Technical Program Manager >
b4897ff2.description:
Role Overview
   

  

 Application
   

  

**Team:** 
 Core Platform
 **Reports to:** 
 Director of Engineering
   

  

**About The Company**
 At Redpin we simplify life's most important payments. Buying a new property overseas can be a stressful time, especially when it comes to moving your money. Through our Currencies Direct and TorFX brands we've been helping people do just that for over 25 years. With recent investment we're now on a mission to build a new range of digital products and services that will make moving money internationally for real estate purchases even easier.
   

  

 We're on a mission to become the solution for real estate payments everywhere. To do this, we are transitioning our business from a horizontal FX platform to a verticalized, embedded software company, as we look to the future and Redpin 2\.0\.
   

  

 As part of this mission, we're thrilled to announce we have opened a new office in Hyderabad!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will own the delivery of Redpin's most important cross\-functional business initiatives — the programs the company is betting on — and be accountable for the outcome, not just the plan.
   

  

 Success means bringing multiple teams into alignment on scope, dependencies, and timelines, holding that alignment as things change, and driving execution through to shipped. You'll operate across Engineering, Product, Operations, and the CTO's office, turning ambiguous, high\-stakes goals into a plan teams believe in and then landing it. When a program starts slipping from green to yellow to red, you're the one who sees it first and does what it takes to turn it back
   

  

 You'll do this as a nimble, async\-first operator — not by filling calendars with status meetings.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own end\-to\-end delivery of key cross\-functional initiatives across Core Platform, from planning to ship.
* Drive quarterly planning: shape goals with leadership, decompose initiatives, map dependencies, and align teams on scope and timelines.
* Maintain an honest RAG view of program health; detect risk early, escalate the right issues to the right people, and drive the actions that turn red/yellow back to green.
* Unblock teams — broker decisions, remove dependencies, and make pragmatic calls rather than logging problems and waiting.
* Manage risk and dependencies across teams and third parties (banking partners, payment rails, critical vendors).
* Keep leadership informed through crisp written updates that drive decisions without a meeting.


**What You’ll Need**
* Proven track record delivering complex, cross\-functional technical programs in a fast moving environment.
* Strong technical fluency — enough to earn engineers' trust, reason about architecture and trade\-offs, and make pragmatic decisions.
* Excellent written communication and stakeholder management across ICs, managers, Directors, Product, Operations, and executive leadership; strong persuasion and influence without authority.
* Sharp risk and escalation instincts — you recognise "yellow turning red" early and know how to intervene.
* Comfort with ambiguity and a bias to action; async\-first working style.
* Experience with quarterly/OKR planning and dependency management at scale


**Nice to have**
* Experience in payments, fintech, FX, or banking, and comfort where compliance and delivery intersect.
* Exposure to third\-party vendors, banking partners, or platform integrations.


**How We Work**
 Async\-first and pragmatic. We default to writing, meet only when a decision needs a room, and value judgement over process. We're not looking for a TPM who runs programs by the book or blocks progress with ceremony — we're looking for the person who is the reason initiatives ship.

68b98bfe.title: Principal Engineering Program Manager
68b98bfe.description:

Building efficiencies for our caregivers to effectively serve our caretakers (patients) is critical and data Insights/visualization helps us gain such insights. * Excellent Executive presence

**Nice To Have**
* Experience working on healthcare projects with understanding of its compliance requirements.

7235b82e.title: Systems Engineer (Presales)
7235b82e.description:
Mumbai, Maharashtra, India Sales Ref ID: JR\-019463  

**Our Mission**


At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real\-world problems with cutting\-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.


**Who We Are**


In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real\-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!


We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real\-time problem\-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.
**Job Summary**


**Job Description**


**Your Career**
  

As a domain consultant for network security transformation, you provide technical expertise and guidance in customers' **network security and zero trust journey**.You will be key in defining technical solutions that secure a customer’s key business imperatives.You evangelize our industry leadership in **on\-prem, cloud, and security services** that establish Palo Alto Networks as a customer’s cybersecurity partner.
  

  

**Your Impact**


* Collaborate with sales teams to recommend and develop customer solutions within your assigned specialization.
* Present to customers as our expert at all levels in the customer hierarchy, from practitioner to senior leadership.
* Lead and support customer demonstrations that showcase our unique value proposition.
* Responsible for prospective customers and partners' Technical Validation projects based on best practices to ensure technical win in assigned opportunities.
* Architect solutions that will help our customers strengthen and simplify their security posture
* Document high\-level design and key use cases to ensure proper implementation and value realization of Palo Alto Networks solutions
* Lead conversations about industry trends and emerging changes to the security landscape.
* Responsible for discussing and highlighting product alignment with customer requirements and differentiation
* As the main technical point of contact for Network Security, you will assist and collaborate to respond effectively to RFIs/RFPs.
* Position Palo Alto Networks or Partner delivered services as appropriate to ensure proper implementation and value realization of Palo Alto Networks solutions
* Discuss, with credibility, competitive offers in the marketplace and position ours as the best alternative

**Qualifications**

**Qualifications**


Your Experience


* 3\+ years experience in pre\-sales/sales engineering within Zero Trust, Networking, Network Security, SaaS Security or SSE/SASE or graduate of Palo Alto Networks Academy Program
* Experience with L2\-L4 Networking (L2 Switching architectures including Spanning Tree, VLANs/trunking, IP routing including static routes, OSPF and BGP, route re\-distribution, L4 Load\-balancing)
* Outstanding customer communication and problem\-solving skills
* Experience in working with customers, demonstrating problem\-solving skills and a can\-do attitude
* Solid understanding of NGFW, Network Security, SASE, SD\-WAN, CASB, Proxy, DLP and BYOD Solutions
* Knowledge of On\-Premise and Cloud\-Delivered Network Security Technologies
* This is a field sales position where travel requirements may be required to support in person customer meetings, please discuss with the recruiter on the specifics for this position.
* Proficient in English

**The Team**


Our Domain Consultant team members work hand\-in\-hand with organizations around the world to keep their digital environments protected. We educate, inspire,and empower our potential clients in their journey to security.


You are empowered with unmatched systems and tools and a team built on joint success. You won’t find someone at Palo Alto Networks that isn’t committed to your success – with everyone pitching in to assist when it comes to solutions selling, learning, and development. Our Solutions Consulting community is driven by the mission to be our customers’ cybersecurity partner of choice, protecting their digital way of life.


**Our Commitment**

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.


We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.


Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.


All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.


Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**

### **Microsoft Dynamics 365 Project Manager – Roles \& Responsibilities**

* Lead end\-to\-end implementation, upgrade, migration, and support projects for Microsoft Dynamics 365 (Finance \& Operations, Customer Engagement, Business Central, Supply Chain Management, CRM, etc.).
* Define project scope, objectives, timelines, deliverables, and success criteria in collaboration with business stakeholders.

* Ensure successful execution of System Integration Testing (SIT), User Acceptance Testing (UAT), and production deployment.
* Manage project risks, change requests, scope changes, and mitigation strategies throughout the project lifecycle.

* Architect solutions that will help our customers strengthen and simplify their security posture
* Document high\-level design and key use cases to ensure proper implementation and value realization of Palo Alto Networks solutions
* Lead conversations about industry trends and emerging changes to the security landscape.
* Responsible for discussing and highlighting product alignment with customer requirements and differentiation
* As the main technical point of contact for Network Security, you will assist and collaborate to respond effectively to RFIs/RFPs.
* Position Palo Alto Networks or Partner delivered services as appropriate to ensure proper implementation and value realization of Palo Alto Networks solutions
* Discuss, with credibility, competitive offers in the marketplace and position ours as the best alternative


**Qualifications**
**Qualifications**
 Your Experience
   

  

* 3\+ years experience in pre\-sales/sales engineering within Zero Trust, Networking, Network Security, SaaS Security or SSE/SASE or graduate of Palo Alto Networks Academy Program
* Experience with L2\-L4 Networking (L2 Switching architectures including Spanning Tree, VLANs/trunking, IP routing including static routes, OSPF and BGP, route re\-distribution, L4 Load\-balancing)
* Outstanding customer communication and problem\-solving skills
* Experience in working with customers, demonstrating problem\-solving skills and a can\-do attitude
* Solid understanding of NGFW, Network Security, SASE, SD\-WAN, CASB, Proxy, DLP and BYOD Solutions
* Knowledge of On\-Premise and Cloud\-Delivered Network Security Technologies
* This is a field sales position where travel requirements may be required to support in person customer meetings, please discuss with the recruiter on the specifics for this position.
* Proficient in English


**The Team**
 Our Domain Consultant team members work hand\-in\-hand with organizations around the world to keep their digital environments protected. We educate, inspire,and empower our potential clients in their journey to security.
   

  

 You are empowered with unmatched systems and tools and a team built on joint success. You won’t find someone at Palo Alto Networks that isn’t committed to your success – with everyone pitching in to assist when it comes to solutions selling, learning, and development. Our Solutions Consulting community is driven by the mission to be our customers’ cybersecurity partner of choice, protecting their digital way of life.
   

  

**Our Commitment**
 We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.
   

  

 We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.
   

  

 Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.
   

  

 Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

40eccfb8.title: Solutions Architect
40eccfb8.description:
**Opportunity Summary:** 




  





 Ema is building the next generation
 *AI* 
 technology to empower every employee in the enterprise to be their most creative and productive. Our proprietary tech allows enterprises to delegate most repetitive tasks to Ema, the Universal
 *AI* 
 employee. We are founded by ex\-Google, Coinbase, Okta executives, and serial entrepreneurs. We’re well\-funded by the top investors and angels in the world. Ema is based in Silicon Valley with offices in Bangalore.
 



  





**In this role, you will:** 




  




* Collaborate with the sales leadership to understand customer requirements and enable technical solutions deployment based on customer needs.
* Develop an in\-depth understanding of Ema’s technology and underlying architectures
* Deliver compelling product demonstrations tailored to the specific needs of potential customers, showcasing key features and benefits.
* Work closely with customers to execute successful PoCs, demonstrating the feasibility and value of Ema in their environment.
* Position yourself as a Trusted Advisor to key customer stakeholders with a focus on achieving their desired Business Outcomes.
* Collaborate with customers to design and architect solutions that align with their business goals, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems.
* Drive project teams towards common goals of accelerating the adoption of Ema’s solutions.
* Demonstrate and communicate the value of Ema’s solution throughout the engagement, from demo to proof of concept to running workshops, design sessions and implementation with customers and stakeholders.
* Help take Ema’s solution from POC to production.
* Understand customers cloud/on\-prem environment and their unique needs for deploying Ema’s solutions. Work with our engineering team to translate customer needs into a productionizable solution that fits into Ema’s deployment models.
* Manage the customer’s problem through effective diagnosis, resolution, or implementation of new investigation tools to increase productivity for customer challenges on Ema’s platform. Create repeatable processes. Create and maintain technical documentation, including solution architectures, integration guides, and best practices.
* Act as a consultant and subject matter expert for internal stakeholders in engineering, sales, and product to resolve technical deployment obstacles and improve Ema.



  





**Ideally, you'd have:** 




  




* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 8\+ years experience as a Solutions Architect/Solutions Engineer, Sales Engineer, Forward Deployment Engineer or in a similar technical pre\-sales role.
* Strong understanding of enterprise
 *SaaS* 
 solutions and cloud technologies.
* Solid experience with solution design, architecture, and integration.
* Familiarity with relevant programming languages and technologies.
* Customer\-focused mindset with a passion for understanding and solving customer challenges.
* Excellent presentation and communication skills, with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.
* Strong collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a global team.



  





 Ema Unlimited is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or genetics.

2d1ba674.title: Solutions Consultant - BFSI
2d1ba674.description:
**Our Mission**
 At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real\-world problems with cutting\-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real\-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!
   

  

 We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real\-time problem\-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The Solutions Consultant is the evolution of the traditional Sales Engineering role, aligning how we best serve our customers in understanding their environment, providing solution guidance and ensuring value realization in their investment with Palo Alto Networks. As a Solutions Consultant you provide technical leadership and expertise and guidance in your customer’s security transformation journey. You will play a key role in defining technical solutions that secure a customer’s key business imperatives and ensuring value realization of their investment with Palo Alto Networks. You evangelize our industry leadership in on\-prem, cloud, and security operations services that establish PANW as your customer’s cybersecurity partner of choice.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Curiosity is core to the Solutions Consultant role, and you see complex problems as opportunities to learn and deliver innovative solutions! You define your impact by:
* Meeting and exceeding sales quotas by building and implementing strategic, technical account plans that target cross\-platform solutions
* Your ability to position, demonstrate and create high level designs across the entire PANW portfolio based on customer business needs
* Conducting discovery to understand and articulate the key technical, operational, and commercial imperatives of your prospects and customers
* Working closely with Professional Services, Customer Success and Specialist teams to ensure overall customer implementation and adoption of solutions
* Demonstrating strong communication skills and the ability to influence through effective presentations and customer\-specific demos, technical engagements, and workshops
* Leading successful technical validation efforts based on best practices to ensure technical win in assigned opportunities
* Orchestrating supporting resources (Specialists, Channel Resources, Customer Support) to ensure a one\-team approach that demonstrates a cohesive strategy
* Promoting end\-to\-end solutions that include PANW and/or partner professional services to ensure customers realize business value sooner
* Understanding the competitive landscape and effectively differentiating our leadership
* Continuously investing in yourself to develop technical and professional skills that drive your ever\-increasing contributions to success of our customers while actively participating within the Solutions Consultant community and at industry events
* (OT) \- Identifying technical stakeholders and cultivating relationships with key personas to build and drive a security architecture transformation roadmap.


**Qualifications**
**Our Commitment**
 We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.
   

  

 We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.
   

  

 Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.
   

  

 Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

de00094b.title: Solution Integrator
de00094b.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Lead end\-to\-end solution strategy for large multi\-tower outsourcing and transformation deals.
* Develop compelling deal storylines, value propositions, and winning themes for pursuits.
* Own presales activities including RFP/RFI responses, pricing, cost modeling, and competitive positioning.
* Integrate solutions across applications, infrastructure, cloud, and business services ensuring feasibility and alignment.
* Present solutions to C\-level stakeholders and define operating models, SLAs, governance, and transformation roadmaps.


**Your Profile**
* Strong solutioning expertise with enterprise architecture understanding across applications, cloud, and infrastructure.
* Excellent communication, storytelling, and executive presentation skills.
* Strong financial acumen including pricing models, TCO analysis, and commercial structuring.
* Proven ability to lead cross\-functional teams and manage complex deals under tight timelines.
* Influencing and stakeholder management skills with experience engaging senior leadership (CXOs).


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

d0295c92.title: Solutions Architect - Enterprise Network
d0295c92.description:
**Core Responsibilities**
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
**Client\-Facing Pre\-Sales Support**
 Lead discovery sessions, technical workshops, and strategic client briefings.
   

  

 Translate customer business outcomes into technical architectures.
   

  

 Influence and shape customer roadmaps and architecture standards.
   

  

**Solution Architecture \& Innovation**
 Architect robust enterprise network solutions using vendor best practices.
   

  

 Design repeatable solution templates and vertical\-specific architectures.
   

  

 Participate in cross\-domain solutioning, integrating network with cloud, security, or collaboration stacks.
   

  

**Proposal Development \& Deal Shaping**
 Create high\-impact technical proposals, diagrams, and cost models.
   

  

 Respond to complex RFPs/RFIs with accurate and compelling content.
   

  

 Collaborate with pricing and delivery to validate technical and operational scope.
   

  

**Technical Presentations \& Demonstrations**
 Deliver compelling solution presentations to technical and executive audiences.
   

  

 Lead or support technical demonstrations, whiteboarding sessions, and proof\-of\-concepts.
   

  

 Represent Black Box as a trusted advisor in customer briefings and strategy sessions.
   

  

**Strategic Alignment \& Advisory**
 Work with internal stakeholders to co\-develop new offerings and enhance existing ones based on field feedback.
   

  

 Coordinate with Alliance Managers to understand OEM roadmap and incorporate innovation into proposals.
   

  

 Act as a technical advisor to Sales Leaders and Business Unit VPs.

58b2b7bb.title: Presales – Pricing
58b2b7bb.description:
**Role:** 
 Presales Pricing and Solutioning
   

  

**Experience Required:** 
 9 – 18 Years
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Presales Manager plays a pivotal role in the sales cycle by collaborating with sales, product, finance, and legal teams to craft compelling solutions, pricing models, and contracts that meet client needs and drive business growth. This role requires a blend of technical expertise, commercial acumen, and strategic thinking.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Presales \& Solutioning:


* Engage with clients to understand business requirements and pain points.
* Design tailored solutions that align with client needs and company offerings.
* Deliver product demonstrations and presentations to showcase value.
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to validate feasibility.
* Pricing \& Deal Structuring
+ Develop pricing strategies and models based on client requirements, market trends, and internal cost structures.
+ Structure deals to optimize profitability while remaining competitive.
+ Support sales teams with financial modeling and ROI analysis.
+ Ensure pricing aligns with business objectives and approval policies.

* Contracting
+ Draft and review commercial contracts in collaboration with legal and finance teams.
+ Negotiate terms and conditions with clients to ensure mutual benefit and risk mitigation.
+ Ensure compliance with regulatory and internal governance standards.
+ Maintain documentation and version control of contract templates and client agreements.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in business, Engineering, Finance, or related field; MBA preferred.
* 5–10 years of experience in presales, solution consulting, pricing, or deal management.
* Strong understanding of enterprise sales cycles and solution selling.
* Experience with CRM, ERP, SaaS platforms, and financial modeling tools.
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Strategic thinking and problem\-solving.
* Cross\-functional collaboration.
* Market and competitor analysis.
* Proposal and contract writing.
* Leadership and mentoring

1de94e28.title: Presales-Cloud Architect
1de94e28.description:
**Company Description**
**About Sopra Steria**
 Sopra Steria, a major Tech player in Europe with 51,000 employees in nearly 30 countries, is recognised for its consulting, digital services and solutions. It helps its clients drive their digital transformation and obtain tangible and sustainable benefits. The Group provides end\-to\-end solutions to make large companies and organisations more competitive by combining in\-depth knowledge of a wide range of business sectors and innovative technologies with a collaborative approach. Sopra Steria places people at the heart of everything it does and is committed to putting digital to work for its clients in order to build a positive future for all. In 2025, the Group generated revenues of €5\.6 billion.
   

  

**Job Description**
**The world is how we shape it.**
**Role Overview**
 Cloud Technology Enthusiast who love solving business problems using technology. Candidate should have excellent experience with diverse customer and partner facing roles supported technical aspects of sales activities for the technology products and services such as Cloud –PaaS \& IaaS, Databases \& tools and Systems.
   

  

 You will be a key player in the pre\-sales process and be able to understand complex customer environments and be able to build close customer relationships.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Take full ownership of technical pre\-sales activities, driving solution strategy, competitive positioning, and customer success.
* Develop and deliver high\-impact proposals, ensuring alignment with client needs and industry best practices.
* Conduct C\-level client interactions, technical workshops, and deep\-dive discussions to position solutions effectively.
* Uses their recognised expertise to resolve issues
* Act as a trusted advisor and technology thought leader, guiding clients through their cloud transformation journeys.
* Demonstrable experience leading teams and pitching to clients
* Identifies and controls risks
* Good command of the market in their domain: competitor products, trends, changes in regulations
* Internally and, where relevant, externally recognised expertise in one or more business domains
* Oversees performance (profitability, lead\-times, quality) within their scope
* Advises senior business representatives on choices and implementation of a product
* Is a key player in pre\-sales in Cloud offerings and helps identify sales opportunities
* Contributes to steering product developments in liaison with Practice Director


**Essential Skills And Experience**
* Demonstrable experience in Azure and or AWS with a technical background and experience in technology deployments
* Demonstrable knowledge of Microsoft solutions and their application to a clients cloud strategy
* Strong leadership in orals during RFPs, client executive briefings, and high\-stakes technical demonstrations.
* Demonstrable experience of leading engagements and managing client stakeholders
* Ability to engage and influence C\-level executives, technical leaders, and business stakeholders.
* Good command of the market in their domain: competitor products, trends, changes in regulations
* Internally and, where relevant, externally recognised expertise in one or more business domains
* Recognised in one or more business domains and recognised expertise with one or more products or product groups as a whole
* Expertise in workshop facilitation techniques, particularly the fundamentals of co\-design work
* Good command of the impacts of agility
* Good command of and transfers motivational management practices
* Demonstrated experience managing several complex product assessment tasks


**Attributes and Qualities**
* High level of written and oral communication
* Appetite for business challenge
* Ability to motivate and inspire colleagues
* Customer orientated approach
* Innovative
* Problem solving skills


 Total Experience Expected: 10\-14 years
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Microsoft Azure / AWS Solutions Architect Expert
* Azure IaaS (virtual machines, storage, networking, security).
* Azure Backup \& Recovery Services.
* Azure Governance (Blueprints, policies, tagging, cost management).
* Azure SQL Databases (Managed Instances, PaaS, IaaS).
* Azure Security (Zero Trust, Defender for Cloud, Sentinel, Azure AD, AIP).
* Azure Serverless and integration (Batch, Function, Logic Apps, EventGrid).
* Azure Containers (AKS, ACI, ACR).
* Active Directory\\Entra ID (Azure AD, Azure AD DS, on premises AD DS).
* On premises infrastructure, virtualisation technologies or applications
* Experience with Windows Server\\Linux OS.
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (ARM, Bicep, Terraform, PowerShell).


**Additional Information**
**Desirable skills and experience It would be great if they had…**
* An ability to see the bigger picture, understanding where activities are inter\-related while ensuring dependencies are clear and appropriately managed to achieve success
* Adaptable and flexible to new work requests and highly demanding priorities
* Honed abilities to motivate and support others to achieve a common business goal
* Good knowledge of at least one business domain


**Key performance indicators How will they be measured?**
* Feedback from customers and colleagues
* Growth of the Practice
* Knowledge acquisition of more junior members of the practice
* Utilisation


 At our organization, we are committed to fighting against all forms of discrimination. We foster a work environment that is inclusive and respectful of all differences.
   

  

 All of our positions are open to people with disabilities.

10773b9c.title: Cloud Technology Consultant - AWS Cloud, Director
10773b9c.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking an experienced **Cloud Technology Consultant** to serve as a strategic advisor and hands\-on expert for enterprise clients embarking on their AWS cloud transformation journeys. In this Director\-level role, you will shape cloud strategies, guide large\-scale migrations, and influence adoption of cloud\-native architectures and modern engineering practices. This is a senior individual contributor position ideal for a technically strong consultant who combines architectural depth with an advisory mindset.

**Responsibilities**

* Partner with enterprise clients to assess current\-state environments and define future\-state cloud strategies with AWS as the primary platform
* Advise clients on cloud transformation approaches, including platform engineering, modernization, and migration
* Provide thought leadership on cloud\-native architectures, landing zones, multi\-account strategies, and operating models
* Lead cloud consulting engagements involving large\-scale workload assessments and migration planning (rehost, re\-platform, refactor, re\-architect)
* Guide clients in designing scalable, secure, and cost\-efficient cloud environments
* Contribute to strategic discussions on cloud governance, security models, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and operational excellence
* Shape solution approaches for RFPs, proposals, and client workshops, working closely with pre\-sales, architecture, and delivery teams
* Stay current with GenAI / LLM\-powered cloud use cases and advise clients on adopting innovative cloud capabilities
* Influence cloud adoption decisions through deep expertise in automation, containerization, DevSecOps, and platform scalability
* Serve as a hands\-on technical advisor and strategic individual contributor, bringing clarity and direction to complex cloud transformation initiatives

**Requirements**

* 20\+ years of overall IT experience, including extensive hands\-on cloud consulting or platform engineering experience
* Expertise in AWS services across compute, storage, networking, security, governance, and DevOps
* Background in multi\-cloud environments, with exposure to Azure as an added advantage
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale cloud migration and modernization programs
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, CDK), CI/CD pipelines, and container platforms (EKS, ECS, Kubernetes)
* Understanding of cloud security, IAM, and networking, along with encryption, compliance, and cost optimization
* Capability to collaborate directly with business, technology, and architecture stakeholders to influence strategy and guide transformation choices
* Cloud certifications (AWS preferred; Azure certifications considered a plus)
* Depth of an architect combined with the mindset of an advisor, comfortable operating as a senior individual contributor and influencing strategy through hands\-on expertise
* Confident in client\-facing discussions and capable of translating complex cloud concepts into actionable business insights
* Passionate about cloud transformation, platform engineering, and modern cloud\-native practices
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)

**Nice to have**

* Skills in application development using .NET, Java, or Python
* Background in SRE practices
* Proficiency in DevSecOps practices

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)
