* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

e70a4d1a.title: Solution Consultant II
e70a4d1a.description:
**Why UKG**
 At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.
   

  

 We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.
   

  

**Description**
 UKG Ready (UKGR) is an exciting division of Ultimate Kronos Group which continues to experience incredible growth! If you are interested in taking your career to the next level by utilizing and enhancing your software implementation and consulting skills, then this is the job for you! We are seeking talented software implementation professionals who are interested in being part of our dynamic, fast\-paced environment and are eager to develop their career and make a difference for UKG.
   

  

 You will be joining the Professional Services Consulting (PSC) job family under the workgroup of Global Delivery Services (GDS) for the new customer deployments of UKGR product and work with UKG customers in multiple geographies.
   

  

 The PSC projects’ scope has multiple roles including Solution Consultants, Integration consultants, Business Analysts and Quality analysts interacting with onsite teams and customers on a regular basis.
   

  

 We hire people having knowledge in Human Capital Management domain for projects like ADP, Oracle HCM, PeopleSoft, Ramco, SAP SuccessFactors, Workday
   

  

 As a Solution Consultant II within our UKG Ready implementation team, you will do the following:
   

  

* Engage with our Project Teams in various geographies in order to understand their business needs regarding the various modules of UKG Ready product
* Leverage your training in designing and building a solution that meets their needs
* Work cross\-functionally and amongst a team on New client implementation, upgrade, and change order projects
* Utilize your technical aptitude to configure \& re\-configure our software solution
* Stay up\-to\-date on the latest product features and functionalities
* Act as a knowledgeful consultant in the product implementation area
* Contribute to designing the best practices for product implementation
* Provide significant transfer of UKG product knowledge to UKG customer


 Ability to work in a business required shift (03:00 PM to 12:00 AM)
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Individuals looking to be a part of our talented team should possess the following:
   

  

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related field
* 2 to 5 years of industry experience with exposure to Global implementations
* Experience in implementing HCM or WFM software
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced team environment
* Ability to adapt to new technologies and changing environments
* Excellent analytical, communication and consulting skills


**Company Overview**
 UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com.
   

  

 UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.
   

  

 Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process
   

  

 For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com

5f3ca3b7.title: Sr Solution Consultant
5f3ca3b7.description:
**Why UKG**
 At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.
   

  

 We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.
   

  

 Sr. Solution Consultant – Workforce Management
   

  

 About Us: UKG (Ultimate Kronos Group) is an industry market leader known for leveraging cutting\-edge technology to revolutionize workforce management. As we continue to expand our product footprint globally, we are creating new opportunities in India. Join our dynamic team and contribute to our mission of providing innovative solutions that empower businesses and employees alike.
   

  

 Role Overview: As a Sr. Solution Consultant at UKG, you will play a pivotal role in delivering superior workforce management solutions to our clients. You will be accountable for your own success, utilizing your expert knowledge of workforce management software to design and implement solutions that maximize benefits for our customers. Your superior communication and presentation skills, coupled with your ability to manage complex environments and client relationships, will ensure your success in this role.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Requirement Assessment: Conduct workshops with senior members of customer organizations to drive requirement assessments.
* Solution Design: Architect comprehensive solutions that integrate UKG Pro WFM (Dimensions) with third\-party products, ensuring alignment with business goals.
* Customization and Integration: Design and implement customizations and integrations to meet specific client needs.
* Documentation: Collect, analyze, validate, and document business requirements, creating detailed technical specifications for the implementation team.
* Build and Configuration: Oversee the build and configuration of the system, ensuring adherence to the original design and client requirements. Provide expert knowledge and best practices during the Build phase.
* Testing Support: Provide guidance and support during the testing phase, including functional testing, integration testing, and user acceptance testing (UAT).
* Best Practices: Advocate for and implement industry best practices in workforce management, process optimization, and system configuration.
* Effective Communication: Effectively communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders using use cases, visual diagrams, and process flow charts.
* Client Management: Foster strong relationships with client Project teams, acting as a trusted advisor and ensuring high levels of client satisfaction.
* Mentoring: Mentor and provide guidance to team members on advanced modules and solutioning aspects.
* Travel: Travel up to 25% may be required to meet with clients and support project implementations.


**Qualifications**
* Education: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Computer Sciences or a related field.
* Experience:
* 6 to 10 yrs years of experience implementing or supporting enterprise software applications and hardware used in web environments (UKG Pro WFM/Workday/Ceridian/Oracle/PeopleSoft/SAP Human Resources/Payroll/Time and Labor).
* 5\+ years of experience in Workforce Management is a must.
* Relevant experience as a consultant in a similar application environment is desirable.
* Extensive experience in implementing solutions for medium to large enterprise customers.
* Skills:
* Thorough understanding of business, process, and technology relating to workforce management.
* Experience with requirement gathering, solution designing, implementing, and configuring UKG Products.
* Extensive experience on UKG Pro WFM (Dimensions) modules like Time Keeping, Accruals, Leave, Advanced Scheduling, Forecasting, Attendance and Activities is desirable.
* Prior experience in supporting functional testing, integration testing, and UAT.
* Demonstrated track record in delivering quality, on\-time technology and business solutions to a diverse customer base.
* Solid interpersonal skills to interface with co\-workers and customers, managing specific tasks to completion with minimal direction.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.


 If you are a seasoned professional with a passion for workforce management and a track record of delivering high\-quality solutions, we would love to hear from you. Apply now and be a part of our exciting journey at UKG!
   

  

**Company Overview**
 UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com.
   

  

 UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.
   

  

 Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process
   

  

 For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com

a96bd791.title: AI Agent Architect
a96bd791.description:
##### **Project description**

We are seeking a hands\-on and qualified AI Agent Architect to design and deploy advanced Agentic AI systems—comprising task\-specific autonomous tools governed by a master agent—to support complex technical decision\-making in industrial environments.  

This is a high\-impact individual contributor role for someone who can independently deliver full\-stack intelligent agents that interpret natural language queries and generate precise, context\-aware outputs by interacting with structured and unstructured data, APIs, and analytical engines.


##### **Responsibilities**


Architect and develop a multi\-agent AI framework where autonomous agents coordinate to solve domain\-specific technical queries.


Leverage LLMs, NLP, and tool\-based reasoning to automate data extraction, analysis, and insight generation.


Build agents capable of integrating with engineering tools, simulators, databases, and knowledge sources.


Collaborate with domain experts to align agent behavior with technical expectations and constraints.


Implement safeguards to ensure accuracy, traceability, and reliability of AI\-generated outputs.


Continuously optimize prompting, agent orchestration, and performance under real\-world conditions.


##### **Skills**


Must have


Demonstrated expertise in building Agentic AI architectures, using frameworks like LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, or custom stacks.


Strong foundation in LLM\-based NLP, prompt engineering, and context\-aware reasoning.


Advanced Python programming and experience deploying AI workflows in cloud or containerized environments.


Ability to work with APIs, data models, and external toolchains across complex systems.


Comfortable operating independently with minimal supervision in a cross\-functional environment.


Ready for a long term business trip to Kuwait for first 6\-12 months


Nice to have


Exposure to industrial domains such as energy, manufacturing, or heavy engineering.


Understanding of vector databases, knowledge graphs, and retrieval\-augmented generation.


Familiarity with Azure or AWS development environments.


Certifications:


Azure AI Engineer or Azure Data Engineer certification is a plus.


AWS experience is nice to have, but not required.


Industry Experience:


Oil and gas domain experience is a strong advantage, especially familiarity with digital operations or engineering workflows.


However, candidates with relevant AI system\-building experience in other complex industries are encouraged to apply.


##### **Other**


Languages


English: C1 Advanced


Seniority


Lead


  
Remote India, India


Req. VR\-122812


AI/ML


Cross Industry Solutions


06/07/2026


Req. VR\-122812

d6a14ed5.title: Apps/Sys Engineer - Pre-Sales
d6a14ed5.description:
Technical Architect – Adobe Experience Cloud \& AI Solutions
   

  

**Location:** 
 Noida / Bangalore / Remote (India)
   

  

**Organization:** 
 Adobe – Technical Presales / Solution Engineering Enablement
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Technical Architect to join our global technical presales and solution engineering team. In this role, you will help design and build customer demonstrations, Proof of Concepts (POCs), Hands\-On Labs (HOLs), and internal tools for Adobe Experience Cloud and AI\-powered solutions.
   

  

 You will collaborate with Solution Consultants, Product teams, Engineers, and business stakeholders to create scalable and engaging experiences that support customer success. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving technical challenges, building modern applications, exploring AI technologies, and working in a collaborative environment.
   

  

 We value curiosity, continuous learning, teamwork, and diverse perspectives. Candidates from a variety of backgrounds and experiences are encouraged to apply.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

 Solution Design \& Development
   

  

* Design and develop scalable demo environments, POCs, and Hands\-On Labs for Adobe Experience Cloud solutions.
* Build reusable frameworks, accelerators, and tools that improve scalability, efficiency, and user experience.
* Create end\-to\-end technical solutions integrating Adobe products, AI capabilities, APIs, and third\-party platforms.
* Contribute to innovation initiatives focused on AI\-driven customer experiences and intelligent automation.


 AI \& Machine Learning
   

  

* Develop AI\-powered use cases using Large Language Models (LLMs) and modern AI technologies.
* Work with tools and platforms such as Claude, Cursor, MCPs, AI coding assistants, and agent\-based workflows.
* Implement solutions using vector databases, embeddings, retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG), and AI APIs.
* Evaluate emerging AI technologies and contribute to rapid prototyping and experimentation.


 Engineering \& Coding
   

  

* Develop and maintain full\-stack applications, APIs, integrations, and automation services.
* Contribute hands\-on coding across frontend, backend, cloud, and AI integration layers.
* Apply engineering best practices related to scalability, reliability, maintainability, accessibility, and security.
* Support automation and operational improvements for demo provisioning and environment management.


 Adobe Experience Cloud
   

  

* Work with Adobe Experience Cloud solutions, including:
+ Adobe Experience Manager (AEM)
+ Adobe Experience Platform (AEP)
+ Real\-Time CDP
+ Customer Journey Analytics (CJA)
+ Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO)
+ Adobe Commerce
+ Adobe Target
+ GenStudio and Adobe AI solutions

* Create customer\-focused technical demonstrations aligned with business needs and industry use cases.


 Collaboration \& Leadership
   

  

* Partner with global teams across Solution Consulting, Product Engineering, Strategy, and Enablement.
* Share knowledge, mentor team members, and contribute to technical learning initiatives.
* Participate in workshops, bootcamps, enablement sessions, and innovation programs.
* Communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical audiences.


 What You’ll Bring
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience designing and developing enterprise\-scale applications and technical solutions.
* Strong hands\-on coding experience in one or more programming languages such as JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, or Node.js.
* Understanding of APIs, integrations, microservices, and cloud\-native architectures.
* Knowledge of AI/ML concepts, Generative AI, prompt engineering, and Large Language Models (LLMs).
* Experience using AI\-assisted development tools and workflows such as Claude, Cursor, MCPs, or AI agents.
* Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, RAG architectures, and AI orchestration frameworks.
* Knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with Adobe Experience Cloud solutions and digital experience technologies.
* Experience in technical presales, solution consulting, customer engineering, or demo engineering roles.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and automation frameworks.
* Experience building reusable technical assets, accelerators, or customer demo platforms.
* Contributions to innovation initiatives, hackathons, open\-source communities, or AI projects are a plus.
* Candidates with a strong academic background and consistent academic achievements are encouraged to apply.


 Key Skills
   

  

* Solution Architecture
* Full\-Stack Development
* AI \& Machine Learning
* Large Language Models (LLMs)
* Prompt Engineering
* Cloud Technologies
* API \& Integration Development
* Adobe Experience Cloud
* Technical Collaboration
* Problem Solving
* Communication Skills


 Why Join Us
   

  

* Work on innovative AI and Adobe Experience Cloud solutions.
* Collaborate with global teams on strategic customer initiatives.
* Build modern technical solutions that support customer engagement and business impact.
* Grow your expertise in AI, cloud technologies, and enterprise solution architecture.
* Be part of an inclusive, collaborative, and learning\-focused environment.


**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of this role is to design solution architecture for cross\-system interactions and business logic integration, ensuring seamless interoperability across multiple applications.
  
  

͏

Requirement Analysis\-Participate in requirement discussions with client stakeholders to define solution and implementation level needs basis the business requirements.
  
  

Designing\-Create solution architecture designs to meet cross\-system interactions and business logic integration requirements, ensuring system cohesion across multiple applications.
  
  

Integration assessment and support\-Assess and evaluate interactions across multiple applications by evaluating implementation dependencies and integration requirements.

e6ac7c8d.title: Technology Architect
e6ac7c8d.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Technology Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Design and deliver technology architecture for a platform, product, or engagement. Define solutions to meet performance, capability, and scalability needs.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Google Pub/Sub
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 Google Cloud DevOps Services, Google Kubernetes Engine
   

  

**Minimum 7\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Technology Architect, you will engage in the design and delivery of technology architecture for various platforms, products, or engagements. Your typical day will involve collaborating with cross\-functional teams to define innovative solutions that address performance, capability, and scalability requirements. You will analyze existing systems, identify areas for improvement, and ensure that the architecture aligns with business goals and technical standards. Additionally, you will be responsible for overseeing the implementation of these solutions, ensuring they meet the highest quality standards and are delivered on time.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME.
* Collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and mentoring within the team to enhance overall performance.
* Evaluate and recommend new technologies and tools that can improve system architecture and performance.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Google Pub/Sub.
* Good To Have Skills: Experience with Google Cloud DevOps Services, Google Kubernetes Engine.
* Strong understanding of cloud architecture principles and best practices.
* Experience in designing scalable and high\-performance systems.
* Proficiency in system integration and API design.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 7\.5 years of experience in Google Pub/Sub.
* This position is based at our Hyderabad office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

cb460480.title: Solutions Architect
cb460480.description:
**Role Overview** 



* **Role: Solution Architect**
* **Work Location: Surat/ Remote**
* **Experience: 8 Years\+**
* **Function: Solution Architecture**
* **Salary :\- upto 15Lpa**



  





**Responsibilities** 




**\-Solution Architecture \& Design** 




 • Define end\-to\-end architecture for enterprise and product\-based applications.
 



 • Create and review High\-Level Design (HLD), Low\-Level Design (LLD), architecture diagrams, deployment diagrams, and technical specifications.
 



 • Design scalable, secure, highly available, and maintainable systems.
 



  





**\-Technology Evaluation \& Implementation** 




 • Evaluate technologies, tools, frameworks, and platforms to recommend the most suitable solutions.
 



 • Drive architecture decisions for cloud\-native and distributed systems.
 



 • Provide technical guidance during implementation and deployment phases.
 



  





**\-Collaboration \& Stakeholder Management** 




 • Collaborate closely with product managers, engineering teams, business stakeholders, and leadership.
 



 • Participate in requirement gathering, technical discussions, and strategic planning initiatives.
 



 • Support development teams in resolving complex technical challenges.
 



  





**\-Governance \& Technical Leadership** 




 • Prepare architecture documentation, diagrams, technical roadmaps, and implementation guidelines.
 



 • Conduct feasibility studies, technical assessments, and risk analysis.
 



 • Establish and enforce architectural best practices and development standards. 
 



  





**Skills \& Experience** 




**\-Core Technical Skills** 




 • 8\+ years of software engineering experience with at least 2\+ years in an Architecture role.
 



 • Strong experience in Solution Architecture, System Design, and Enterprise Architecture.
 



 • Strong understanding of system architecture, solution design, and enterprise application integration.
 



 • Experience working with cloud platforms such as
 **AWS or Azure cloud architecture** 
 .
 



 • Experience with caching technologies such as Redis.
 



 • Experience with queue systems such as
 **RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS** 
 , or
 **Service Bus.** 




 • Strong knowledge of microservices architecture,
 **REST APIs** 
 , and distributed systems.
 



 • Familiarity with
 **SQL and NoSQL** 
 databases and modern backend/application frameworks.
 



 • Understanding scalability, security, reliability, and performance optimization principles.

ba23bb88.title: Principal Solution Architect (India/China) - Mobile
ba23bb88.description:
**Job Summary**
* This role could be based in India and China. When you start the application process you will be presented with a drop down menu showing all countries, Please ensure that you select a country where the role is based.
* Principal Solution Architect is responsible for overseeing the solution architecture for the assigned domains
* Have a deep understanding of the relevant domains, focused on digital channels, Mobile, Web and AI
* Good understanding of underlying foundational technologies including cloud, resiliency, security and identity
* Drive technical solutions for platforms across these domains
* Lead the strategy, architecture and roadmaps
* Collaborate with business and technology stakeholders to ensure that technology strategy, priorities are relevant to business strategy and objectives
* Contribute in uplifting architecture practice in all aspects including resiliency, security, reduction of complexity and performance, as well as architecture governance for these domains
* Enforce Enterprise Architecture Policy expectations
* Ensure regulatory and audit expectations and requirements from Architecture \& cloud adoption perspective
* Ensure an innovative and sustainable enterprise
* Create intentional architecture to be nimble aligned with cloud transformation agenda
* Manage holistically obsolescence and vulnerability
* Lead principle driven management of security, reliability, resiliency, and recoverability


**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy**
* Develop and drive technology strategy aligned to both Business and Group’s Tech strategy
* Provide architecture direction, guiding principles, guardrails and roadmaps that are aligned to both Business and Group’s Tech strategy
* Govern the tech decisions, and architecture directions across portfolio of change
* Accelerate the Cloud Value strategy through architecting strong foundational building blocks and reusable Cloud patterns.
* Provide directions of SaaS based products where it makes technical and commercial sense to migrate from on\-prem products.
* Drive Adoption of Information and Cyber Security controls delivered by Cyber Security Services globally across the Consumer, Private and Business Banking (WRB) portfolio.
* Strategy to increasing productivity of our cloud architecture \& engineering through providing them the right tools, career paths and collaboration capabilities.
* Improve developer productivity through creation Infrastructure as Code, Cloud patterns which are engineered well and used by development teams across the bank accelerating speed to market.


**Business**
* Enable business to increase revenue where speed to market is crucial – by modernising, reducing the complexity of the technology landscape and transforming technology assets to fit\-for\-purpose, flexible and cloud ready platforms that supports business innovations required to enable aggressive acquisition \& retention in the targeted segments \& markets.
* Improve cost efficiency – drive efficiency by identifying opportunities to rationalise to a fewer best of breed platforms which provides strategic business capability and aggressively decommission redundant applications.
* Collaborate with various Business, Technology and Security Teams.
* Govern the architecture decisions, and directions across the bespoke domain
* Bring thought leadership in assessing and defining architecture and design solutions for cloud


**Processes**
* Develop architecture blueprint for transformation agenda including cloud following Architecture Management standards and processes
* Facilitate Architecture governance and approvals
* Work with Architecture, Security, Compliance, Cloud and Technology Governance to follow appropriate policies, procedures and controls


**People \& Talent**
* People leadership responsibility, set and monitor job descriptions and objectives for direct reports and provide feedback and rewards in line with their performance against those responsibilities and objectives.
* Lead through example and build the appropriate culture and values. Set appropriate tone and expectations from the team.
* Ensure the provision of ongoing training and development; make sure that the team members are suitably skilled and qualified for their roles, ensuring that they have effective supervision in place to mitigate any risks.
* Employ, engage and retain talents with diversity agenda in mind.


**Risk Management**
* Ensure a full understanding of the risk and control environment
* Ensure onboarding of technologies are done properly with Legal, Compliance and Security Teams
* Act quickly and decisively when any risk and control weakness become apparent and ensure they are addressed within an appropriate timeframe and, if necessary, escalated through the relevant committees


**Governance**
* Ensure adherence to, bank\-wide technology, cloud, security and architecture standards.
* Awareness and understanding of the regulatory framework, in which the Group operates, and the regulatory requirements and expectations relevant to the role.
* Improve and simplify architecture and cloud governance and decisioning across the strategic Technology Themes


**Regulatory \& Business Conduct**
* Display exemplary conduct and live by the Group’s Values and Code of Conduct.
* Take personal responsibility for embedding the highest standards of ethics, including regulatory and business conduct, across Standard Chartered Bank. This includes understanding and ensuring compliance with, in letter and spirit, all applicable laws, regulations, guidelines and the Group Code of Conduct.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters.


**Key stakeholders**
* CIO, WRB
* CIO Technology Platforms \& Architecture
* Chief Architect, WRB
* Global Head of Platforms/Journeys Delivery, WRB
* Platform Domain Tech Leads
* Enterprise/Domain Architecture Teams, Enterprise Technology Team, Technology Standards Team
* Business Domain Heads
* Cloud Engineering, Cyber Security and Compliance teams


**Other Responsibilities**
* Embed Here for Good and Group’s brand and values in first line operational risk management.


**Key Requirements For The Role**
* Architecture and Problem Solving ability
* Deep knowledge of Mobile and Web Technologies AND/OR deep business domain knowledge in one or more of payments, wealth, Retail Banking
* Usage of AI in Business solutions and Architecture
* Experience in Financial Services or adjacent industries, or tech sector


**Skills And Experience**
 The ideal candidate will possess a robust and versatile architecture skill set including:
   

  

* Expertise in architecture modelling and requirements analysis to translate complex business needs into scalable solutions.
* Strong platform architecture proficiency encompassing software product knowledge, application and IT architecture principles.
* Demonstrated experience in business, data, and information security architecture to deliver comprehensive, secure technology landscapes.
* Capability in developing transitional architectures to facilitate smooth technology migrations and upgrades.
* Domain knowledge in wealth management and retail banking to contextualise solutions within financial services.
* Proven ability to lead architectural governance and to mandate adherence across cross\-functional teams.


 Technical skills combined with strategic vision and collaborative mindset will be essential to excel in this position.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Applicants must possess:
   

  

* A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* A minimum of 12\+ years overall professional experience, with at least 8 years in banking technology, enterprise architecture, or leading digital transformation initiatives within financial services.
* Fluency in English and proficiency in local languages as applicable to the specific country of employment (India or China).


 Additional certifications in architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF), cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure), or cybersecurity will be advantageous to demonstrate technical mastery.
   

  

**About Standard Chartered**
 We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. We question the status quo, love a challenge and enjoy finding new opportunities to grow and do better than before. If you're looking for a career with purpose and you want to work for a bank making a difference, we want to hear from you. You can count on us to celebrate your unique talents and we can't wait to see the talents you can bring us.
   

  

 Our purpose, to drive commerce and prosperity through our unique diversity, together with our brand promise, to be here for good are achieved by how we each live our valued behaviours. When you work with us, you'll see how we value difference and advocate inclusion.
   

  

**Together We**
* Do the right thing and are assertive, challenge one another, and live with integrity, while putting the client at the heart of what we do
* Never settle, continuously striving to improve and innovate, keeping things simple and learning from doing well, and not so well
* Are better together, we can be ourselves, be inclusive, see more good in others, and work collectively to build for the long term


**What We Offer**
**In line with our Fair Pay Charter,** 
 we offer a competitive salary and benefits to support your mental, physical, financial and social wellbeing.
   

  

* Core bank funding for retirement savings, medical and life insurance, with flexible and voluntary benefits available in some locations.
* Time\-off including annual leave, parental/maternity (20 weeks), sabbatical (12 months maximum) and volunteering leave (3 days), along with minimum global standards for annual and public holiday, which is combined to 30 days minimum.
* Flexible working options based around home and office locations, with flexible working patterns.
* Proactive wellbeing support through Unmind, a market\-leading digital wellbeing platform, development courses for resilience and other human skills, global Employee Assistance Programme, sick leave, mental health first\-aiders and all sorts of self\-help toolkits
* A continuous learning culture to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.
* Being part of an inclusive and values driven organisation, one that embraces and celebrates our unique diversity, across our teams, business functions and geographies \- everyone feels respected and can realise their full potential.

c84f392a.title: Solution Architect
c84f392a.description:
**Job Description:**









 ·        Minimum of 10 years of experience in .Net development and software engineering.
 



 ·        Proven experience in leading and managing technical teams and projects.
 



 ·        Strong background in designing and architecting complex .Net solutions.
 



 ·        Provides technical expertise, to include addressing and resolving complex technical issues.
 



 ·        Lead implementation of the solution from establishing project requirements and goals to solution "go\-live".
 



 ·        Hands on with Microsoft technology, frameworks, solutions, and tools.
 



 ·        Oversee the development efforts and provide technical help as needed.
 



 ·        Deep expertise in solution architecture, web application architecture, web services architectures, relational and non\-relational data storage specific, web application front\-end and/or back\-end architecture, solution cross\-cutting concerns (security, monitoring, caching, etc.
 



  





**Technical Skills:** 









 ·        Proficient in C\#, ASP.Net, MVC, Web API, Entity Framework, LINQ, and other .Net technologies.
 



 ·        Experience with front\-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular, Blazor or React.
 



 ·        Solid understanding of database design and development, including SQL Server and ORM framework Knowledge of cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS and related services.
 



 ·        Experience with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing.
 



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 









    Certifications:
 



  Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, or equivalent certifications.
 



  





**Additional Skills:** 




  





  Experience with micro services architecture and containerization.
 



  Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and project management tools.
 



  Experience with performance tuning, application monitoring, and troubleshooting.

127676df.title: SOLUTION ARCHITECT L2
127676df.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
 Role Purpose
 



 The purpose of this role is to define secure integration strategies, devise solution frameworks for enterprise systems, and identify infrastructure dependencies to enable efficient and compliant implementation.
 


 ͏
 
 Area of Responsibility
 



 Requirement Analysis\-Collaborate with business leaders and technical teams to define solution strategies that align with enterprise IT roadmap, security, and risk management requirements, ensuring implementation feasibility across multiple systems.
 



 Designing\-Create design frameworks for enterprise systems, review implementation across applications, and assist in creating reusable patterns and governance processes to ensure proper integration and risk control.
 



 Integration assessment and support\-Define integration framework, manage infrastructure dependencies, and create strategies for secure and efficient integration across enterprise systems.
 



 Troubleshooting\-Assess the solution in the client environment and address any issues identified during the troubleshooting process through appropriate remediation steps.
 



 Risk Analysis and Assessment\-Identify potential risks, potential impact and define governance processes for risk management and compliance across enterprise solutions and review its adherence.
 



 RFPs\-"Collaborate with sales and delivery teams to contribute to proposals by providing inputs on the interoperability of multiple applications within an enterprise system, identification of change areas, and integration approaches aligned with business needs."
 


 ͏ ͏ ͏
 
 Mandatory Skills: Hyperion Planning .
 



  
 



 Experience: \>10 YEARS
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

8b2fb1ce.title: Cloud Technology Consultant - AWS Cloud, Director
8b2fb1ce.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking an experienced **Cloud Technology Consultant** to serve as a strategic advisor and hands\-on expert for enterprise clients embarking on their AWS cloud transformation journeys. In this Director\-level role, you will shape cloud strategies, guide large\-scale migrations, and influence adoption of cloud\-native architectures and modern engineering practices. This is a senior individual contributor position ideal for a technically strong consultant who combines architectural depth with an advisory mindset.

**Responsibilities**

* Partner with enterprise clients to assess current\-state environments and define future\-state cloud strategies with AWS as the primary platform
* Advise clients on cloud transformation approaches, including platform engineering, modernization, and migration
* Provide thought leadership on cloud\-native architectures, landing zones, multi\-account strategies, and operating models
* Lead cloud consulting engagements involving large\-scale workload assessments and migration planning (rehost, re\-platform, refactor, re\-architect)
* Guide clients in designing scalable, secure, and cost\-efficient cloud environments
* Contribute to strategic discussions on cloud governance, security models, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and operational excellence
* Shape solution approaches for RFPs, proposals, and client workshops, working closely with pre\-sales, architecture, and delivery teams
* Stay current with GenAI / LLM\-powered cloud use cases and advise clients on adopting innovative cloud capabilities
* Influence cloud adoption decisions through deep expertise in automation, containerization, DevSecOps, and platform scalability
* Serve as a hands\-on technical advisor and strategic individual contributor, bringing clarity and direction to complex cloud transformation initiatives

**Requirements**

* 20\+ years of overall IT experience, including extensive hands\-on cloud consulting or platform engineering experience
* Expertise in AWS services across compute, storage, networking, security, governance, and DevOps
* Background in multi\-cloud environments, with exposure to Azure as an added advantage
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale cloud migration and modernization programs
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, CDK), CI/CD pipelines, and container platforms (EKS, ECS, Kubernetes)
* Understanding of cloud security, IAM, and networking, along with encryption, compliance, and cost optimization
* Capability to collaborate directly with business, technology, and architecture stakeholders to influence strategy and guide transformation choices
* Cloud certifications (AWS preferred; Azure certifications considered a plus)
* Depth of an architect combined with the mindset of an advisor, comfortable operating as a senior individual contributor and influencing strategy through hands\-on expertise
* Confident in client\-facing discussions and capable of translating complex cloud concepts into actionable business insights
* Passionate about cloud transformation, platform engineering, and modern cloud\-native practices
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)

**Nice to have**

* Skills in application development using .NET, Java, or Python
* Background in SRE practices
* Proficiency in DevSecOps practices

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

* Cloud certifications (AWS preferred; Azure certifications considered a plus)
* Depth of an architect combined with the mindset of an advisor, comfortable operating as a senior individual contributor and influencing strategy through hands\-on expertise
* Confident in client\-facing discussions and capable of translating complex cloud concepts into actionable business insights
* Passionate about cloud transformation, platform engineering, and modern cloud\-native practices

* Skills in application development using .NET, Java, or Python

72ee1c92.title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect
72ee1c92.description:
Job Summary
 



 We are looking for an experienced Cloud Infrastructure Architect to design, implement, and govern secure, scalable, and resilient cloud platforms across enterprise environments. The role will focus on cloud infrastructure architecture, enterprise landing zone design, disaster recovery (DR), security governance, automation, and operational excellence across multi\-cloud or hybrid cloud ecosystems.
 



 The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in cloud\-native services, infrastructure modernization, networking, security, governance, high availability, and enterprise\-scale cloud transformation programs.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Cloud Architecture \& Strategy
 


* Design enterprise\-grade cloud infrastructure solutions across AWS, Azure, and/or GCP environments.
* Define cloud adoption strategies, target\-state architectures, and modernization roadmaps.
* Establish scalable, secure, and cost\-optimized cloud infrastructure patterns.
* Collaborate with enterprise architects, security teams, DevOps engineers, and application teams.







  





 Landing Zone Architecture \& Governance
 


* Design and implement enterprise cloud landing zones aligned with security, compliance, and governance standards.
* Define multi\-account/subscription strategies, organizational hierarchy, and environment segregation.
* Implement:
* Identity and access management (IAM)
* Network segmentation
* Guardrails and policy enforcement
* Resource tagging standards
* Logging and monitoring frameworks
* Security baselines
* Establish centralized shared services architecture including:
* Connectivity hubs
* DNS
* CI/CD integration
* Secrets management
* Key management
* Enable infrastructure automation using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).







  





 Disaster Recovery (DR) \& Business Continuity
 


* Define enterprise DR strategies including:
* Active\-Active
* Active\-Passive
* Pilot Light
* Warm Standby
* Design multi\-region and cross\-region resilience architectures.
* Define and validate:
* RTO (Recovery Time Objective)
* RPO (Recovery Point Objective)
* Conduct DR drills, failover testing, and resiliency assessments.
* Architect backup, replication, and recovery solutions for:
* Compute
* Databases
* Kubernetes workloads
* File systems
* Messaging systems
* Ensure high availability and fault tolerance for mission\-critical workloads.







  





 Security \& Compliance
 


* Implement cloud security best practices and zero\-trust architecture principles.
* Work closely with cybersecurity and compliance teams to enforce governance standards.
* Implement:
* Encryption strategies
* Network security controls
* SIEM integration
* Threat detection and monitoring
* Security posture management
* Support compliance frameworks such as ISO 27001, SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI\-DSS, etc.







  





 Cloud Operations \& Optimization
 


* Establish observability and monitoring frameworks.
* Optimize cloud cost, performance, scalability, and operational efficiency.
* Define operational runbooks, SOPs, and support models.
* Support capacity planning and infrastructure lifecycle management.







  





 Required Skills \& Experience
 



 Technical Skills
 


* Strong experience with cloud platforms:
* Amazon Web Services
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud
* Expertise in:
* Landing Zone architecture
* Cloud networking
* DR architecture
* Infrastructure security
* Identity and access management
* Kubernetes and container platforms
* Strong understanding of:
* Hybrid cloud architecture
* Multi\-region deployment strategies
* HA/DR patterns
* Observability platforms
* Hands\-on experience with:
* Terraform
* Kubernetes
* Docker
* GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps / Jenkins
* Monitoring tools
* Backup \& recovery solutions







  





 Experience
 


* 4\+ years in infrastructure engineering or cloud architecture.
* 2\-3\+ years of hands\-on cloud architecture experience.
* Experience designing enterprise landing zones and DR solutions at scale.
* Experience working with regulated enterprise environments preferred.







  





 Preferred Certifications
 


* Amazon Web Services Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
* Microsoft Azure
* Kubernetes Certifications (CKA/CKAD)
* TOGAF or Enterprise Architecture certifications preferred







  





 Soft Skills
 


* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Ability to lead architecture discussions and technical governance forums.
* Strong documentation and presentation capabilities.
* Problem\-solving mindset with strategic thinking ability.







  





 Nice to Have
 



 Experience with:
 


* FinOps
* AI/ML cloud platforms
* Enterprise integration platforms
* Service mesh architectures
* Zero Trust security models
* Platform engineering
* SRE practices

0eb2bef8.title: Security Consultant - Cloud Security
0eb2bef8.description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long\-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Security Consultant specializing in cloud security, you help organizations understand and manage the entire security lifecycle within their enterprise.
   

  

* Possess strong understanding of the concepts, approaches, methods, and techniques used for the implementation and effective management of a cloud security program
* Support in design, implementation and configuration of the Cloud security systems
* Lead cloud security assessments and provide recommendations on required configurations for client cloud platforms (such as AWS, Azure, GCP, Alibaba Cloud, Oracle Cloud) and environments based on Cloud Cyber Risk Framework and industry standard frameworks such as PDP, GDPR, ISO, CSA\-CSM and NIST
* Provide support for escalated incidents or critical situations
* Interface with Engineering and assist with testing or troubleshooting
* Reproduce issues to verify problems and provide feedback to Engineering and teams
* Contribute to development and maintenance of Information Security Policies, Standards and Guidelines
* Identify security gaps or concerns pertaining to new infrastructure or application build out. 9\. Troubleshoot problems with cloud infrastructure (e.g., domain name service, virtual network peering, dedicated cloud connectivity services) and resources (e.g., virtual machines, virtual networks, cloud databases) in a multi\-cloud vendor environment and lead analysis of technical platform issues, and resolution as part of cyber risk mitigation steps
* Gather evidence, perform remediation, and work with the IT GRC vertical to support audit efforts.
* Create and maintain documentation of departmental security procedures pertaining to cloud security
* Serve as an expert on cloud cyber risk for other business and technology stakeholders.
* Maintain and build effective, professional relationships with third party vendors and service providers that result in timely delivery of requirements and the highest standards of quality and cost effectiveness
* Work with internal stakeholders to gather requirements and develop the most effective solutions
* Keep abreast with latest trends in the field of cloud security
* Participate in seminars/conferences/forums to keep up\-to\-date with the industry best practice


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Cloud computing experience (AWS, AliCloud, Azure), and in particular, CloudFormation, EC2, EMR, S3, Redshift, RDS, SQS and AutoScaling Groups
* Experience in patch management and vulnerability scanning
* Familiarity with industry standards, guidelines, and regulatory compliance requirements related to information security and cloud computing such as ISO 27001, Cloud Security Alliance, NIST 800\-53, PCI DSS, SOC2 and FedRamp
* Strong analytical \& problem\-solving skills with ability to translate ideas into practical implementation
* Ability to manage stakeholder relationships including team members, vendors and partners 6\. Excellent leadership and communication skills with ability to present and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical audience
* Ability to provide technical and professional leadership, guidance, and training to other


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Cloud computing experience (AWS, AliCloud, Azure), and in particular, CloudFormation, EC2, EMR, S3, Redshift, RDS, SQS and AutoScaling Groups
* Experience in patch management and vulnerability scanning
* Familiarity with industry standards, guidelines, and regulatory compliance requirements related to information security and cloud computing such as ISO 27001, Cloud Security Alliance, NIST 800\-53, PCI DSS, SOC2 and FedRamp
* Strong analytical \& problem\-solving skills with ability to translate ideas into practical implementation
* Ability to manage stakeholder relationships including team members, vendors and partners 6\. Excellent leadership and communication skills with ability to present and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical audience
* Ability to provide technical and professional leadership, guidance, and training to other

ff067471.title: Systems Architect - Cloud AIOps
ff067471.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Systems Architect \- Cloud AIOps** 
 to design and evolve next\-generation cloud platforms where AI\-driven intelligence is embedded as a foundational design principle. In this role, you will shape AI\-enabled platform engineering strategies, lead AIOps architecture initiatives, and serve as a senior technical authority guiding enterprise modernization programs across cloud infrastructure and cloud\-native environments.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Architect and evolve cloud platforms (AWS or Azure) where AI\-driven intelligence is a foundational design principle, not an afterthought
* Define and drive AI\-enabled platform engineering strategy, integrating observability, telemetry pipelines, intelligent alerting, predictive insights, and automation
* Lead the design of AIOps architectures that combine monitoring data, logs, metrics, traces, and operational knowledge to support proactive operations
* Embed SRE principles (SLIs, SLOs, error budgets) into platform design and enable AI\-assisted reliability management
* Serve as a senior technical authority in customer\-facing engagements, architecture workshops, and RFP/RFI responses, articulating AI\-driven platform value
* For Cloud Infrastructure\-led engagements: architect AI\-ready landing zones, networking, IAM, hybrid connectivity, DR, and cost governance
* For Cloud Native\-led engagements: architect Kubernetes platforms, modernization initiatives, and cloud\-native runtime environments designed for intelligent operations
* Design and integrate AI\-assisted operational knowledge systems, including RAG\-based architectures, to accelerate root cause analysis and decision support
* Collaborate with data and ML teams to consume AI/ML capabilities for operations (anomaly detection, automated RCA, predictive capacity insights)
* Provide architectural guidance on LLM, vector stores, and RAG pipelines as platform components for operational and reliability use cases
* Mentor architects and senior engineers, establishing AI\-aware platform engineering standards across the organization







**Requirements** 



* 13\-20 years of experience in cloud platform architecture and engineering
* For the Cloud Infrastructure path: expertise in enterprise landing zones, VPC/VNet design, and security \& IAM, along with hybrid/multi\-cloud connectivity
* For the Cloud Native path: proficiency in Kubernetes platforms (EKS/AKS), microservices modernization, and service mesh (Istio/Linkerd), including GitOps and container security
* Background in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Ansible, and CloudFormation or ARM/Bicep
* Skills in CI/CD and platform automation with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI
* Competency in automation and integration scripting with Python, Shell, and PowerShell
* Familiarity with observability stacks such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK/EFK, as well as OpenTelemetry, Datadog, AppDynamics, and New Relic
* Strong SRE foundations covering SLIs/SLOs, error budgets, incident automation, and postmortems
* Expertise in AIOps capabilities, including event correlation across telemetry sources, anomaly detection on metrics/logs/traces, automated remediation with intelligent runbooks, and predictive alerting and capacity insights
* Understanding of RAG architectures for operational knowledge retrieval and AI\-assisted decisioning
* Proven experience leading platform\-led modernization programs and influencing platform roadmaps at enterprise and portfolio levels
* Capability to assess legacy and cloud environments and define AI\-enabled target platform architectures, combining platform engineering, AI capabilities, and operational excellence
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)

79f35813.title: Senior Technical Architect — AWS Cloud Solutions
79f35813.description:
**Senior Technical Architect — AWS Cloud Solutions \- Gurgaon/Noida/Pune/Bangalore** 




  





*Individual Contributor, Senior/Lead Level \|* 
***Hands\-On Technical Role***




**Role Summary** 




 EXL Digital is hiring
 **Senior/Lead Enterprise Architects** 
 with deep, hands\-on expertise in cloud\-native architecture on AWS to own end\-to\-end technical design and solution architecture across multiple product lines or client engagements.
 



 This is an
 **individual\-contributor** 
 role, not a people\-management position. It calls for a proven, senior technologist with strong reasoning ability — someone who can independently take an ambiguous business problem, design a sound enterprise architecture for it, and work directly with engineering teams to troubleshoot and deliver, across several concurrent engagements with minimal oversight.
 



**About EXL Digital** 




 At EXL, we believe there is always a better way. We look deeper, we find it, and we make it happen. We've built a culture founded on core values of innovation, collaboration, excellence, integrity, and respect.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Own End\-to\-End Architecture** 



* Define and own end\-to\-end enterprise architecture — application, data, integration, security, and cloud layers — for one or more product lines or client engagements.
* Translate ambiguous business goals into clear architectural blueprints and reference implementations, applying strong first\-principles reasoning to design pragmatic, defensible solutions.
* Design cloud\-native and serverless solutions on AWS, following AWS Well\-Architected principles, across compute, networking, storage, and data layers.
* Lead architecture and design reviews across teams; make, and stand behind, build\-vs\-buy and technology trade\-off decisions independently.
* Design integration strategies for internal services, third\-party systems, and partner APIs (REST, GraphQL, event\-driven, messaging), and lead complex enterprise system integrations.



**Drive Technical Delivery Across Multiple Engagements** 



* Operate with a high degree of autonomy across multiple concurrent solutions — driving architecture and technical decisions to closure without needing close oversight.
* Provide hands\-on technical troubleshooting support to engineering teams — working directly with them to resolve production issues, performance bottlenecks, and integration failures.
* Build proof\-of\-concepts and reference implementations to validate architectural approaches before broader rollout.
* Embed security, compliance, and Well\-Architected best practices into every design (IAM, encryption, secrets management, threat modeling).



**Design AI\-Enabled Solutions** 



* Architect solutions that incorporate AWS AI/ML and agentic AI services (e.g., Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker) at the solution\-design level — evaluating where generative AI and agent\-based patterns fit within a broader enterprise architecture.
* Stay current on the AWS AI/ML landscape and recommend where it creates real architectural or business value.



  





**Communicate and Influence** 



* Communicate architecture and trade\-offs clearly to executives, clients, product managers, and engineers alike.
* Influence engineering teams toward architectural standards and best practices, earning trust through technical credibility.



**Required Qualifications** 



* 15\+ years in enterprise application/systems development, including 5\+ years operating at architect or principal\-engineer level.
* Deep, hands\-on expertise designing cloud\-native architectures on AWS — compute, serverless, networking, storage, databases, and security — fluent in the AWS Well\-Architected Framework.
* Strong reasoning and problem\-solving ability — a proven track record designing scalable, resilient software systems and enterprise architectures from ambiguous requirements.
* Experience with microservices, event\-driven architecture, API design (REST/GraphQL), and complex enterprise system integrations.
* Demonstrated ability to independently drive technical decisions and troubleshoot directly with engineering teams across multiple concurrent engagements.
* Solid data architecture background — relational (PostgreSQL/MySQL), NoSQL, caching, and search.
* Working knowledge of security architecture (OAuth, SAML, SSO, IAM, encryption, secrets management, secure SDLC).
* Familiarity with DevOps/IaC practices (Terraform/CloudFormation, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes).
* Excellent communication skills — able to explain complex technical concepts to technical and non\-technical stakeholders alike.
* Experience designing solutions that incorporate AWS AI/ML and agentic AI services (e.g., Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker) at the architecture level.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional, or equivalent.
* Experience working across multiple client accounts or business units concurrently (systems\-integrator or consulting background a plus).
* Exposure to modern frontend frameworks (React, Vue, or Angular) sufficient for full\-stack architectural decisions.
* Experience in Agile/SCRUM environments, leading architecture across sprints and releases.



**Education** 



* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

f0a8b7cd.title: Zuora Revenue Architect
f0a8b7cd.description:
**No. of Positions:** 1
**Relevant Experience:** 7\+ Years
**Job Location:** Bengaluru
**Job Type:** Full Time
**Work Timing:** Afternoon Shift
**Work Mode:** Hybrid / Remote
### **Company overview: About Estuate**


At Estuate, more than 400 uniquely talented people work together, to provide the world with next\-generation product engineering and IT enterprise services. We help companies reimagine their business for the digital age.


Incorporated in 2005 in Milpitas (CA), we have grown to become a global organization with a truly global vision. At Estuate, we bring together talent, experience, and technology to meet our customer’s needs. Our **‘Extreme Service’** culture helps us deliver extraordinary results.


### **Our key to success**


We are an ISO\-certified organization present across four distinct global geographies. We cater to industry verticals such as BFSI, Healthcare \& Pharma, Retail \& E\-Commerce, and ISVs/Startups, as well as having over 2,000 projects in our portfolio.


Our solution\-oriented mindset fuels our offerings, including Advisory, Engineering, Data \& AI, AI Business Applications, Enterprise Security \& GRC and Managed Services.


### **Our culture of oneness**


At Estuate, we are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace that welcomes people from diverse social circumstances. Our diverse culture shapes our success stories. Our values unite us. And, our curiosity inspires our creativity. Now, if that sounds like the place you’d like to be, we look forward to hearing more from you.


Currently, we are looking for a **Zuora Revenue Architect** to join our **team.**


**Job Description**
-------------------


* 7\+ years’ Order to Cash with Revenue Recognition experience within a professional services/SaaS organization; ideally, at least 3 years in delivering revenue solutions
* Experience in working with at least one of the revenue recognition products: Zuora Revenue, Oracle Revenue Management, NetSuite ARM
* Excellent knowledge of ASC 605 and 606
* Must have knowledge of integration and data flows between CRM, Order Management, Billing, and Revenue systems
* Experience with customer\-facing solution delivery and/or business consulting experience
* Demonstrated ability to lead business discussions with customers, architect solutions, and implement best practices
* Experience in requirements gathering, use case documentation, business analysis, systems design and integration, and implementation
* Experience in SQL, data analysis, conversion and migration, interfaces, and reports
* Must be a strong team player with excellent communication skills at the business and technical levels, able to collaborate with cross\-functional teams
* Experience managing tasks on multiple projects simultaneously
* Able to travel to customer locations as needed
* BS/MS degree in Information Systems or Computer Science or equivalent practical experience
* Work at the enterprise level to deliver revenue solutions and manage end\-to\-end solution design and delivery in collaboration with the Revenue Accounting team, IT, the Solution Delivery Manager, and Technical Consultants.
* Conduct requirements gathering and design workshops to analyze the requirements
* Perform FIT/GAP analysis on business requirements and then document gathered requirements/user stories
* Design and document functional and technical solutions, including process flows, technical customizations, and integrations, based on customer requirements
* Work with the customer to get sign\-off on requirements, design, and production roll\-out
* Configure and test Zuora Revenue, and Add\-On products to meet the approved designs
* Work with Technical Consultants to explain the requirements to build any custom solutions/integrations
* Perform testing of end\-to\-end solutions in conjunction with the development team and customer
* Perform customer demos throughout the project lifecycle
* Create and develop training materials and conduct/deliver end\-user training to customers
* Support the customer with regular calls to answer functional and technical questions

### **Our commitment to Equal Opportunity Employment (EOE)**


Estuate, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Our employment decisions are made on the basis of merit and business needs. We comply with all applicable state \& local laws governing non\-discrimination in employment at each of our facilities and locations.


### **Disclaimer**


The above job definition information has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this classification. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required of employees assigned to this job. Job duties and responsibilities are subject to change based on changing business needs and conditions.

8c01efb4.description:
**No. of Positions:** 1
**Relevant Experience:** 7\+ Years
**Job Location:** Bengaluru
**Job Type:** Full Time
**Work Timing:** Afternoon Shift
**Work Mode:** Hybrid / Remote
### **Company overview: About Estuate**


At Estuate, more than 400 uniquely talented people work together, to provide the world with next\-generation product engineering and IT enterprise services. We help companies reimagine their business for the digital age.


Incorporated in 2005 in Milpitas (CA), we have grown to become a global organization with a truly global vision. At Estuate, we bring together talent, experience, and technology to meet our customer’s needs. Our **‘Extreme Service’** culture helps us deliver extraordinary results.


### **Our key to success**


We are an ISO\-certified organization present across four distinct global geographies. We cater to industry verticals such as BFSI, Healthcare \& Pharma, Retail \& E\-Commerce, and ISVs/Startups, as well as having over 2,000 projects in our portfolio.


Our solution\-oriented mindset fuels our offerings, including Advisory, Engineering, Data \& AI, AI Business Applications, Enterprise Security \& GRC and Managed Services.


### **Our culture of oneness**


At Estuate, we are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace that welcomes people from diverse social circumstances. Our diverse culture shapes our success stories. Our values unite us. And, our curiosity inspires our creativity. Now, if that sounds like the place you’d like to be, we look forward to hearing more from you.


Currently, we are looking for a **Zuora Billing Consultant / Architect** to join our **team.**


**Job Description**
-------------------


* 7\+ years’ experience with setting up products with proficiency in all types of charge models
* Experience with billing rules, tax engine, revenue recognition, etc.
* Experience with Zuora payment rules, payment gateways, HPP, gateway reconciliation
* Experience in Zuora Finance, mainly focused on closing of books
* Experience with conducting workshops on Zuora Keys
* Worked on Zuora Collect Apps such as APM, CPR, Lockbox, etc.
* Experience with various template creation, including Word and HTML (Invoice, Email, Notification)
* Hands\-on Zuora workflow experience required to automate new workflows and enhance the existing ones
* Hands\-on Zuora experience with creating and using Zuora reports
* Experience in understanding customer needs and providing analytical solutions to complex use cases
* Experience working with Zuora APIs and familiarity with the Zuora object model
* Experience with deployment across multiple tenants
* Familiarity with diverse ERP and financial platforms like NetSuite and Salesforce
* Project management, system implementation, and system integration experience
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills
* Ability to mentor team members and work collaboratively with cross\-functional teams
* Ability to juggle multiple stakeholders and remain professional and flexible in high\-pressure situations

### **Our commitment to Equal Opportunity Employment (EOE)**


Estuate, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Our employment decisions are made on the basis of merit and business needs. We comply with all applicable state \& local laws governing non\-discrimination in employment at each of our facilities and locations.

The above job definition information has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this classification. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required of employees assigned to this job. Job duties and responsibilities are subject to change based on changing business needs and conditions.
