e76e1b0d.title: Solutions Architect - Managed Services
e76e1b0d.description:
**Job Description**
 Manage opportunities and assist sales teams in the preparation, delivery, presentation and negotiation of Managed Services proposals, contracts and pricing.
   

  

* Respond to RFP s, RFQ s and proactive bids while working closely with all teams to develop the win strategy, competitor evaluation and creating differentiated value propositions.
* Develop a deep understanding of Blackbox services capabilities and serve as a Managed Services thought leader and SME across the organization.
* Assist in identifying, developing and rollout of new, innovative and exciting service offerings.
* Achieve sales and profit goals through joint account planning, partner teaming (internal \& external), on\-site client interface/visits, engagement/solution development and implementation support/follow\-up.
* Lead the design and execution strategy for multi\-site rollouts, ensuring seamless deployment and standardized configurations across diverse geographic locations
* Architect and oversee network refresh projects, working closely with clients to modernize legacy infrastructure while minimizing downtime and business disruption
* Drive infrastructure refresh initiatives, including server, storage, and network hardware upgrades, aligned with evolving business and technology requirements
* Define support models and resource planning for Smart Hands services, enabling on\-site technical assistance across various customer environments
* Design scalable and flexible frameworks for on\-demand support, including SLA\-based engagements to handle ad\-hoc technical requirements across IT infrastructure domains
* Provide solution leadership for structured cabling projects, covering both copper and fiber, ensuring compliance with standards and optimal network performance.
* Coordinate and deliver detailed Wi\-Fi site surveys, including predictive and physical surveys, to ensure optimal coverage, capacity, and performance for enterprise wireless networks
* Plan and manage Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, ensuring minimal user impact and improved wireless experience across all business\-critical areas


**Knowledge, Skills \& Abilities**
* Strong business acumen and understanding of clients IT related business goals and challenges to ensure proper translation of the client’s needs into solutions
* Understanding various pricing models such as per port , resource based, ticket based, onsite, remote or Hybrid
* Experience of solutioning on deals involving multi\-site rollouts, network refresh projects, Smart Hands services, on\-demand support, structured cabling projects (both copper and fiber), Wi\-Fi site surveys and Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, etc.
* Strong understanding of Pre\-sales/Solutions process and activities with hands\-on experience good bid/project management skills ability to manage multiple bids simultaneously
* Ability to develop and deliver technical presentations with customers and tailor content to audience as appropriate. Display sustained energy and determination to meet challenging deliverables within stringent timelines
* Ability to work independently with diverse \& global teams and interact confidently with customers and internal stakeholders at all levels
* Strong written and verbal communication skills
* Experience running support teams and/or operations a plus
* Strong experience with Unified Communications and UC Managed Services a plus


**Education And Experience**
* Degree in a computer Science and Engineering or equivalent role relevant experience
* 10\+ years in a customer/client facing technical role (Pre/Post Sales, Sales Engineering, Consulting, Solutions Architecture, Service Delivery, etc.) with a strong knowledge of various network architectures, virtualization, Cloud, Unified Communications and mobility solutions.
* 5\+ years of experience in managed services practice.
* 8\+ years of pre\-sale experience developing managed IT and/or managed UC services solutions.
* ITSM training and certifications (ITIL,COBIT, etc.) a plus
* Extensive consulting experience, providing large, global customers with strategic and tactical planning for technology solutions.
* Demonstrated and verifiable track record of prior successful customer engagements. Examples of solution designs, statements of work and/or technical project plans are required
* Experience in the development and implementation of IT and/or managed Unified Communications solutions with accountability for end\-to\-end delivery
* Experience with enterprise OEM such as AVAYA, Cisco, etc. a plus
* Experience leading and/or managing teams a plus


 CERTIFICATIONS
   

  

 Current and valid industry certifications on technology partners,processes in one or more of the following preferred:
   

  

* UC and/or Contact Center (AVAYA, Cisco, Genesys, etc.)
* Network (Cisco, Juniper, Extreme, etc.)
* ITIL


 KEY TECHNOLOGIES
   

  

* Unified Communications
* Network Architecture
* Wireless
* Cyber security

3d9ca869.title: Service Delivery Mgr - Cloud Services
3d9ca869.description:
**Req ID:** 
 377051
   

  

 NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
   

  

 We are currently seeking a Service Delivery Mgr \- Cloud Services to join our team in Delhi, Delhi (IN\-DL), India (IN).
   

  

***NTT Data Services is Hiring!***
**Position's Overview**
 At NTT DATA Inc., we know that with the right people on board, anything is possible. The quality, integrity, and commitment of our employees are key factors in our company’s growth, market presence, and our ability to help our clients stay a step ahead of the competition. By hiring, the best people and helping them grow both professionally and personally, we ensure a bright future for NTT DATA and for the people who work here.
   

  

 NTT DATA, Inc. currently seeks a Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager to join our team.
   

  

**Client's business problem to solve?**
 You will take a key role in NTT Data Cloud Service Delivery Management practice and Program Management Office. The
 **Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager** 
 works directly with cross\-functional teams across the company to support our clients in their migration/transition to the Cloud as well as with long\-term engagements (steady\-state) as Service Delivery Manager (SDM); managing the interests of NTT Data but also aligning these with our Clients’ Cloud needs.
   

  

 The ideal candidate has a broad skill set:
   

  

* Strong program management skills.
* Excellent communications both written and oral, be able to talk to and act on many organizational levels.
* Can Do attitude and entrepreneurial skills to meet milestones and deadlines.


 Position's General Duties and Tasks
   

  

**In this role you will be responsible for:**
* Maintaining positive relationships with customers.
* Identifying customer needs and overseeing service delivery within the business context.
* Managing finances and budgets and tracking contract deliverables.
* Determining ways to reduce costs without sacrificing customer satisfaction.
* Assessing customer feedback and using your creativity to establish, improve, and refine services.
* Building partnerships and liaising with team leaders to determine the company's services, delivery criteria, and solutions for issues that may arise.
* Providing status, updates, and dashboards to client stakeholders. Mitigate risk and accelerate resolution of outstanding issues.
* Responsible for developing and meeting project plans/schedules, defining project execution requirements, and managing communications.
* P\&L Control, Complex Negotiations, MS Project and Planning Techniques, Risk Logs, Deviations and Mitigations, scope control.
* Responsible for coordinating projects through various communications, data collection, and analysis. May act as Project Manager on multiple projects concurrently.
* Outstanding analytical, problem\-solving, negotiation, and organizational skills to effectively achieve project objectives whilst maintaining a strong sense of urgency. Functional experience in multiple business areas.
* Ability to relate business knowledge to complex problems.
* Additionally, the candidate must have a very strong ability to deal with ambiguity and drive for results. The ability to summarize and present information concisely and clearly for review and approval is a must.


**Requirements for this role include:**
* A bachelor's degree in a business\-related field.
* Fluent in English.
* Experience in Project Management, preferably in a technical or infrastructure\-related role.
* Proficiency in project management methodologies and demonstrated ability to create and maintain project plans, budgets, and timelines.
* Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* Good understanding of infrastructure components such as networking, servers, storage, and virtualization.
* Familiarity with Cloud computing platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) and related services.
* Proven track record of identifying and resolving issues that arise during project execution.
* Ability to think critically and develop creative solutions to overcome challenges and obstacles.
* Experience mitigating project risks and ensuring project deliverables are completed on time and within budget.
* Excellent verbal and written communications skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Proven consensus\-building skills in a remote role.
* Leadership skills with the ability to motivate and lead cross\-functional teams.
* Experience collaborating with stakeholders at all levels of the organization to gather requirements and drive project success.
* Strong analytical and negotiation skills.
* Self\-starter, energetic, flexible, innovative, and willing to get things done.
* Experience as a complex project manager or a program manager.
* Willingness to stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices.
* Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and priorities in a fast\-paced environment.


**Preferences:**
* 10\+ years relevant experience.
* Deep domain experience with 5\+ years of work experience in Services, cloud computing, or technical project delivery.
* Enterprise work experience dealing with highly complex situations is strongly preferred.
* Experience managing technical and executive\-level relationships (IT Director, VP, and C\-level).
* PMP, ITIL, Agile, Azure, AWS and GCP certifications preferred.


 Required schedule availability for this position is Monday\-Friday (time zone to be determined).
   

  

**About NTT DATA**
 NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in R\&D.
   

  

 Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
   

  

***NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.***
***This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.***

088b8c4f.title: PROJECT DELIVERY LEAD - VOIS
088b8c4f.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced project delivery professional to lead and manage large\-scale application development programmes within the telecommunications domain. This role focuses on delivering projects within defined KPIs, driving customer engagement, and establishing effective project management frameworks. The individual will operate within Agile environments, oversee programme delivery, and contribute to organisational improvements while mentoring emerging project management talent.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead assigned programmes and projects to successful completion within defined KPIs such as budget, quality, and risk management
* Develop and implement detailed project management plans, including scope, timelines, and resource allocation
* Drive strong customer engagement, ensuring alignment with expectations and delivery outcomes
* Establish milestones and execute structured action plans to achieve project objectives
* Define and enhance project management frameworks and operating models as required
* Contribute to RFP/RFI processes for new business opportunities
* Guide and support junior project professionals, enabling capability development within the team
* Promote continuous improvement initiatives at organisational or service line level
* Motivate and support team members in achieving shared goals through effective collaboration


**Who You Are**
* Extensive experience managing application development projects valued at USD 2–5 million
* Strong understanding of BIBDA and BSS domains within telecommunications
* Proven experience in programme management and Agile delivery frameworks
* Expertise in estimation, productivity optimisation, and delivery planning
* 13–18 years of overall professional experience, including 8–10 years in project/programme management roles
* Familiarity with tools such as Microsoft Project (MPP), Slack, Jira, Confluence, and Azure DevOps
* Professional certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, Certified ScrumMaster (CSM), or SAFe (preferred)
* Educational background in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* Opportunity to lead high\-value, globally impactful technology programmes
* Exposure to strategic initiatives within a leading telecommunications environment
* Collaborative working environment with cross\-functional and international teams
* Professional development through certifications and continuous learning opportunities
* A culture that values inclusion, innovation, and employee growth


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced programme and portfolio management techniques
* Customer engagement and stakeholder management at scale
* Agile and hybrid delivery methodologies in complex environments
* Strategic thinking in telecom technology and service delivery
* Leadership and mentoring capabilities within global teams


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media**
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

9893e82e.title: Delivery Lead
9893e82e.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Delivery Lead / POD Lead
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



**Department:** 
 Delivery / Customer Support
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



**Reports To:** 
 Head of Delivery / Director – Delivery
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced
 **Delivery Lead / POD Lead** 
 to join
 **Signzy Technologies Private Limited** 
 , a leading B2B SaaS technology product organization.
 



 The Delivery Lead will be responsible for ensuring the successful delivery of products and services to clients by managing the end\-to\-end project lifecycle, from initiation to completion. This role will work closely with cross\-functional teams, including Product, Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success, to ensure client expectations are met, project timelines are maintained, and delivery processes run smoothly and efficiently.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 Project Management
 



 Oversee multiple client\-facing projects simultaneously, ensuring delivery is completed on time, within scope, and as per defined quality standards.
 



  





 Client Relationship Management
 



 Act as the primary point of contact for clients, manage client expectations, proactively address concerns, and ensure a high level of customer satisfaction.
 



  





 Cross\-Functional Collaboration
 



 Coordinate with Product, Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success teams to ensure alignment on deliverables, timelines, milestones, and client requirements.
 



  





 Resource Management
 



 Plan and manage resource allocation across projects to ensure successful delivery and avoid bottlenecks.
 



  





 Risk and Issue Management
 



 Identify project risks, dependencies, and issues in a timely manner, and work with relevant stakeholders to mitigate or resolve them effectively.
 



  





 Delivery Process Ownership
 



 Own the end\-to\-end delivery process by continuously assessing workflows, delivery standards, and client outcomes to drive improvements.
 



  





 Stakeholder Communication
 



 Provide regular updates on project progress, risks, issues, and milestones to internal and external stakeholders, ensuring transparency throughout the delivery lifecycle.
 



  





 Reporting and Documentation
 



 Maintain accurate project documentation, status reports, trackers, and other relevant project\-related records.
 



  





 Continuous Improvement
 



 Drive process improvements, implement delivery best practices, and contribute to operational efficiency and improved quality of delivery.
 



  





**Job Requirements** 




  





 Experience
 


* 5\+ years of experience in Delivery, Project Management, Program Management, or a similar client\-facing role within a B2B SaaS or technology\-driven environment.
* Proven experience in managing large\-scale and complex client projects involving cross\-functional teams.
* Strong experience in SaaS product delivery, including onboarding, integrations, implementation, and customer enablement.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
* Familiarity with project management tools such as Jira, Asana, Trello, Monday.com, or similar platforms.



 Education
 


* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* PMP, PRINCE2, Scrum Master, or Agile certifications would be an added advantage.



 Technical Understanding
 


* Good understanding of SaaS architectures, cloud\-based applications, and technology stacks.
* Ability to understand technical requirements and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.



  





**Key Skills** 




  





 Leadership and Communication
 


* Strong leadership and people management skills.
* Ability to guide, motivate, and align cross\-functional teams towards successful project delivery.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Ability to engage effectively with internal teams, external clients, and senior stakeholders.



 Project and Delivery Management
 


* Strong expertise in managing timelines, scope, resources, risks, and dependencies.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and competing priorities simultaneously.
* Strong ownership mindset with the ability to drive projects to closure.



 Client Focus
 


* Strong client\-facing skills with the ability to build long\-term relationships.
* Ability to understand client expectations, business needs, and pain points.
* Commitment to delivering high\-quality outcomes and ensuring customer satisfaction.



 Problem Solving and Decision Making
 


* Ability to analyze complex problems and provide practical, solution\-oriented recommendations.
* Strong decision\-making capabilities, especially in high\-pressure situations.
* Ability to anticipate challenges and take proactive corrective action.



 Attention to Detail and Quality
 


* Strong attention to detail in project planning, documentation, communication, and delivery.
* Commitment to maintaining high standards of quality across deliverables and client interactions.



 Time Management
 


* Excellent organizational and time management skills.
* Ability to manage multiple deadlines, stakeholders, and deliverables effectively.



  





**Desirable Qualities** 




  




* Strong understanding of Agile principles and the ability to promote Agile ways of working within teams.
* Proactive, solution\-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment.
* Strong client empathy and ability to understand business\-critical client requirements.
* Ability to drive accountability across teams and ensure timely execution.
* Comfortable working with ambiguity and evolving project requirements

1dd1b77c.title: Acquisition & Engagement Manager
1dd1b77c.description:
**Job Requirements**
 About the Role
   

  

 The Acquisition \& Engagement Manager in Branch Banking is responsible for supporting branch launches and events within the assigned region or zone. The role focuses on acquiring targeted customers, delivering exceptional and personalized service, and building strong customer relationships. Additionally, the role involves driving below\-the\-line (BTL) marketing activities to contribute to the overall objectives of the branch banking channel.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

**Primary Responsibilities**
* Conceptualize and execute micro\-marketing events for mapped branches and corporate clients as per defined frequency.
* Identify and develop a vendor network to ensure quality and cost\-effectiveness for all events.
* Generate high\-quality leads for the acquisition team.
* Drive planning and execution of on\-ground events to enhance customer engagement.
* Facilitate strong business\-to\-business relationships between the bank and clients by creating an environment conducive to customer interactions.
* Ideate and leverage multiple channels to identify new business opportunities.


 Secondary Responsibilities
   

  

* Support regional initiatives and collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution of engagement activities.
* Monitor event performance and recommend improvements for future campaigns.


 What We Are Looking For
   

  

 Education
   

  

* Graduate in any discipline.


**Experience**
* 2 to 5 years of relevant experience in customer acquisition, engagement, or event management.


 Skills and Attributes
   

  

* Strong planning and organizational skills.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
* Ability to manage vendors and ensure cost\-effective event execution.
* Creative thinking for ideating engagement activities.
* Customer\-centric approach with a focus on relationship building.
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced environment and meet deadlines.

b491666c.title: Engagement Manager
b491666c.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
* History of successful management of ERP engagement: on\-time, on\-budget with a satisfied client
* Ability to successfully address significant project issues with Executives and Middle Management
* Experience transforming organizations, defining project budgets, managing project budgets and driving postive project ROI
* Demonstrated Executive communication and coaching Understanding of Solution Architecture and tradeoffs Ability to lead and motivate large on shore and offshore project teams


**Your Profile**
 Primary Focus is to manage large Oracle transformation engagements with annualized revenues of $7\-15M\+ in the role of a Program Manager across any of the Oracle products
   

  

* SaaS ERP, HCM, SCM, Oracle Cloud and CX applications
* EBS On\-Prem and Oracle Cloud


 In addition, the candidate will have the opportunity to work closely with Capgemini’s Industry Sales teams in qualifying deals, and playing the Oracle Pursuit Lead role for the entire sales cycle from creating the pursuit strategy \& win themes to driving discovery sessions, building proposals, participating in orals, and assisting with closing.
   

  

 Required Expertise:
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have proven experience as a Program Manager for large, complex, global transformation programs in finance, human capital, customer experience, supply chain, and technology on Oracle Cloud. Candidates with 15\+ years of experience in project/program management
   

  

 Additional expertise includes:
   

  

 Assembling Complex deals
   

  

* Must demonstrate experience defining and positioning complex, global, multi\-pillar solutions
* Experienced positioning “bold plays”, value propositions and Deal Hypothesis to the c\-suite
* Understanding of market conditions, client’s needs and how Capgemini services best meet those needs; propose appropriate solutions to meet those needs and secure new clients


 Thorough understanding of project/program management techniques and methods
   

  

* Good understanding of all Knowledge Areas in project management
* Project Integration Management.
* Project Scope Management.
* Project Schedule Management.
* Project Cost Management.
* Project Quality Management.
* Project Resource Management.
* Project Communications Management.
* Project Risk Management
* Valid industry standard certification like PMP, PgMP will be preferred


**Additional Requirements**
* Excellent Knowledge of change management principles and experience in managing diverse stakeholder groups
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Strong relationship building and interpersonal skills, ability to connect and establish rapport at CXO levels in client organization
* Outstanding leadership and organizational skills
* Self\-guided and motivated individual capable of producing with minimal oversight
* Results oriented
* Excellent problem\-solving ability


 who can drive Oracle cloud transformation projects end to end.
   

  

 Should have strong knowledge is project planning and execution, hands on in preparing for leadership meetings and discussions like Steering committee, Change control board etc.
   

  

**What You'll Love About Working With Us**
* We value flexibility and support a healthy work\-life balance through remote and hybrid work options.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.

* A diverse and inclusive workplace that fosters innovation and collaboration.


 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of over 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2025 global revenues of €22\.5 billion.
   

  

 Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

f46e7a6c.title: Customer Experience Program Manager, Customer Recovery & Acceleration
f46e7a6c.description:
Job Title
   

  

 Customer Experience Program Manager, Customer Recovery \& Acceleration
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 The Customer Experience (CX) Program Manager is a strategic, customer\-facing leader within the Product Success Organization, responsible for stabilizing, recovering, and accelerating high\-risk or stalled customers.
   

  

 This role operates as a rapid\-response, outcome\-oriented engagement leader, partnering with customers who are blocked in adoption, at risk of churn, or struggling to realize value. The CX Program Manager orchestrates cross\-functional intervention plans to diagnose root causes, align stakeholders, and drive measurable turnaround outcomes.
   

  

 This role focuses on systemic adoption, value realization, and operational recovery. Engagements are structured as approximately 90\-day coordinated recovery cycles, primarily serving High Touch and Upper Growth customers. The position plays a critical role in protecting revenue, improving customer health, and building repeatable recovery playbooks across the customer base.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Customer Recovery \& Stabilization
   

  

* Lead targeted intervention engagements (approximately 90 days) for high\-risk, stalled, or underperforming customers
* Rapidly assess customer health across product usage, workflows, data quality, and organizational alignment
* Define and execute a structured Customer Recovery Plan with clear milestones and measurable success criteria


 Cross\-Functional Orchestration
   

  

* Mobilize and coordinate the right internal resources based on the customer’s specific recovery needs
* Ensure all teams are aligned to a single recovery strategy, timeline, and accountable owner
* Remove blockers, manage dependencies, and maintain execution momentum across workstreams


 Executive Alignment \& Communication
   

  

* Engage customer executives and senior stakeholders to align on recovery goals, reset accountability, and communicate progress
* Serve as the primary point of contact throughout the duration of the ICU engagement
* Deliver structured updates and executive\-level summaries on a regular cadence


 Playbook Development \& Scaling
   

  

* Build and refine CX playbooks, intervention frameworks, and engagement models
* Partner with Product Success and Insights teams to scale learnings and improve early risk detection
* Contribute to the broader Customer Success strategy through repeatable, data\-backed recovery frameworks


 Data\-Driven Insights
   

  

* Leverage usage data, health scores, and engagement signals to diagnose issues and track recovery progress
* Identify leading indicators of churn risk and recovery success to improve future intervention models
* Validate success outcomes against customer\-defined goals at engagement close


 Cross\-Functional Partnerships
   

  

* Customer Success: Handoff coordination, health monitoring, and post\-ICU continuity
* Functional Experts: Subject matter depth and product best\-practice guidance
* Product \& Engineering: Issue escalation, roadmap alignment, and product gap feedback
* Data \& Analytics / Insights: Usage analysis, health scoring, and performance insights
* Services \& Implementation: Re\-implementation support, configuration guidance, and workflow redesign


 Success Measures
   

  

* Reduction in churn risk and improvement in health scores across ICU\-managed accounts
* Measurable increase in product adoption and depth of usage
* Increased retention confidence and renewal rates
* Scalable recovery playbooks and repeatable intervention patterns


**Qualifications Required**
* 5\+ years of experience in Customer Success, Program Management, Consulting, or Services within SaaS
* Proven ability to turn around at\-risk customer situations and drive measurable outcomes
* Strong cross\-functional leadership and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working with enterprise or high\-touch customers in complex, multi\-stakeholder environments
* Excellent communication skills with demonstrated executive presence


**Preferred**
* Experience in renewal risk mitigation or churn prevention strategies
* Background in nonprofit, fundraising, or comparable mission\-driven verticals
* Familiarity with change management and adoption frameworks
* Experience leveraging data and product usage insights to drive decision\-making


 Core Competencies
   

  

* Outcome\-obsessed and relentlessly action\-oriented
* Strong problem\-solving and root cause analysis skills
* Ability to influence and lead without direct authority in complex environments
* Ability to simplify complexity into clear, executable plans


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 The ICU Program Manager serves as a critical safeguard for customer success and retention. By stepping in at pivotal moments of risk, this role ensures customers are not lost due to misalignment, stalled adoption, or unrealized value.
   

  

 Through structured recovery, cross\-functional coordination, and relentless focus on outcomes, the ICU Program Manager transforms vulnerable customers into stable, successful, and growing advocates—while strengthening the organization’s overall customer success strategy.
   

  

 This is not a support role. It is not a break/fix function. It is a high\-impact, outcomes\-driven leadership engagement that directly protects revenue, accelerates adoption, and builds the repeatable systems that make every future customer engagement stronger.
   

  

 Stay up to date on everything Blackbaud, follow us on Linkedin, X, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube
   

  

 Blackbaud powers social impact through purpose‑driven technology and responsible AI. Guided by our
 *Intelligence for Good®* 
 vision, we’re building a culture where innovation, trust, and human expertise come together to help organizations make a greater difference in the world.
   

  

 Blackbaud is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to maintaining an inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, physical or mental disability, age, or veteran status or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.

0fff4a0b.title: Engagement Manager (Transition)
0fff4a0b.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**YOUR ROLE**
* Lead end\-to\-end transition of services and staff, ensuring continuity of service levels.Own transition project delivery across scope, time, cost, quality, risks, and resources.
* Manage transition budgets, financials, forecasting, and month\-end reportingShape and deliver transition solutions with bid, solution, and architecture teams.
* Drive DGEM alignment, impact assessments, and Day 1 readiness with Transformation teams.
* Manage scope changes, client approvals, and identify revenue opportunities.
* Ensure effective knowledge transfer, training, and handover with formal sign\-off. Monitor SLAs, proactively resolve issues, and drive process improvements.
* Maintain strong client and stakeholder relationships with clear communication and reporting. Lead and manage transition teams, including coaching, performance feedback, and people management.


**YOUR PROFILE**
* Must be experienced in 3rd party transitions – this will not involve somebody who is only experienced in Captive set up or internal transitions alone.
* The last role in the current organization should be as a Transition Manager / Transition Role. Vivid in explaining their current transition methodology/ risks/ challenges faced.
* Experience in handling bid process/ be a transition counterpart during RFP’s \& bids/ transition solution experience in devising plans, costs etc


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
 You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.You will have the opportunity to learn on one of the industry's largest digital learning platforms, with access to 250,000\+ courses and numerous certifications.At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
   

  

 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

ee9504e3.title: Service Delivery Mgr - Cloud Services
ee9504e3.description:
**Req ID:** 377051
  
  

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  

We are currently seeking a Service Delivery Mgr \- Cloud Services to join our team in Delhi, Delhi (IN\-DL), India (IN).
  
  

NTT Data Services is Hiring!
  
  

Position's Overview
  
  

At NTT DATA Inc., we know that with the right people on board, anything is possible. The quality, integrity, and commitment of our employees are key factors in our company’s growth, market presence, and our ability to help our clients stay a step ahead of the competition. By hiring, the best people and helping them grow both professionally and personally, we ensure a bright future for NTT DATA and for the people who work here.
  
  

NTT DATA, Inc. currently seeks a Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager to join our team.
  
  

Client's business problem to solve?
  
  

You will take a key role in NTT Data Cloud Service Delivery Management practice and Program Management Office. The Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager works directly with cross\-functional teams across the company to support our clients in their migration/transition to the Cloud as well as with long\-term engagements (steady\-state) as Service Delivery Manager (SDM); managing the interests of NTT Data but also aligning these with our Clients’ Cloud needs.
  
  

**The ideal candidate has a broad skill set:**  

* Strong program management skills.
* Excellent communications both written and oral, be able to talk to and act on many organizational levels.
* Can Do attitude and entrepreneurial skills to meet milestones and deadlines.


Position's General Duties and Tasks
  
  

**In this role you will be responsible for:**  

* Maintaining positive relationships with customers.
* Identifying customer needs and overseeing service delivery within the business context.
* Managing finances and budgets and tracking contract deliverables.
* Determining ways to reduce costs without sacrificing customer satisfaction.
* Assessing customer feedback and using your creativity to establish, improve, and refine services.
* Building partnerships and liaising with team leaders to determine the company's services, delivery criteria, and solutions for issues that may arise.
* Providing status, updates, and dashboards to client stakeholders. Mitigate risk and accelerate resolution of outstanding issues.
* Responsible for developing and meeting project plans/schedules, defining project execution requirements, and managing communications.
* PL Control, Complex Negotiations, MS Project and Planning Techniques, Risk Logs, Deviations and Mitigations, scope control.
* Responsible for coordinating projects through various communications, data collection, and analysis. May act as Project Manager on multiple projects concurrently.
* Outstanding analytical, problem\-solving, negotiation, and organizational skills to effectively achieve project objectives whilst maintaining a strong sense of urgency. Functional experience in multiple business areas.
* Ability to relate business knowledge to complex problems.
* Additionally, the candidate must have a very strong ability to deal with ambiguity and drive for results. The ability to summarize and present information concisely and clearly for review and approval is a must.


**Requirements for this role include:**  

* A bachelor's degree in a business\-related field.
* Fluent in English.
* Experience in Project Management, preferably in a technical or infrastructure\-related role.
* Proficiency in project management methodologies and demonstrated ability to create and maintain project plans, budgets, and timelines.
* Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* Good understanding of infrastructure components such as networking, servers, storage, and virtualization.
* Familiarity with Cloud computing platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) and related services.
* Proven track record of identifying and resolving issues that arise during project execution.
* Ability to think critically and develop creative solutions to overcome challenges and obstacles.
* Experience mitigating project risks and ensuring project deliverables are completed on time and within budget.
* Excellent verbal and written communications skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Proven consensus\-building skills in a remote role.
* Leadership skills with the ability to motivate and lead cross\-functional teams.
* Experience collaborating with stakeholders at all levels of the organization to gather requirements and drive project success.
* Strong analytical and negotiation skills.
* Self\-starter, energetic, flexible, innovative, and willing to get things done.
* Experience as a complex project manager or a program manager.
* Willingness to stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices.
* Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and priorities in a fast\-paced environment.


**Preferences:**  

* 10\+ years relevant experience.
* Deep domain experience with 5\+ years of work experience in Services, cloud computing, or technical project delivery.
* Enterprise work experience dealing with highly complex situations is strongly preferred.
* Experience managing technical and executive\-level relationships (IT Director, VP, and C\-level).
* PMP, ITIL, Agile, Azure, AWS and GCP certifications preferred.


Required schedule availability for this position is Monday\-Friday (time zone to be determined).
  
  

About NTT DATA
  
  

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
  
  

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

2765bf73.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, IN Amazon Pay
2765bf73.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Pay's vision is to simplify lives and fulfill aspirations by making payments trusted, convenient and rewarding. The payments and financial services landscape is fast\-paced and dynamic with evolving customer needs. Amazon Pay offers payments, credit, investment and insurance products. We cater to diverse customer preferences across cash habituated, new\-to\-credit, digital\-native, and credit\-served customers through innovative products such as Pay Later, Cash Deposit At Doorstep, Pay With Alexa, Co\-Branded Credit Card, Gift Cards, UPI, Auto\-Insurance and Smart Stores. Customers use Amazon Pay to pay for virtually anything including shopping, bills, money transfers, scan \& pay, ticketing, cabs, food delivery and more. Thus, Amazon Pay not only improves customers’ payment experience while shopping on Amazon but also across their A to Z of payments.  

  

Want to be part of a dynamic start\-up environment within Amazon and be at the forefront of enabling "Amazon Pay" outside of Amazon?  

Our team is looking for passionate, experienced techie who can deliver high quality platform solutions to support our customers (buyers and merchants) enabling "Amazon Pay" to scale as the universal wallet for all of Amazon buyers.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Experience in technical program management working directly with software engineering teams
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience building and evaluating system\-level technical design
* Experience developing and executing/delivering product and technical roadmaps
* Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

17165843.title: Senior Program Manager, RVR, RBS MVR
17165843.description:
**Description**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced program manager to drive Retail Vendor Recruitment across WW teams through RBS MVR team. This role will own the end\-to\-end vendor experience from initial recruitment through successful launch, focusing on reducing friction, improving conversion rates, and enabling self\-service at scale through technology solutions. The candidate will be responsible for identifying and eliminating barriers across the vendor onboarding journey. This leader will partner with cross\-functional teams including Product, Tech, Account Management, and Operations to build scalable, technology\-enabled solutions that allow Amazon to onboard vendors globally at scale. The role requires a strategic thinker who can leverage automation, tools, and streamlined processes to transform vendor experience while enabling recruiters to focus on high\-value strategic activities.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own the end\-to\-end vendor onboarding program across RVR, driving improvements across different stages.
* Identify and eliminate friction points in the vendor onboarding journey, leveraging automation, AI\-powered tools, and self\-service solutions to improve conversion rates at scale
* Partner with Product and Tech teams to define requirements and drive adoption of technology solutions that reduce manual effort and enable scalable vendor onboarding globally
* Lead cross\-functional initiatives with Account Management, Operations, and Retail teams to streamline vendor experience and enable recruiters to focus on high\-value strategic activities
* Define and track program success metrics — including vendor launch rates, onboarding cycle time, self\-service adoption and revenue.
* Develop and execute WW vendor recruitment strategies to close brand gaps and expand selection across marketplaces.
* Influence without authority across global stakeholders, aligning diverse teams around a shared roadmap and driving accountability for outcomes
* Communicate program status, risks, and recommendations clearly to senior leadership, translating ambiguous challenges into structured plans and decisions


**About The Team**
 The vision of RBS MVR team is “To unlock the full potential of every vendor on Amazon through an intelligent scaling engine, that transforms how we recruit, launch, and grow our partners to deliver unparalleled selection and value to customers worldwide".
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of delivering cross functional projects experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field
* 3\+ years of operational and/or retail management experience
* 3\+ years of vendor management experience


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- BLR 14 SEZ \- F07

161d8b9f.title: Technical Program Manager IRC293020
161d8b9f.description:
**Description**
 The Technical Program Manager will be responsible for a variety of innovative projects, including but not limited to:
   

  

 Initiatives focused on improving large\-scale data ingestion and processing systems.
   

  

 Projects centered on extracting, structuring, and validating information from unstructured and semi\-structured digital content.
   

  

 Programs designed to ensure high levels of data accuracy and quality for consumer\-facing web applications, particularly in the travel and e\-commerce sectors.
   

  

 Supporting the creation and maintenance of large\-scale knowledge bases that provide intuitive and visually appealing information to users.
   

  

 Overseeing quality assurance and automation initiatives to drive efficiency and reliability.
   

  

**Requirements**
 GlobalLogic is seeking a highly motivated and experienced Technical program Manager to lead a dynamic portfolio of technical projects. This individual will be responsible for overseeing a diverse set of initiatives at the forefront of data processing and web technologies. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, exceptional leadership skills, and a proven track record of managing complex operations in a fast\-paced environment. A key requirement for this role is excellent communication skills, as you will be the central point of contact for multiple stakeholders, including clients, engineering teams, and senior management.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Proven Experience: A minimum of 10 years of experience in a technical operations or project management role, with at least 3 years in a managerial capacity.
   

  

 Mandatory Technical Skills: Strong, hands\-on proficiency with Regular Expressions, HTML, and JavaScript is required.
   

  

 Technical Expertise: Strong understanding of web crawling, data parsing, quality assurance, and project management methodologies. Familiarity with technologies like Python and SQL is a plus.
   

  

 Leadership Skills: Demonstrated ability to lead and motivate a diverse team of technical professionals.
   

  

 Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills are a strict mandate. The ability to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences is essential.
   

  

 Analytical and Problem\-Solving Skills: A data\-driven approach to problem\-solving and a demonstrated ability to make sound decisions under pressure.
   

  

 Stakeholder Management: Proven ability to build and maintain strong relationships with clients and internal stakeholders at all levels.
   

  

 Financial Acumen: Experience with budget management, forecasting, and financial reporting.
   

  

 Job responsibilities
   

  

 Core Responsibilities
   

  

 The Technical Program Manager will be expected to:
   

  

  

* Project Leadership \& Delivery: Oversee the successful execution of all assigned projects, ensuring timely delivery and high\-quality outcomes.
* Team Management: Lead and mentor a team of technical professionals, including software engineers, analysts, and project leads, fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous improvement.
* Technical Oversight: Provide technical guidance on projects involving large\-scale data extraction, data parsing, process automation, and quality assurance.
* Stakeholder Communication: Serve as the primary point of contact for all project\-related communications, ensuring clear and consistent updates to both internal and external stakeholders.
* Process Optimization: Continuously evaluate and improve operational processes to enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and improve the overall quality of project deliverables.
* Financial Management: Manage project budgets, forecasts, and resource allocation to ensure projects are delivered within budget and financial targets are met.
* Recruitment \& Onboarding: Participate in the hiring and onboarding of new team members, ensuring that the team has the necessary skills and expertise to meet project goals.


 What we offer
   

  

**Exciting Projects:** 
 We focus on industries like High\-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.
   

  

**Collaborative Environment:** 
 You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global centers or client facilities!
   

  

**Work\-Life Balance:** 
 GlobalLogic prioritizes work\-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.
   

  

**Professional Development:** 
 Our dedicated Learning \& Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training(GL Vantage, Toast Master),Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.
   

  

**Excellent Benefits:** 
 We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Group Term Life Insurance, Group Personal Accident Insurance , NPS(National Pension Scheme ), Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonuses.
   

  

**Fun Perks:** 
 We want you to love where you work, which is why we host sports events, cultural activities, offer food on subsidies rates, Corporate parties. Our vibrant offices also include dedicated GL Zones, rooftop decks and GL Club where you can drink coffee or tea with your colleagues over a game of table and offer discounts for popular stores and restaurants!
   

  

**About GlobalLogic**
 GlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partner to the world’s largest and most forward\-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’ve been at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of the most innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today we continue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefining industries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.

40fd0ba8.title: Staff Technical Program Manager
40fd0ba8.description:
Job Title: Staff Technical Program Manager \- ADs
   

  

 Department, Level: AdTech, X31
   

  

 Location: Onsite, Bangalore
   

  

 Work Type: Full time
   

  

 Job Summary: Job Summary: As a Staff Technical Program Manager, you will lead media programs, influencing the teams' roadmap priorities and technical direction. This role combines strong technical understanding, program leadership, and agile delivery excellence. You will own end\-to\-end execution of critical programs, influence roadmap direction, manage cross\-team dependencies and senior stakeholders, and mentor teams to raise execution maturity across the organization.
   

  

 About the Team:
   

  

 JioHotstar is building the advertising platform that will power commerce\-led advertising across some of India’s largest digital consumer businesses.
   

  

 This team sits at the intersection of AdTech, e\-commerce, data, and monetisation. The goal is to help retail platforms unlock high\-intent advertising inventory across the full shopping journey \- home pages, category pages, product detail pages, cart, order confirmation flows, and personalised placements \- while giving advertisers measurable outcomes.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Foster a culture of accountability, ownership, and collaboration
* Lead large, complex technical programs from planning through delivery independently
* Influence roadmap priorities by aligning stakeholders on objectives and outcomes
* Coordinate across engineering, product, and business teams to manage dependencies and ensure timely execution
* Facilitate cross\-pod collaboration and alignment to maintain delivery momentum
* Proactively plan for and mitigate risks, evaluating alternatives, quantifying trade\-offs, and structuring communication plans
* Apply Agile methodologies for iterative delivery, adaptive planning, and continuous improvement
* Coach teams on Agile best practices and foster high Scrum maturity
* Maintain sprint cadence and rigor through reviews, retrospectives, and OKR alignment
* Drive pod\-level accountability for JIRA hygiene, analytics reporting, and milestone tracking
* Ensure data\-driven decision\-making using clear metrics, dashboards, and visual progress reporting
* Regularly communicate program updates, decisions, and risks to leadership concisely and visually
* Continuously improve internal processes to enhance team efficiency and delivery velocity
* Act as a mentor for junior TPMs and team members to scale program management maturity


 Skills and attributes for success:
   

  

* Deep technical understanding of scalable systems, with the ability to dive into architecture reviews, ask second\-order questions, and push for scalable, resilient solutions
* Highly structured thinker with the ability to break down ambiguous goals into executable plans, identify blind spots, and push for clarity in both direction and detail
* Strong grasp of risk/reward tradeoffs, and comfort operating in fast\-moving, high\-stakes environments with shifting priorities and evolving context
* Exceptional communicator, skilled in managing stakeholder expectations and aligning diverse teams on shared timelines, goals, and impact
* Strong program management experience managing cross functional initiatives end to end and driving influence without authority
* Strong experience leading complex cross\-functional programs involving AI/ML and GenAI systems at scale.
* Should have deep technical understanding of AI platforms, execution rigor, stakeholder management, and the ability to drive AI initiatives from strategy to production.
* Experience with LLMs, AI infrastructure, model lifecycle management, and scalable delivery processes is highly preferred.
* Expertise in Agile frameworks (Scrum, SAFe) and tools like JIRA, Confluence


 Preferred education and experience:
   

  

* A Bachelor's/Master’s degree with a minimum of 8\-10 years of experience, including 3 to 4 years in a Program Management role within the consumer technology sector


**About JioStar**
 Perched at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media \& entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies. JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.

 Job Summary: As a Staff Technical Program Manager, you will lead media programs, influencing the teams' roadmap priorities and technical direction. This role combines strong technical understanding, program leadership, and agile delivery excellence. You will own end\-to\-end execution of critical programs, influence roadmap direction, manage cross\-team dependencies and senior stakeholders, and mentor teams to raise execution maturity across the organization.
   

  

****About the Team:****
 Content Commerce is a new and high\-impact initiative at the intersection of content, advertising and commerce. The vision is to make content shoppable. Users should be able to discover products naturally while watching shows, movies, sports, or short\-form content \- and move from inspiration to purchase with minimal friction. This team will build the platform that powers commerce experiences across JioHotstar content surfaces. That includes product discovery, contextual recommendations, shoppable placements, brand integrations, storefront experiences, measurement, and partner integrations with commerce platforms.
   

  

****Key responsibilities****
* Foster a culture of accountability, ownership, and collaboration
* Lead large, complex technical programs from planning through delivery independently
* Influence roadmap priorities by aligning stakeholders on objectives and outcomes
* Coordinate across engineering, product, and business teams to manage dependencies and ensure timely execution
* Facilitate cross\-pod collaboration and alignment to maintain delivery momentum
* Proactively plan for and mitigate risks, evaluating alternatives, quantifying trade\-offs, and structuring communication plans
* Apply Agile methodologies for iterative delivery, adaptive planning, and continuous improvement
* Coach teams on Agile best practices and foster high Scrum maturity
* Maintain sprint cadence and rigor through reviews, retrospectives, and OKR alignment
* Drive pod\-level accountability for JIRA hygiene, analytics reporting, and milestone tracking
* Ensure data\-driven decision\-making using clear metrics, dashboards, and visual progress reporting
* Regularly communicate program updates, decisions, and risks to leadership concisely and visually
* Continuously improve internal processes to enhance team efficiency and delivery velocity
* Act as a mentor for junior TPMs and team members to scale program management maturity


****Skills and attributes for success:****
* Deep technical understanding of scalable systems, with the ability to dive into architecture reviews, ask second\-order questions, and push for scalable, resilient solutions
* Highly structured thinker with the ability to break down ambiguous goals into executable plans, identify blind spots, and push for clarity in both direction and detail
* Strong grasp of risk/reward tradeoffs, and comfort operating in fast\-moving, high\-stakes environments with shifting priorities and evolving context
* Exceptional communicator, skilled in managing stakeholder expectations and aligning diverse teams on shared timelines, goals, and impact
* Strong program management experience managing cross functional initiatives end to end and driving influence without authority
* Strong experience leading complex cross\-functional programs involving AI/ML and GenAI systems at scale.
* Should have deep technical understanding of AI platforms, execution rigor, stakeholder management, and the ability to drive AI initiatives from strategy to production.
* Experience with LLMs, AI infrastructure, model lifecycle management, and scalable delivery processes is highly preferred.
* Expertise in Agile frameworks (Scrum, SAFe) and tools like JIRA, Confluence


****Preferred education and experience:****
* A Bachelor's/Master’s degree with a minimum of 8\-10 years of experience, including 3 to 4 years in a Program Management role within the consumer technology sector


**About JioStar**
 Perched at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media \& entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.
   

  

*JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.*

2d3cef04.title: Bid Manager
2d3cef04.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


**Your Role**
* End\-to\-End Bid Management: Lead complete bid lifecycle—from team setup, pursuit planning, solution development to final submission.
* Strategy \& Collaboration: Work with cross\-functional teams to define win themes, solution strategy, and value proposition.
* Proposal \& Commercials: Develop high\-quality, persuasive RFP/RFI responses including pricing and commercial models.
* Deal Conversion Ownership: Drive conversion metrics (RFP/RFI success rate, TCV wins) and support large deals/vendor empanelment.
* Stakeholder \& Knowledge Management: Manage client visits, senior stakeholder coordination, and build reusable bid assets/repositories.


**Your Profile**
* Bid Management Expertise: Proven experience handling mid\-to\-large complex bids in presales or equivalent roles.
* Commercial \& Financial Acumen: Strong understanding of pricing models, deal structuring, and financial simulations.
* Stakeholder Influence: Ability to engage senior leadership, clients, and lead cross\-functional teams without authority.
* Project \& Communication Skills: Strong organizational, presentation, and articulation capabilities under tight timelines.
* Digital \& AI Enablement: Experience leveraging AI/GenAI tools to improve bid efficiency and quality.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.
