b5b332b6.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, Device Content and Advertising
b5b332b6.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Fire TV is the world's most popular streaming media player, and Amazon's free, ad‑supported streaming business is scaling rapidly across creators, content providers, and international markets. Amazon Creator Studio is our first‑party, platform that transforms content acquisition from a manual, high‑touch process into global self‑service — targeting the creator economy projected to reach $144B by 2027\.  

  

We are looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager to own the program charter for the Partner Experience team in Chennai. Today the ecosystem spans across providers in multiple countries and proliferating across new regions. Your mission is to drive the transition to a scalable, API‑driven, self‑service platform — collapsing partner onboarding faster, building partner‑facing analytics, support, and content‑management tooling, and extending the platform internationally — all without disrupting live partner operations.  

  

This is a deeply technical, cross‑organizational role. You will operate at the intersection of partner tooling, content ingestion, onboarding automation, international expansion, and content distribution to first‑party Amazon services (Prime Video, Amazon Music). You will work daily with India‑based engineering and US‑based product, business development, and distribution‑partner teams.
  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Own the Partner Experience program roadmap across the four core building blocks: Partner Onboarding, Partner Escalation \& Support, Analytics \& Reporting, and Internal Tools \& Scaling.  

  

Drive onboarding velocity. Lead the program to make self‑serve creator onboarding seamless.  

  

Own international expansion readiness. Drive internationalization of Creator Studio Portal, backend systems, support, and analytics across UK, DE, CA, then JP and BR etc — defining per‑market requirements and a reusable launch playbook.  

  

Land the self‑service partner platform. Coordinate delivery of self‑serve content management, preview, pre‑publication moderation, accounting automation and partner‑facing analytics \& reporting (engagement, hours watched, views, revenue, invoices) on the Creator Studio Portal.  

  

Modernize partner support. Drive the transition from email‑based (MLP) support to a scalable ticket‑based system, hold the Issue Response SLA to a
  

Scale internal tooling. Drive enhancements (self‑serve metadata/logo updates, BD workflows, onboarding dashboards) and lead the convergence to eliminate duplicate internal tooling.  

  

Enable content distribution to 1P partners. Partner with engineering on distributing Creator Studio content — including emerging formats such as video podcasts — to Prime Video and Amazon Music, driving cross‑team integration contracts (e.g., mRSS/feed‑based ingestion) to resolution.  

  

Steward ownership and operational health of the \~15 services migrating to and run by the Chennai team, ensuring no regression to partner experience.  

  

Drive operational excellence, including infrastructure cost reduction (cost per MM requests) and service scalability (e.g., search/payload limits as channel volume grows).  

  

A day in the life  

You own how partners and creators experience Amazon's free streaming platform end to end. A typical day spans reviewing onboarding‑automation progress with engineering, unblocking an international launch requirement, triaging a partner escalation against SLA, aligning with Business Development on self‑serve tooling priorities, and driving a cross‑team integration decision with Prime Video or Amazon Music. You are the person who makes sure the partner platform scales as fast as the business — turning ambiguous, multi‑team problems into sequenced, measurable programs.  

  

About the team  

The Partner Experience team in Chennai owns the platform that lets content creators and providers onboard, manage content, get support, and understand their performance on Fire TV Free Streaming. We own the Creator Studio Website Portal and CoreBFF, Channel Onboarding Service, partner agreements, Internal tools for stakeholders, Automatic Partner Escalation, partner reporting, and the Indominus cost‑optimization services. We are a lean, high‑leverage team that values data over debate and experimentation over opinion, working in close partnership with US product, BD, and distribution teams.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

0e187332.title: Senior Product Manager, FinOps
0e187332.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Senior Product Manager – Finance Operations (Employee Expense \& Corporate Cards)  

  

Overview  

  

We are seeking a highly motivated and strategic Senior Product Manager to lead the Employee Expense and Corporate Cards product portfolio within Finance Operations. This role presents a unique opportunity to define and build the next generation of AI/ML\-powered, enterprise\-scale financial products that simplify expense management, enhance user experience, strengthen controllership, and deliver meaningful operational cost savings.  

  

As a Senior Product Manager, you will own the product strategy, roadmap, execution, adoption, and success metrics for solutions supporting employee expenses and corporate card programs. You will partner with leading global card providers, internal business teams, and technology organizations to build innovative products that operate at Amazon scale.  

  

The ideal candidate combines strong product management fundamentals with deep customer obsession, analytical rigor, and the ability to influence across a complex stakeholder ecosystem. You are comfortable navigating ambiguity, thinking strategically while maintaining operational excellence, and leveraging emerging AI technologies to solve challenging business problems.  

  

This role requires close collaboration with engineering, data science, analytics, design, finance, operations, and external partners to create scalable solutions that improve customer experiences while maintaining strong financial controls and compliance standards.  

  

Key Responsibilities  

  

Product Vision, Strategy \& Roadmap  

  

Define and drive the long\-term vision, strategy, and roadmap for Employee Expense and Corporate Cards products.  

Identify opportunities to simplify workflows, improve customer experience, enhance financial controls, and reduce operational costs through automation and AI\-driven solutions.  

Evaluate industry trends, customer feedback, business needs, and operational challenges to uncover high\-impact product opportunities.  

Develop product tenets, strategic goals, business cases, and investment proposals to support long\-term product direction.  

Create and maintain multi\-year product roadmaps aligned with organizational objectives and business priorities.  

  

Product Discovery \& Innovation  

  

Partner with customers, operations teams, finance stakeholders, and leadership teams to identify pain points and unmet needs.  

Leverage customer insights, operational data, and market intelligence to prioritize product investments.  

Drive innovation through AI/ML\-powered capabilities that improve efficiency, decision\-making, compliance monitoring, and user experience.  

Translate complex business problems into scalable product solutions with measurable outcomes.  

  

Product Planning \& Requirements Management  

  

Author compelling PRFAQs, business requirement documents (BRDs), product requirement documents (PRDs), strategy documents, and executive review materials.  

Define clear product requirements, user journeys, workflows, and success criteria.  

Lead cross\-functional planning sessions and facilitate alignment across business and technical stakeholders.  

Ensure product decisions are grounded in customer needs, business objectives, and technical feasibility.  

  

Cross\-Functional Leadership  

  

Collaborate closely with Software Development Engineers (SDEs), Data Scientists (DSs), Data Engineers (DEs), Business Intelligence Engineers (BIEs), Business Analysts (BAs), UX Designers (UXDs), Program Managers, Finance teams, and Operations leaders.  

Lead discussions and decision\-making forums with senior executives and stakeholders.  

Manage relationships with both first\-party (internal) and third\-party (external) partners, including global card issuers, payment providers, and technology vendors.  

Drive alignment among stakeholders with competing priorities while maintaining focus on customer and business outcomes.  

  

Product Development \& Execution  

  

Partner with engineering teams throughout product design, development, testing, and deployment.  

Evaluate trade\-offs between customer value, business impact, technical complexity, effort, and delivery timelines.  

Support technical teams during scoping, architecture discussions, design reviews, and implementation planning.  

Ensure products are delivered with high quality, scalability, reliability, and operational excellence.  

  

Metrics, Analytics \& Business Performance  

  

Define key input and output metrics to measure product success and business impact.  

Establish KPI frameworks, audit mechanisms, reporting standards, evaluation methodologies, and self\-inspection processes.  

Partner with BIEs, BAs, and DEs to build scalable reporting solutions and performance dashboards.  

Continuously monitor product performance and identify opportunities for optimization and improvement.  

Present business performance insights and recommendations to leadership teams.  

  

Product Launch \& Operational Readiness  

  

Own end\-to\-end launch planning and execution for new product features and capabilities.  

Lead User Acceptance Testing (UAT), Pilot Validation Testing (PVT), launch readiness reviews, and rollout planning activities.  

Coordinate cross\-functional launch activities across product, engineering, operations, finance, and external partners.  

Ensure smooth deployment, operational readiness, risk mitigation, and post\-launch monitoring.  

  

Adoption, Change Management \& Customer Engagement  

  

Develop and execute product socialization, communication, and adoption strategies.  

Drive customer onboarding, training programs, demonstrations, workshops, and enablement activities.  

Create product documentation, onboarding materials, and customer education resources.  

Measure adoption, customer satisfaction, and engagement to ensure successful implementation and sustained usage.  

  

Basic Qualifications  

  

Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Finance, Economics, or a related field.  

Experience in Product Management, Program Management, Strategy, or related functions.  

Experience owning product strategy, roadmap development, prioritization, and execution.  

Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to make data\-driven decisions.  

Experience working cross\-functionally with engineering, analytics, and business teams.  

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including executive\-level presentations and documentation.  

Demonstrated ability to influence stakeholders across multiple organizations and leadership levels.  

  

Preferred Qualifications  

  

MBA or advanced degree in a related discipline.  

Experience building Finance, FinTech, Payments, Expense Management, Corporate Card, Procurement, or Enterprise SaaS products.  

Experience developing AI/ML\-enabled products or leveraging advanced analytics to drive business outcomes.  

Familiarity with Amazon\-style product development mechanisms including PRFAQs, BRDs, narratives, roadmaps, and business reviews.  

Experience managing external vendors, payment providers, or strategic partners.  

Strong understanding of financial controls, compliance, audit requirements, and operational processes.  

Experience leading global product initiatives across multiple regions and stakeholder groups.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 7\+ years of product or program management, product marketing, business development or technology experience
* Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
* Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
* Experience with end to end product delivery
* Experience owning technology products
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
* Experience in Product Management, Program Management, Strategy, or related functions.
* Experience owning product strategy, roadmap development, prioritization, and execution.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to make data\-driven decisions.
* Experience working cross\-functionally with engineering, analytics, and business teams.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including executive\-level presentations and documentation.
* Demonstrated ability to influence stakeholders across multiple organizations and leadership levels.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in influencing senior leadership through data driven insights
* Experience working across functional teams and senior stakeholders
* Experience with QS.
* Experience building bar\-raising UIs based products.
* Experience building automation products.

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

ae07ea2c.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
ae07ea2c.description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Customer Program Manager\- Husky (India)Chennai
   

  

**Id:** 
 21045
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.
   

  

****Responsibilities:****
* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)
* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis
* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way
* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled
* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals
* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.
* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.
* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.
* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.
* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract
* Manage and lead weekly call with customer
* Escalate issues when required
* Builds relationship with customers
* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


****Qualifications:****
* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.
* Project Management experience
* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude
* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage
* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications
* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

f13a5d07.title: Senior Program Manager, Enterprise Technology & AI
f13a5d07.description:
GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100\* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.
   

  

 The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high\-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co\-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.
   

  

* Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025\. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.


**An Overview Of This Role**
 As a
 **Senior Program Manager** 
 within GitLab's Enterprise Technology organization, you will lead the planning, execution, and delivery of complex, cross\-functional technology programs that advance our enterprise IT strategy. You'll serve as a trusted advisor and program execution partner to IT leadership, translating strategic objectives into structured roadmaps and measurable outcomes. This is a highly visible role that requires both technical fluency and business acumen, with the ability to navigate ambiguity, align diverse stakeholders, and drive decisions across teams.
   

  

 You will operate at the intersection of IT, Finance, Legal, Product, and Business operations, bringing structure and clarity to programs that span multiple domains and functions. Whether standing up new capabilities, improving governance practices, or scaling operational processes, you will be the connective tissue that keeps programs moving, risks surfaced, and stakeholders informed.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for large\-scale or high\-complexity Enterprise Technology \& AI initiatives, including scope definition, roadmap development, resource planning, and delivery tracking
* Define and communicate clear success metrics for each program, reporting status and risk to Enterprise Technology \& AI leadership on a regular cadence, and escalating issues with recommended paths forward
* Partner with business and technology stakeholders to develop a deep understanding of underlying problems, desired outcomes, and solution trade\-offs
* Drive cross\-functional alignment by facilitating decision\-making, resolving dependencies, and maintaining momentum across distributed teams
* Recommend and implement improvements to program governance frameworks, intake processes, and ways of working across the CIO org
* Translate complex technical and business requirements into clear, actionable work plans accessible to both technical and non\-technical audiences
* Anticipate risks and interdependencies across the portfolio, proactively mitigating blockers before they impact delivery
* Model GitLab values and remote work best practices, contributing to a high\-trust, async\-first team culture


**What You'll Bring**
* 6\+ years of program management experience, with a strong track record delivering large, cross\-functional Enterprise Technology \& AI programs
* Demonstrated ability to simplify complex processes and build structured approaches to ambiguous problems
* Experience influencing without authority, earning trust with senior stakeholders, and driving alignment across functions, including Finance, Legal, Sales, and Product
* Comfortable operating at both a strategic level and in the details, switching between executive communication and hands\-on program execution as needed
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with experience presenting program status, risks, and recommendations to ETA leadership and Executive audiences
* Familiarity with Enterprise IT domains such as business systems, data, AI, security, infrastructure, or enterprise architecture (depth in one or more areas preferred)
* Proficiency with program and project management tools and methodologies (Agile, Scrum, SAFe, or similar); PMP, CSM, or equivalent certification is a plus
* Experience working in a remote, globally distributed environment with a bias toward async collaboration and clear documentation


**About The Team**
 The
 **CIO Enterprise Technology \& AI** 
 team is GitLab's central engine for improving the systems, data, and AI capabilities that support how we run the business. The team designs and operates enterprise applications, data platforms, corporate IT services, and AI\-enabled workflows that help our globally distributed GitLab team members work effectively and securely.
   

  

 You'll join a team that partners closely with
 **Finance, Sales, Marketing, People, Product, and Security** 
 to turn business strategy into scalable, reliable technology solutions. The work is broad, visible, and deeply cross\-functional, which makes strong program leadership essential. In this role, you'll help teams stay aligned, make progress across complex initiatives, and bring transparency to how strategic work gets delivered across the organization.
   

  

**How GitLab Supports Full\-Time Employees**
* Benefits to support your health, finances, and well\-being
* Flexible Paid Time Off
* Team Member Resource Groups
* Equity Compensation \& Employee Stock Purchase Plan
* Growth and Development Fund
* Parental Leave


 Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.
   

  

**Country Hiring Guidelines:** 
 GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location\-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.
   

  

**Privacy Policy:** 
 Please review our Recruitment Privacy Policy. Your privacy is important to us.
   

  

 GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also GitLab’s EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know during the recruiting process.

ec1b7e14.title: Solutions Engineer
ec1b7e14.description:
Why you'll love Cisco
  
We change the World, you will become passionate about your employer and the brand you represent. Everything is converging on the Internet, making networked connections more meaningful than ever before in our lives. Our employees' ground breaking ideas impact everything. Here, that means we take creative ideas from the drawing board to dynamic solutions that have real world impact. You'll be part a team that cares about its customers, enjoys having fun, and you'll take part in changing the lives of those in our local communities. Come prepared to be encouraged and inspired.
  
  

What You’ll Do
  
  

As a Solutions Engineer you will orchestrate involvement of all technical activities and resources, holding accountabilities for all opportunities within assigned account(s) and provide architectural perspective across the Cisco product portfolio, including software and services.
  
  

* Technical sales professional serving as a Technology/Product/Solution consultant.
* Technical orchestrator for an array of Cisco resources, primary responsibility for ensuring successful completion of each pitstop from a technical perspective in the lifecycle selling motion.
* Provides technical information and design/implementation guidance in concert with Cisco Architecture Seller team(s).
* Collaborates with the Account Manager on the customer account plan(s), jointly ensuring customer success.
* Work with internal teams to orchestrate right solutions against customer requirements with competitive positioning
* Educate customer on Cisco differentiation and establish technical leadership of Cisco as a brand.
* Field role that serves as a Technology expert across solutions preferably within a multi\-domain architecture approach.
* Build relationship with Engineering Teams, field teams, architecture team, Business Units (BUs), Partners and customers.


Who You’ll Work With
  
  

The India Strategic Enterprise Segment is a truly vibrant sales organization that covers the diverse set of accounts in the Enterprise Space. This position will be based out of Mumbai and will focus on a specific set of Enterprise accounts.
  
As part of the Enterprise System Engineering Team, you will be designing, architecting and empowering the strategy for the next generation of communications and application delivery for India’s leading businesses. You'll collaborate as part of a disruptive Sales engineering team. We offer exhilarating, inspiring, global, high impact, and uniquely broad opportunities for your growth.
  
  

**Minimum Qualifications:**  

* Bachelor of Engineering degree or equivalent
* Excellent written, oral communication, listening skills.
* Min 12\-15 years of presales experience in a technical capacity.
* Cisco products and technologies knowledge about one or more areas like Enterprise Networking, Security, Data centre or Collaboration.
* Understand the broad aspects of end to end architecture and have knowledge of one or more technology areas
* Should be confident in articulating in a customer conversation
* Technical knowledge in the Networking Solutions/SDN Architecture/Network Security /Datacentre Networking technologies.
* Strong whiteboarding/presentation skills.


**Desired Qualifications:**  

* Experience working with the Enterprise customers in similar roles.
* Technical certifications in any of the areas like Cloud/Security


Why Cisco?
  
  

At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
  
Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
  
We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

f3b73f6b.title: Lead Demo Engineer / Presales Solutions Consulting
f3b73f6b.description:
Here at Appian, our values of **Intensity** and **Excellence** define who we are. We set high standards and live up to them, ensuring that everything we do is done with care and quality. We approach every challenge with ambition and commitment, holding ourselves and each other accountable to achieve the best results. When you join Appian, you'll be part of a passionate team dedicated to accomplishing hard things, together.

**Lead Demo Engineer**
======================

  



Here at Appian, our core values of Excellence and Intensity define who we are. In short, this means we constantly seek to understand the best for our customers, we go beyond completion in our work, we strive for excellence with intensity, and we embrace candid communication. These values guide our actions and shape our culture every day. When you join Appian, you'll be part of a passionate team that's dedicated to accomplishing hard things.

  



SC 2\.0 is the engine powering our vision. Appian's Sales Solutions Consulting team is in the midst of an exciting transformation \- redefining what it means to be a trusted advisor in today's fast\-paced, mission\-driven environment. Our SCs don't just demo features \- they tell stories, co\-create with customers, and help shape strategy with technical credibility and business insight. Read More About SC 2\.0 Here



You can listen to our Global SSC leader, Gregg Aldana discuss SC 2\.0 here.



The SPEAR Team (Strategic Presales Execution and Readiness) is the operational engine behind Appian's global Presales organization \- the team that builds the tools, assets, governance, and infrastructure that let Solutions Consultants do their best work. As Lead Demo Engineer on SPEAR, you are not on the sidelines of SC 2\.0 \- you are leading one of the teams that makes it possible at scale.

  


**The Role**



Are you a seasoned Appian developer with a passion for crafting impactful technology solutions and mentoring others? As the Lead Demo Engineer for Appian's SPEAR Team in Chennai, you'll take on a dual role: leading the day\-to\-day operations of the Chennai Demo Engineers and serving as a senior individual contributor yourself. You'll play a critical part in scaling Appian's global Presales organization by managing team workflows, providing technical guidance, and personally delivering the highest\-quality demo assets that fuel hundreds of sales engagements each year.

  



In this role, you'll act as both a manager and a technical lead. You'll oversee the daily activities of the team, monitor progress, ensure work is completed on time and to a high standard, and serve as a key resource for technical guidance when Demo Engineers run into challenges. You'll also continue to do the work yourself \- de\-branding prospect demos, modernizing aging assets with the latest Appian capabilities, contributing to DemoHub (Appian's centralized demo catalog and governance system), and producing polished clickable demos, walkthrough videos, and scripts. By fostering a collaborative and supportive environment, you'll empower your team to excel while ensuring alignment with global SPEAR priorities and deadlines.

  



You will report directly to the US\-based Area Vice President of Solutions Consulting, who leads the SPEAR Team. This reporting structure gives you a direct line into the strategy and priorities of Appian's global Presales organization, and positions you as the on\-site Chennai leader and primary liaison between the Chennai team and stakeholders worldwide.

  



This role combines leadership, deep technical expertise, and strategic oversight, offering you the chance to make a significant impact both as a contributor and as a mentor. If you thrive in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment and are ready to elevate the capabilities of your team while showcasing the power of Appian's platform, this role is for you.

  


**What you'll be doing...**


* Team Leadership: Manage and mentor a team of Demo Engineers in Chennai, ensuring smooth day\-to\-day operations, clear priorities, and alignment with global Presales strategy.
* Technical Oversight: Provide senior technical guidance on capturing, refining, and expanding product demos, ensuring all outputs are reusable, impactful, and aligned with current Appian capabilities and industry trends.
* Operational Excellence: Own the cataloging and ingestion of product demos into DemoHub, maintaining high standards of quality, consistency, and discoverability across hundreds of assets per year.
* Senior Technical Contribution: Personally de\-brand prospect\-specific demos, enhance them with advanced new Appian features, and prepare them for broader organizational use \- setting the technical bar for the team's work.
* DemoHub Application Development: Lead and contribute to ongoing development and maintenance of the DemoHub Appian application itself \- the platform that stores, governs, and surfaces demo content to the global SC team. This includes building new features, fixing bugs, and improving usability.
* Clickable Demo Production: Oversee and personally contribute to the recording, editing, and continuous updating of interactive clickable demos in a commercial third\-party demo platform, ensuring our self\-service and accelerated demo experiences stay accurate, on\-brand, and current.
* Demo Artifact Creation: Produce and oversee production of supporting artifacts including walkthrough videos, demo scripts, talk tracks, and quick\-reference guides that help SCs adopt and adapt assets quickly.
* Cross\-functional Collaboration: Act as the primary liaison between the Chennai team and global stakeholders, including the US\-based SPEAR Team and Presales leadership, ensuring seamless communication, project execution, and knowledge transfer across time zones.
* Continuous Improvement: Develop and implement processes that improve the efficiency, quality, and throughput of demo ingestion, refinement, and maintenance workflows.
* Mentorship: Provide technical mentorship to Demo Engineers, fostering skill development, career growth, and a strong engineering culture within the team.
* Additional SPEAR Initiatives: Lead or contribute to other Presales enablement and readiness initiatives as the SPEAR Team's portfolio evolves.

  




**Who you are...**


* Strong, senior\-level experience with Appian or a similar low\-code application development platform, including design, development, and debugging of complex applications.
* Proven ability to manage and mentor technical teams, with demonstrated leadership and people management skills.
* Excellent technical and programming skills, with concrete examples of delivering polished, impactful work that others have used as a benchmark.
* Highly organized, with a track record of managing multiple projects and priorities in a high\-volume, dynamic environment.
* Skilled in cross\-functional collaboration, with solid verbal, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication abilities \- including the ability to communicate clearly across global teams and time zones.
* Familiarity with interactive demo platforms (Storylane, Reprise, Navattic, Walnut, or similar) is a strong plus.
* Familiarity with video recording and editing tools for producing walkthrough content is a plus.
* Self\-motivated, driven individual with a proactive approach to problem\-solving and a strong sense of urgency.
* B.S. or M.S. in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields, or equivalent work experience.

  





**Tools and Resources**


* Training and Development: During onboarding, we focus on equipping new hires with the skills and knowledge for success through department\-specific training. Continuous learning is a central focus at Appian, with dedicated mentorship and the First\-Friend program being widely utilized resources for new hires.
* Growth Opportunities: Appian provides a diverse array of growth and development opportunities, including our leadership program tailored for new and aspiring managers, a comprehensive library of specialized department training through Appian University, skills based training, and tuition reimbursement for those aiming to advance their education. This commitment ensures that employees have access to a holistic range of development opportunities.
* Community: We'll immerse you into our community rooted in respect starting on day one. Appian fosters inclusivity through our 8 employee\-led affinity groups. These groups help employees build stronger internal and external networks by planning social, educational, and outreach activities to connect with Appianites and larger initiatives throughout the company.


**Benefits**



Appian offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your health, wellbeing, and financial future. Benefits may include health coverage, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) with free mental health support, life and disability insurance, an Employee Stock Purchase Program (ESPP), a retirement/pension plan, wellness dollars, tuition reimbursement, family\-forming benefits and more. Benefits vary by country—please ask your Talent Acquisition contact for details specific to the location you are applying to.


**About Appian**



Appian provides AI automation for mission\-critical work. We automate complex processes in large enterprises and governments. Our platform is known for its unique reliability and scale. We've been automating processes for more than 25 years and understand enterprise operations like no one else. For more information, visit appian.com. \[Nasdaq: APPN]



Follow Appian: LinkedIn, Youtube, Instagram, Facebook


*Appian is an equal opportunity employer that strives to attract and retain the best talent. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.*


*Appian provides reasonable accommodations to applicants in accordance with all applicable laws. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the employment process, please contact us by email at* *ReasonableAccommodations@appian.com**. Please note that only inquiries concerning a request for reasonable accommodation will be responded to from this email address.*


*Appian's Applicant \& Candidate Privacy Notice*

9fe2ff29.title: Presales Consultant
9fe2ff29.description:
**About US** 




 Particleblack specializes in building custom web and mobile applications designed to accelerate business growth and digital transformation. The company focuses on high\-performance solutions that help organizations modernize processes and deliver better digital experiences. By combining technical expertise with a business\-first approach, Particleblack partners closely with clients to understand their goals and create tailored software solutions. Team members work in a dynamic environment that values innovation, problem\-solving, and collaboration across disciplines.
 



  





**Role Description** 
 The Presales Consultant role at Particleblack is a full\-time hybrid position based in Chennai, with flexibility for partial work from home. The Presales Consultant will collaborate with sales, delivery, and technical teams to understand client requirements, analyze business challenges, and translate them into appropriate web and mobile solution proposals. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include preparing and delivering product demos, responding to RFPs and RFIs, creating solution presentations, and supporting sales meetings with clear technical and business justifications. The role involves working closely with prospective clients to gather requirements, conduct needs analysis, create high\-level solution designs, and estimate project scope and effort. The Presales Consultant will also maintain up\-to\-date knowledge of Particleblack’s offerings, industry trends, and competitor solutions to help position the company effectively.
 



**Qualifications** 



* Strong Analytical Skills, with the ability to assess client needs, interpret data, and define solution approaches.
* Consulting expertise, including requirements gathering, stakeholder communication, and solution recommendation.
* Sales and Presales experience, with a proven ability to support deal closures through demos, presentations, and proposal creation.
* Project Management capabilities to coordinate presales activities, manage timelines, and collaborate with cross\-functional teams.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including presentation and documentation abilities.
* Experience or familiarity with web and mobile application development concepts, architectures, and common technologies.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field; equivalent practical experience may be considered.
* Ability to work effectively in a hybrid environment, manage multiple opportunities simultaneously, and adapt to a fast\-paced setting.

 Working with the Company's Sales Team, the Presales Consultant is responsible for providing presales technical support to the Sales team and presenting tailored demonstrations or qualification discussions to customers and/or prospects. The Presales Consultant also assists the Sales Team with qualifying opportunities \- in or out and helping expand existing opportunities through solid questioning. The Presales Consultant will be responsible on conducting Technical Proof of Concept, Demonstration \& Presentation on the supported products \& solution.

* Able to interact effectively with all levels of management.


 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on\-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well\-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well\-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity \& Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer\-to\-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co\-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer\-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. 9b55fb86.title: Pre-Sales Expert
9b55fb86.description:
**Company Description** 




 SwiffyLabs is a leading full\-stack financial technology platform that empowers global financial institutions with scalable, secure, and intelligent lending and payment solutions. The company offers a comprehensive suite of products, including Loan Origination System (LOS) and Loan Management System (LMS), to support end\-to\-end lending operations. In addition, SwiffyLabs has built advanced tools such as a Risk Management System (RMS), Collateral Management System (CMS), and Business Rules Engine (BRE) that enable rapid, flexible deployment of lending products. By combining technology innovation with deep financial domain expertise, SwiffyLabs helps institutions improve efficiency, manage risk, and deliver better customer experiences.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 The Pre\-Sales Expert is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Bengaluru. This role involves engaging with prospective clients to understand their lending and payments needs, demonstrating SwiffyLabs’ platform capabilities, and mapping product features to business requirements. The Pre\-Sales Expert will prepare and deliver product demos, presentations, and proof\-of\-concept configurations, as well as respond to RFPs and technical queries in collaboration with product and engineering teams. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include gathering and analyzing client requirements, creating solution proposals, supporting pilot implementations, and providing feedback to internal teams to refine offerings. The role also requires close coordination with sales, product, and customer success to ensure a smooth transition from pre\-sales to post\-sales activities.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Strategic Solutioning: Partner with sales teams to understand prospect requirements and shape winning, tailored solutions across lending and financial services.
* Technical Evangelism \& Demos: Lead deep\-dive product demonstrations, client presentations, and solution workshops. Build and manage sophisticated demo environments or POCs that simulate real\-world data models and lending rules.
* RFP/RFI Ownership: Own the end\-to\-end response process for RFPs and RFIs, including solution architecture design, technical documentation, and estimations.
* Workflow Architecture: Translate client use cases into specific product configurations, journey flows, and API\-led integrations (e.g., KYC, credit bureaus, and core banking systems).
* Strategic Product Influence: Act as the "Voice of the Prospect," capturing feature gaps and technical blockers to influence the product roadmap. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to align delivery timelines.
* Domain Expertise: Act as a subject matter expert in digital lending, regulatory guidelines (such as RBI), and industry best practices.
* Knowledge Management: Maintain a repository of reusable solution assets, high\-quality architecture diagrams, integration guides, and internal playbooks.



  





  





  





**Qualifications** 



* Experience: 4\+ years of experience in technical pre\-sales, solution consulting, or fintech SaaS roles.
* Domain Expertise: Strong understanding of the digital lending lifecycle, including LOS, LMS, KYC, underwriting, and collections.
* Technical Proficiency: Ability to translate business problems into scalable product solutions with an understanding of APIs, JSON, and system architecture concepts.
* Communication \& Storytelling: Excellent presentation and storytelling skills with the ability to manage stakeholders across complex enterprise sales cycles.
* Mindset: A "builder" mindset—comfortable navigating staging environments and cross\-functional environments alongside Engineering and Compliance.



  





**Why Join SwiffyLabs?** 



* Global Impact: Work on cloud\-native infrastructure that empowers financial institutions to launch at speed and scale globally.
* Founding Culture: Build alongside industry veterans in an ecosystem that represents the future of fintech.
* Strategic Growth: Join a high\-growth environment where you directly influence the product roadmap and company trajectory.
