6fcaee9d.title: Staff Solutions Engineer
6fcaee9d.description:
**Are you ready to unlock intelligence?**
 If you don’t think you meet all of the criteria below but are still interested in the job, please apply. Nobody checks every box \- we’re looking for candidates that are particularly strong in a few areas, and have some interest and capabilities in others.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Staff Solutions Engineer \- Specialist at Kong Inc., you will be a pivotal technical leader, leveraging your deep expertise in combining DevOps with AiOPS and FinOps, management, sales skills and system integration to guide customers and partners through complex architectural challenges. You will act as a trusted advisor, demonstrating the value of Kong's platform through tailored solutions and technical excellence.
   

  

**What You'll Doing**
* Lead technical discussions and presentations with enterprise clients, understanding their architectural requirements and business needs.
* Experience in AI and closely following AI trends and applications, preference is for those who already embarked or started on their AI journey with orchestration tools, Agentic AI and agents building.
* Solid understanding of Kafka .
* Solid understanding of APIs and software development
* Develop and implement proof\-of\-concept projects and custom demonstrations that showcase Kong's capabilities in System Integration, Continuous Integrations, and Continuous Delivery environments.
* Provide expert guidance on SRE Observability strategies, helping customers monitor and optimize their API infrastructure.
* Utilize your proficiency in Linux, Docker, and Git to troubleshoot complex technical issues and provide advanced support.
* Drive the adoption of Automation Technology within customer environments, enabling efficient API lifecycle management.
* Collaborate with sales, product, and engineering teams to provide market feedback and contribute to product development.
* Mentor junior solutions engineers and contribute to the team's technical knowledge base.
* Manage multiple projects concurrently, demonstrating strong Project Management skills and delivering results within deadlines.
* Effectively communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences through exceptional Technical Communication.


**What You'll Bring**
* Solid AIOps experience and/or Solid Kafka experience.
* 10\+ years of experience in a solutions engineering, technical architect, or similar customer\-facing technical role.
* Demonstrated expertise in API Design and API Management principles and best practices.
* Strong understanding of Authentication mechanisms (OAuth, OIDC, JWT, etc.) and Cybersecurity best practices.
* Proficiency with Linux operating systems and containerization technologies like Docker.
* Extensive experience with Git for version control and collaborative software development.
* Deep knowledge of Continuous Integrations and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipelines and tools.
* Proven experience with SRE Observability tools and methodologies.
* Strong understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and its various phases.
* Experience with Automation Technology and scripting for infrastructure and application deployment.
* Exceptional Technical Communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and prioritize tasks effectively.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.


**About Kong**
 Kong Inc., a leading developer of API and AI connectivity technologies, is building the infrastructure that powers the agentic era. Trusted by the Fortune 500 and startups alike, Kong's unified API and AI platform, Kong Konnect, enables organizations to secure, manage, accelerate, govern, and monetize the flow of intelligence across APIs and AI models. For more information, visit www.konghq.com.

00275c6a.title: ServiceNow Automation Architect
00275c6a.description:
**ServiceNow Automation Architect**

**Job Title:** ServiceNow Automation Architect

**Experience:** 8–12\+ Years

**Employment Type:** Contract (C2C)

**Work Mode:** Hybrid

**Locations:** Bangalore, Chennai, Noida, Pune, Mumbai, Kolkata

**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced **ServiceNow Automation Architect** to lead enterprise automation initiatives by designing and implementing scalable workflow automation solutions using **ServiceNow Flow Designer, IntegrationHub, and intelligent automation capabilities**. The ideal candidate will have strong architectural expertise, deep ServiceNow platform knowledge, and experience establishing automation standards and governance across enterprise environments.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define enterprise automation strategy, architecture, and governance standards.
* Design and implement scalable workflow automation solutions using ServiceNow Flow Designer and IntegrationHub.
* Lead complex workflow automation and enterprise integration initiatives.
* Develop reusable automation frameworks, templates, and best practices.
* Drive AI/ML\-enabled automation and intelligent workflow solutions within the ServiceNow platform.
* Collaborate with business and technical stakeholders to streamline and optimize business processes.
* Establish governance and quality standards for automation implementations.
* Ensure solutions are secure, scalable, maintainable, and aligned with enterprise architecture.

**Required Skills**

* 8–12\+ years of hands\-on experience with the ServiceNow platform.
* Expert\-level experience with Flow Designer and IntegrationHub.
* Strong knowledge of REST/SOAP APIs, integrations, and workflow automation.
* Experience designing enterprise\-scale ServiceNow automation solutions.
* Understanding of AI/ML\-enabled automation capabilities.
* Strong solution architecture, governance, and design expertise.
* Excellent analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* ServiceNow certifications are highly preferred.
* Experience with ServiceNow App Engine.
* Exposure to ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, or CSM modules.
* Experience leading enterprise digital transformation initiatives.

**Locations:** Bangalore \| Chennai \| Noida \| Pune \| Mumbai \| Kolkata (Hybrid)

If you are passionate about enterprise automation and ServiceNow architecture, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now with your updated resume.

Pay: ₹90,000\.00 \- ₹150,000\.00 per month

Experience:

* ServiceNow platform: 8 years (Required)

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Mumbai, Maharashtra (Mumbai)

* Expertise in CI/CD integration (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI) and Database knowledge (SQL) and backend testing capabilities
* Experience with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms
* ISRQB certification will be added advantage
 **More about us :**

  

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low\-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy\-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy\-to\-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

  

Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.


Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.


Recruitment Fraud Warning


ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.


View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home


For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\-to\-apply/fraud\-warning

19a63353.title: Solution Architect Specialist
19a63353.description:
Req ID: 60324
Job Function: Architecture Solution and Design
Posting Start Date: 08/07/2026
Posting End Date: 12/07/2026
Division: Digital
Job Location: IND\-Bengaluru\-RMZ Ecoworld
Advertised Salary: Competitive
**Recruiter: Seema Shivakumar**

**Hiring Manager: Dilip N**

**Career Grade: D**

  

**About the role**
------------------

The Solution Architect Sepcialist supports the execution of the Solutions strategy and roadmap that supports BT’s commercial strategy through cross functional project and technical delivery and the participation of a team that pursues innovation as well as engineering \& architecture excellence.
  

The role is to work with business and operational stakeholders, software engineers, architects to provide compelling E2E Solution, helping build and integrate with backend systems and APIs; and contributing/aligning to business needs/delivery timeline.
  

The role is key to providing outstanding service to our customers by maintaining and improving the products we supply them with.


**What you’ll be doing**
------------------------

* Applies specialist technical expertise to develop and advise approach on a range of complex, high impact and high risk customer solutions and define the architectural strategy for the Service domain
* Accountable for defining and maintaining the architectural roadmap for the respective domain
* Creates, owns and implements the technical solutions and inputs into the roadmaps for the respective domain
* Liaises with CFU, Operational, Architectural and customer stakeholders, ensuring business needs are met through assurance of the design
* To work with programme managers and colleagues across BT to ensure programmes /projects are successful
* Supports inlife issues and supports knowledge management across the team.
* Manages and works to deliver in Agile environment
* Explore, propose and consider AI driven solutions


**Essential Skills / Experience**
---------------------------------

* TMF implementation experience and knowledge of other equivalent Frameworks
* Solution Architecture \- You can drive the implementation of the E2E solution framework in collaboration with senior business and operations stakeholder
* Product and service knowledge \- You demonstrate subject matter expertise in complex telecom infrastructure, products and services. Specially in the fixed networks area and Ethernet products. Understanding of the Network design. You develop scalable and re\-usable solutions to address business requirements
* Be agile \- You lead collaborative ways of working and continuous improvement. You encourage their adoption where necessary to deliver the best results for the customer
* Technology excellence \- You maintain a deep expertise in emerging technology trends. You use specialised skills and knowledge to guide the business and develop content to support the sharing of complex technical information. Experience of solutions using Salesforce, Vlocity, Ciena BluePlanet
* Improvement focus \- You collaborate to identify how work activities across teams are related and highlight inefficiencies. You help to remove barriers and find the resources or support needed to improve processes
* Exposure to AI Tools and Implementation experience in any domain will be added advantage/preferred.


BT Group is the UK’s leading communications group and the holding company behind some of the country’s most recognised brands – including BT, EE, Openreach and Plusnet. Our purpose is as simple as it is ambitious: we connect for good. Our customers include consumers, small, medium and large businesses, public sector organisations and other communications providers.


BT Group’s role is about setting direction, unlocking value and creating the conditions for our brands and businesses to thrive.


Having come through the most capital\-intensive phase of our fibre investment, our focus now is on what comes next – simplifying how we operate, using technology and AI to work smarter, and organising ourselves to serve customers better and grow sustainably. Group teams shape strategy, policy, brand, capital allocation and transformation, helping the whole organisation perform at its best.


We have a singular culture that unites all our people: we are customer\-first challengers, who are committed, clear and connected. These behaviours unite us as one team to deliver for our colleagues, our customers, our stakeholders and the country. Joining BT Group means working at the heart of a business that matters to the UK, with the opportunity to shape decisions, influence outcomes and help set the future course of one of the country’s most important companies.

0aa72d8d.title: Solutions Architect
0aa72d8d.description:
We are looking for an experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 with a strong software development background and deep expertise in
 **AWS Cognito** 
 to design and implement secure, scalable, and cloud\-native Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions.
 



 The ideal candidate should have hands\-on experience in designing
 **Customer Identity and Access Management (CIAM)** 
 solutions, integrating identity providers, and building authentication and authorization services using
 **AWS Cognito** 
 . Experience with
 **Okta** 
 or
 **Ping Identity** 
 is highly desirable.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and architect enterprise\-grade identity and access management solutions using
 **AWS Cognito** 
 .
* Lead the design and implementation of CIAM solutions for customer\-facing applications.
* Develop secure authentication and authorization frameworks using OAuth 2\.0, OpenID Connect (OIDC), and SAML 2\.0\.
* Design user authentication flows, including MFA, password less authentication, social login, and federation.
* Integrate AWS Cognito with enterprise applications, APIs, and third\-party identity providers.
* Work closely with application development teams to implement secure identity services.
* Develop reusable authentication libraries, APIs, and SDK integrations.
* Architect secure API authentication using JWT, OAuth, and Cognito User Pools.
* Design Identity Federation with enterprise identity providers such as Okta, Ping Identity, or Microsoft Entra ID.
* Ensure compliance with security best practices, Zero Trust principles, and regulatory requirements.
* Participate in architecture reviews, code reviews, and technical design discussions.
* Support CI/CD implementation and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for identity services.
* Provide technical leadership and mentor development teams on identity architecture.



  





**Required Technical Skills** 




**AWS Identity Services (Mandatory)** 



* **AWS Cognito (Essential)**
* User Pools
* Identity Pools
* Hosted UI
* Lambda Triggers
* Custom Authentication Flows
* Federation
* JWT Tokens
* Groups and Roles
* Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA)



**Identity \& Access Management** 



* IAM concepts
* Customer Identity and Access Management (CIAM)
* Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC)
* Attribute\-Based Access Control (ABAC)
* Identity Federation
* Single Sign\-On (SSO)



**Authentication Protocols** 



* OAuth 2\.0
* OpenID Connect (OIDC)
* SAML 2\.0
* JWT
* PKCE



**Cloud Platforms** 



* AWS
* API Gateway
* Lambda
* CloudFront
* Route 53
* CloudFormation / Terraform



**Development Skills** 



* Java or Node.js (preferred)
* Python (good to have)
* RESTful APIs
* Microservices
* Spring Boot (if Java)
* AWS SDKs



**DevOps** 



* Git
* CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, AWS Code Pipeline)
* Docker
* Kubernetes/EKS (preferred)
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform or CloudFormation)



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Experience with
 **Okta** 
 ,
 **Ping Identity** 
 , or Microsoft Entra ID.
* Experience designing multi\-tenant identity solutions.
* Hands\-on experience with Zero Trust security architecture.
* Knowledge of AWS Well\-Architected Framework.
* Experience integrating identity services with mobile and web applications.
* Exposure to serverless application architectures.
* Understanding security standards such as PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA, or SOC 2\.



  





**Experience** 



* 10\+ years of software development and solution architecture experience.
* Minimum 5 years of hands\-on experience with
 **AWS Cognito** 
 .
* Proven experience designing enterprise IAM/CIAM solutions.
* Experience delivering cloud\-native applications on AWS.
* Strong background in secure application development and API security.

9fcd2bcf.title: Solution Architect (FROM SAAS/ ECOMMERCE/ FINTECH)
9fcd2bcf.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling tech consultancy operating at the intersection of SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce, we help global brands architect, deploy, and scale intelligent AI\-driven platforms that power personalization, automation, and real\-time decision\-making. Our clients span Fortune 500s to high\-growth startups—we translate complex business needs into scalable, secure, and intelligent AI architectures leveraging cloud\-native stacks, GenAI frameworks, and enterprise\-grade data ecosystems.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end AI solution blueprints for SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce clients—covering data pipelines, model orchestration, API gateways, and observability layers.
* Lead AI architecture reviews, aligning technical design with compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS), scalability targets, and cost\-optimization goals.
* Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate) into client platforms for RAG, agent\-based workflows, and real\-time recommendation engines.
* Partner with data science and engineering teams to productionize ML models using MLOps tooling (MLflow, SageMaker, DVC) and Kubernetes\-based inference services.
* Define cloud architecture on AWS/Azure/GCP—leveraging serverless, event\-driven, and containerized patterns to support low\-latency AI services.
* Advise on AI governance, model drift detection, bias mitigation, and ethical AI frameworks tailored to regulated verticals (Fintech, Healthcare, E\-commerce).


**Skills \& Qualifications**
**Must\-Have**
* AWS
* Azure
* GCP
* Python
* LangChain
* TensorFlow
* PyTorch
* MLflow
* Kubernetes
* Apache Airflow
* OpenAI API
* LangGraph
* FAISS
* Pinecone
* GenAI
* LLM
* RAG
* LLMOps
* MLOps
* PCI\-DSS
* GDPR


**Preferred**
* Experience with fintech compliance frameworks (e.g., PSD2, KYC/AML architecture)
* Published AI solutions or case studies in e\-commerce personalization or SaaS automation
* Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty, Azure AI Engineer Associate


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Work with global clients building next\-gen AI products—no internal legacy systems to refactor
* Hybrid flexibility \+ travel opportunities to client sites across APAC, MEA, and North America
* Access to cutting\-edge AI tools, training budgets, and speaking opportunities at major tech conferences


 Skills: architecture,fintech,data,api,commerce,automation,saas,aws,e\-commerce,azure

91f47a93.title: Solution Architect Product & Technology
91f47a93.description:
**Department:** 
 Product Development
   

  

**Location:** 
 India \- Resident (0008\)
   

  

**Description**
**This role will be working out of our office 5 days a week.**
 Vena Solutions is seeking a Solution Architect, Product \& Technology to drive the evolution of the features and capabilities of Vena’s SaaS cloud platform. Armed with a core set of architecture skills on cloud based apps, you will own the architecture of existing and emerging features and capabilities.With a keen eye on non\-functional requirements, you will translate business requirements into a resilient solution within the Vena platform. This role is a match for you if you are looking to apply your architecture strengths in applications \& technology as a key contributor to the delivery of an incredible experience for our customers. At Vena we continuously evolve through innovation with a keen eye on a customer experience that is second to none. Ensuring that we maintain our customers' trust as we enhance our products will be a core goal to the work you perform. Delivering in close collaboration with our Engineering teams you will help ensure the quality product our customers have grown to expect. Our environment and culture both foster and encourage individuals who are self\-directed and self\-motivated, empowering employees to take ownership of our collective success. Here at Vena, we value transparency, inclusion, continuous learning and passionate people who want to make their mark on our rapidly growing product and business.The successful candidate will have the opportunity to collaborate with a broad range of stakeholders, including Product, Engineering, SaaS Technology \& Ops, and Security/InfoSec, as you provide thought leadership and hands\-on support in meeting functional and non\-functional requirements aligned with our standards and roadmaps. To be successful, this role requires you to thrive in a workplace that is fun, engaging, technically challenging and filled with opportunities to be individually impactful.
   

  

**How You'll Make An Impact**
* Solution Architecture \+ Strategy/Roadmap:
+ Working with Product Management and domain experts, define and own the architecture and roadmap for a set of product features/capabilities in a cloud\-based application environment
+ Collaborate closely with Engineers in the definition of solutions and design
+ Review and validate alignment of Engineer designs and implementations against your Solution Architecture, with full compliance and standards adherence
+ Support Scrum teams during development lifecycle in troubleshooting, innovating and refactoring

* R\&D:
+ Keep informed on current industry trends and evaluate opportunities to evolve our patterns, blueprints, processes and tactics

* Communications:
+ Maintain Architecture artifacts and proactively communicate/manage change to support your stakeholders while mentoring and training Engineers

* Governance:
+ Actively participate as a member of the architecture governance board in both process definition and execution, including development of internal standards, policies, principles, and best practices.

* Innovation:
+ Work with stakeholders in PoC activities to promote business cases for future features and enhancements, while supporting our culture of innovation


**We'd Love to See**
* 3\+ years’ experience in applied Solution Architecture
* 5\+ years’ experience in software development with 3\+ years’ experience in Java / Fullstack
* Working knowledge of React/Redux and experience developing in NodeJS (or equivalent)
* Good understanding of algorithms and computational complexity
* Experience or deep understanding of data structures, management and OLTP an asset
* Experience in designing distributed and concurrent systems and microservices and APIs (REST, GraphQL)
* Experience with AWS, Microsoft Azure, or equivalent cloud environments
* Knowledge of and experience with development of cloud\-based SaaS applications
* Proven collaboration, communication and influencing skills across diverse stakeholders
* Prior experience in scrum/lean/agile environment, preferably while working on a cloud\-based solution
* You are self\-motivated, and self\-directed
* You enjoy tackling new problems and pushing technology forward
* A history of demonstrating empathy for customers


 Base salary range 31,15,350 \- 42,14,885 INR
   

  

* Our salaries are tailored to roles, levels and locations. Your individual pay within this range is influenced by factors like work location, skills, experience and education. As you progress in your role, your compensation may adapt, offering flexibility for growth beyond initial levels. For specifics, your recruiter will provide details and address any questions during the hiring process.

37e244d1.title: Application Development Architect
37e244d1.description:
**Role Overview**


We are seeking an experienced Application Development Architect to lead the design and development of scalable portal applications on Salesforce Experience Cloud. The primary focus of this role is the delivery of B2B customer and partner portal experiences, with the ability to expand into additional customer\-facing and internal portal use cases over time.


This is a hands\-on architecture role responsible for defining and implementing the front\-end application architecture, reusable component strategy, and supporting backend logic on the Salesforce Platform.


A dedicated UX team will provide design systems, site information architecture, and finalized UI designs. This role owns the implementation of those designs in code—ensuring consistency, scalability, performance, and accessibility across all portal experiences.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Architect and deliver scalable portal solutions on Salesforce Experience Cloud, primarily focused on B2B customer and partner experiences, with extensibility to customer and internal portal use cases
* Define and own role\-based portal experience architecture, including navigation patterns, service journeys, and access models for external and internal users
* Lead development of reusable UI components using Lightning Web Components (LWC) and LWR (Lightning Web Runtime), with awareness of Aura for legacy or transitional needs, while establishing portal\-wide standards for reuse, performance, and maintainability
* Own implementation of the design system in code, including consistent styling, theming, and component behavior, extending Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and Experience Cloud theming as needed
* Translate finalized UX designs (via Figma) into high\-quality, responsive, and accessible implementations across Experience Cloud experiences
* Design and implement application\-layer logic using Apex and platform services, including secure data access, sharing, and permission models for external and internal users
* Leverage B2B Commerce templates and capabilities where applicable, and integrate Experience Cloud solutions with external systems and Salesforce platform teams on shared services and data models
* Ensure solutions meet performance, scalability, and accessibility (WCAG) standards, while providing technical leadership through architecture guidance, code reviews, and participation in CI/CD and release processes

**Required Qualifications**

* 7\+ years of experience on the Salesforce Platform
* 3\+ years of hands\-on experience with Salesforce Experience Cloud
* Proven experience building B2B portal or customer\-facing web applications
* Strong hands\-on experience with Lightning Web Components (LWC) and LWR (Lightning Web Runtime)
* Familiarity with Aura components for legacy or hybrid environments
* Experience working with or extending B2B Commerce templates and storefront capabilities
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Apex
* Experience implementing design systems within Salesforce (SLDS, theming, reusable components)
* Experience designing security, sharing, and external user access models
* Experience integrating Salesforce with external systems (REST/SOAP APIs, middleware)

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience scaling multiple Experience Cloud portals (B2B, customer, internal)
* Familiarity with Figma or similar design tools
* Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG, ADA compliance)
* Experience in enterprise Salesforce environments with multiple platform teams
* Salesforce certifications (Platform Administrator, Platform Developer, Experience Cloud Consultant)

  

Goodyear is one of the world's largest tire companies. It employs about 63,000 people and manufactures its products in 49 facilities in 19 countries around the world. Its two Innovation Centers in Akron, Ohio, and Colmar\-Berg, Luxembourg, strive to develop state\-of\-the\-art products and services that set the technology and performance standard for the industry. For more information about Goodyear and its products, go to www.goodyear.com/corporate  

  

Goodyear is an equal employment opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic protected by law.

23ce08d5.title: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
23ce08d5.description:
### **Description**

  

This position is ideal for mid to senior\-level technology professionals to join the Commercial Technology team as a Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer, leading the development, customization, and optimization of the Salesforce Marketing Cloud platform across EMEA.  

Partnering with cross\-functional teams including Marketing, IT, and Commercial Software, you’ll deliver scalable marketing automation solutions, provide technical leadership for platform transformations, and ensure seamless platform performance. This role is critical in enabling business growth through data\-driven marketing, platform innovation, and operational excellence.  

  

  

  

### **Role expectations**

  

* Develop and customize marketing journeys, automations, and cloud pages to deliver personalized customer experiences across EMEA.

  

* Optimize platform performance and lead troubleshooting of technical issues to ensure stability and efficiency.

  

* Act as technical lead for platform transformations, upgrades, and migrations, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems.


  

* Serve as escalation point for high\-severity incidents and lead resolution efforts in collaboration with internal teams and Salesforce support.

  

* Collaborate with global stakeholders to gather requirements, prioritize enhancements, and deliver high\-value solutions.

  

* Define and execute the platform’s technical roadmap, including future integrations and enhancements aligned to business strategy.

  

* Ensure compliance with data governance standards, including GDPR and regional security requirements.

  


### **What we're looking for**

  

* **Education:**

  

o Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Marketing, or a related field.  

* **Experience:**


  

o 5\+ years of experience in Salesforce Marketing Cloud with a strong development focus
  

o Proven experience leading technical initiatives and platform implementations  

* **Skills:**

  


o Strong understanding of Salesforce Marketing Cloud architecture (data extensions, journeys, automations)
o Hands\-on expertise in AMPscript, SSJS, GTL, SQL, HTML, and CSS
o Strong data modeling and SQL\-based segmentation capabilities
o Experience in troubleshooting, incident resolution, and platform optimization
o Strong project management and prioritization skills  

* **Communication:**

  


o Excellent communication skills with ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders.  

* **Teamwork:**

  


o Ability to collaborate across global cross\-functional teams and lead initiatives end\-to\-end.
  

  

**Complimentary Skills**
* Experience integrating Salesforce Marketing Cloud with external systems and other Salesforce clouds using APIs (SOAP/REST).
* Knowledge of Salesforce Data Cloud, Flows, segmentation, and activation use cases.
* Understanding of AI technologies and agentic patterns is desirable.

  

* Relevant certifications:
* Salesforce Marketing Cloud Administrator (required)
* Salesforce Marketing Cloud Engagement Developer (required)

  

  

* Marketing Cloud Consultant (preferred)
  

  

* Data Cloud Consultant (desirable)
### **About Align Technology**


**Your growth and well\-being:**  

  

At Align, every smile matters. We’re committed to helping you thrive by supporting the health, growth, and well\-being of our team members through a variety of tools and programs. While specific offerings may vary by location and role, Align employees can typically expect:* Health and well\-being programs to keep you thriving in both body and mind.
* Employee\-exclusive discounts on Invisalign products.
* Learning opportunities through online learning resources and support for your individual development plans.
* Inclusive, global workplace that fosters collaboration, recognition and belonging.

Country and/or role specific details will be shared with you by your recruiter during the interview process.
  

**Discover Align:**  

  

We are a global community of game\-changers and smart team players, united by our belief in the power of a smile. Our dynamic team of exceptional employees is dedicated to transforming the industry and creating extraordinary outcomes every day.  

Align’s core values of agility, customer, and accountability are more than words to work by, they are words we live by. The actions we take every day speak to who we are as a company and our focus on being truly impactful. We celebrate our differences, and the many ways we support one another— ultimately creating a more inclusive organization and world as we continue transforming smiles and changing lives.  

We foster a culture where thinking differently and seeking new experiences are not just encouraged but celebrated. With the Align Mindset, we empower each other, ensuring every voice is heard and valued in an inclusive environment that inspires creativity and collaboration.  

At Align, we believe in the power of a smile, and we know that every smile is as unique as our employees. As we grow, we are committed to building a workforce rich in diverse cultural backgrounds and life experiences, fostering a culture of open\-mindedness and compassion. We live our company values by promoting healthy people and healthy communities, all with the intent of changing millions of lives, one unique smile at a time.
  

As part of our commitment to innovation, Align Technology includes exocad and Cubicure, companies that enhance our offerings and extend our impact to industry transformation.
  

Eager to learn how we embrace our global differences and nurture employee well\-being?
  

**Explore Align's culture here!**  

Want to discover more about **exocad** and **Cubicure**? Click on their names for additional information.  

**Applicant Privacy Policy:**  

  

Review our **Applicant Privacy Policy** for additional information.  

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement:**  

  

Align Technology is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities in all our practices, without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, marital status, protected veteran status, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other legally protected category. Applicants must be legally authorized to work in the country for which they are applying, and employment eligibility will be verified as a condition of hire.

8970195f.title: Digital Solution Cnslt. Sr. Consultant
8970195f.description:
Service Cloud
  
  

Minimum 5\+ years of work experience in Salesforce.com Projects
  
  

**Key Skills Responsibilities:**  

* Highly experienced in Administration and application development using Salesforce.com, with deep expertise in Service Cloud implementations for enterprise clients.
* Proven track record in successfully delivering end\-to\-end Salesforce projects with focus on customer service excellence and agent productivity.


**Core Expertise (Service Cloud Focus):**  

* Service Cloud Features: Hands\-on experience with Service Console, Omni\-Channel routing, AWS Chat integration, CTI (Computer Telephony Integration), Case Management, Email\-to\-Case, Knowledge Management, and AI\-driven bot implementations (Einstein Bots / Agentforce\-powered conversational bots) for enhanced customer support.
* Agentforce: Strong knowledge and implementation experience of Agentforce to improve service agent productivity, drive automation, and streamline service operations.
* Skilled in building customer\-centric solutions leveraging Service Cloud best practices including SLA tracking, entitlement processes, escalation rules, and service contracts.
* Knowledge of analytics, reports, and dashboards for Service Cloud to monitor KPIs like case resolution time, agent performance, and customer satisfaction.


**Development Integration Skills:**  

* Experienced in developing and maintaining Apex Classes, Triggers, Visualforce Pages, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and Flows to deliver custom solutions.
* Proficient in implementing system integrations with external platforms using REST/SOAP APIs, AWS, CTI connectors, middleware tools, and Platform Events for real\-time communication and data exchange.
* Expertise in customizing Salesforce with objects, workflows, process builder, roles, profiles, sharing rules, validation rules, and page layouts.
* Strong understanding of Salesforce Governor Limits and experience in optimizing code to meet performance and scalability requirements.


**Deployment Data Management:**  

* Responsible for deployment lifecycle management using Copado and Change Sets.
* Experienced in data migration and cleansing activities using Apex Data Loader and other ETL tools.


**Agentforce Conversational AI:**  

Practical experience working with Agentforce to design intelligent agent workflows, automate case handling, and improve agent efficiency through AI\-assisted recommendations and summarization.
  
Experience in building, configuring, and deploying bots to handle common service requests, including:
  
  

* Designing conversational flows and dialog management
* Integrating bots with backend systems via APIs
* Enabling seamless handoff between bots and live agents via Omni\-Channel
* Leveraging NLP capabilities for intent recognition and customer interaction automation
* Continuous improvement of bot performance using analytics and feedback loops


**Other Skills:**  

* Experience in designing and consuming GraphQL APIs to optimize data retrieval, reduce payload size, and improve performance in complex integrations.
* Capable of rapidly learning new technologies and processes, and successfully applying them to projects and operations.
* Strong project discipline with experience in managing deliverables, timelines, and cross\-functional collaboration.
* Effective team player with the ability to work efficiently under pressure and within tight deadlines.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


**Certifications (Preferred):**  

* Salesforce Certified Service Cloud Consultant
* Salesforce Administrator / Platform Developer certifications

3d68a7b2.title: Citrix EUC Architect - AWS
3d68a7b2.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Citrix EUC Architect** 
 to lead the assessment and optimization of enterprise\-scale Citrix DaaS environments deployed on AWS, driving architecture improvements, operational maturity and end\-user experience across the platform.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Assess the existing Citrix DaaS estate deployed on AWS EC2 and identify gaps in architecture, configuration, resilience and operational maturity
* Lead end\-to\-end optimization across the Citrix DaaS environment to improve scalability, stability, performance and user experience
* Review and tune NetScaler (ADC) configurations including gateway, load balancing, traffic management and secure connectivity patterns
* Improve Citrix StoreFront configuration, store design, authentication flows and high\-availability patterns
* Define and document Citrix DaaS best practices across architecture, configuration, operations, monitoring, maintenance and image lifecycle
* Establish and refine operational patterns for day\-2 operations, including monitoring, maintenance, image management and platform support
* Collaborate with the WorkSpaces team to ensure alignment across Citrix DaaS optimization and Amazon WorkSpaces deployment activities
* Capture optimization findings, recommended target state, configuration baselines and runbooks for handover, governance and audit readiness







**Requirements** 



* 13\-20 years of experience in software development with strong hands\-on expertise in Citrix DaaS architecture, configuration, optimization and operational patterns for enterprise\-scale EUC environments
* Expertise in Citrix NetScaler (ADC) including gateway configuration, load balancing and secure access patterns
* Knowledge of Citrix StoreFront covering store design, authentication flows and high availability
* Hands\-on experience assessing and optimizing Citrix estates deployed on AWS using EC2\-based architecture and cloud\-aligned operational models
* Understanding of EUC architecture best practices, desktop delivery patterns, monitoring, maintenance and day\-2 operations
* Advanced experience in performance profiling and tuning across session, network, client and application layers
* Understanding of AWS Well\-Architected Framework principles with focus on reliability, performance efficiency and operational excellence
* Experience defining architecture recommendations, configuration baselines, optimization findings and operational runbooks for enterprise customers







**Nice to have** 



* Familiarity with Amazon WorkSpaces, Windows Server administration and PowerShell scripting
* Background in Active Directory integration with Citrix
* Skills in EC2 Image Builder or Packer and AWS Systems Manager (SSM)
* Broader AWS EUC optimization experience

9e226e0f.title: Aconex Solution Architect (Technical Lead) / Part - Time (Remote)
9e226e0f.description:
**Job Summary**
 Muller's Solutions is seeking an experienced
 **Aconex Solution Architect (Technical Lead)** 
 to lead the architecture, implementation, deployment, and optimization of Oracle Aconex solutions. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing scalable solutions, leading technical delivery, configuring the Aconex platform, and ensuring successful implementation throughout the project lifecycle. This role requires a strong blend of solution architecture, technical leadership, stakeholder engagement, and hands\-on Oracle Aconex expertise.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the end\-to\-end implementation and deployment of Oracle Aconex solutions
* Design scalable Aconex solution architectures based on business and project requirements
* Gather and analyze business and technical requirements and translate them into solution designs
* Configure Oracle Aconex projects, document structures, workflows, forms, correspondence, user roles, permissions, and security settings
* Develop implementation strategies, deployment plans, and solution roadmaps
* Lead technical workshops and provide expert guidance to business and project stakeholders
* Design and oversee integrations between Oracle Aconex and enterprise applications using available APIs and integration methods
* Plan and execute document and data migration activities from legacy systems to Oracle Aconex
* Lead system configuration, testing (SIT/UAT), go\-live activities, and post\-implementation support
* Ensure compliance with document control standards, governance policies, and industry best practices
* Troubleshoot complex technical issues and recommend effective solutions
* Prepare solution architecture documents, technical specifications, deployment guides, and implementation documentation
* Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and support to project teams throughout the implementation lifecycle


**Requirements**
* Required Qualifications
+ Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
+ 8\-10\+ years of relevant experience, including extensive hands\-on experience with Oracle Aconex
+ Proven experience leading Oracle Aconex implementation and deployment projects from initiation through go\-live
+ Strong expertise in Aconex configuration, document control, workflows, correspondence management, forms, and security
+ Experience designing enterprise document management solutions and implementation strategies
+ Experience integrating Oracle Aconex with enterprise systems and external applications
+ Strong understanding of document management, project information management, and engineering/construction workflows
+ Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills
+ Experience leading technical teams and coordinating implementation activities

* Preferred Qualifications
+ Oracle Aconex certifications are highly desirable
+ Experience in engineering, construction, infrastructure, real estate, or capital projects
+ Knowledge of document control best practices and project information management
+ Experience with APIs, system integrations, and data migration
+ Familiarity with cloud\-based enterprise applications and digital transformation initiatives
+ Experience working in remote and cross\-functional project environments

* Key Skills
+ Oracle Aconex Architecture
+ Oracle Aconex Implementation \& Deployment
+ Solution Design
+ Technical Leadership
+ Document Control \& Document Management
+ Workflow Configuration
+ System Integration
+ Data \& Document Migration
+ User \& Security Configuration
+ Stakeholder Management
+ Technical Documentation
+ Testing (SIT/UAT) \& Go\-Live Support
+ Problem Solving \& Troubleshooting

63481328.title: Technology Solutions Delivery - Senior Consultant
63481328.description:
The AVP/ Sr AVP – Technology Service Delivery is a leadership role responsible for driving the delivery of leading\-edge technology services and solutions across clients within Diversified Industries Group (Telecom, Media, Utilities etc). This is a business and client\-facing role that demands a blend of technical expertise, stakeholder management, excellent verbal and written communication and innovative mindset to ensure high\-quality, timely, and cost\-effective service delivery. This role requires diverse set of responsibilities including Client RFP response, technology solution and pricing, program management, transition management, client technology financials.
   

  

 The role encompasses delivering technology solutions across Cloud, AI technologies, Digital Workplace, Contact Center as a service, Telecom and Network technologies. Success in this position demands exceptional communication and influencing skills, enabling effective collaboration across diverse teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 It calls for innovative thinking to identify opportunities where technology can drive agile and efficient business outcomes. The role requires deep engagement with business operations and growth teams to ensure that technology solutions and services align with strategic objectives—delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.
   

  

 As AVP, the individual will work closely with operating leaders, front end leaders, client stakeholders, and internal technology cross\-functional teams to enhance service delivery processes, foster innovation, and ensure the reliability and efficiency of technology services.

4237fa0e.title: Architect I - Enterprise Solutions
4237fa0e.description:
**Role Description**
**Job Description \- ManageEngine Solution Architect**
**Job Title:** 
 ManageEngine Solution Architect
   

  

**Experience:** 
 10\+ Years (with 7\+ years of ManageEngine solution design and implementation experience)
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced ManageEngine Solution Architect to lead the design, implementation, integration, and optimization of ManageEngine solutions across enterprise environments. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in ManageEngine products, enterprise architecture, ITSM processes, automation, integrations, security, and digital transformation initiatives. The role requires working closely with business stakeholders, IT leadership, infrastructure teams, and vendors to deliver scalable and secure IT management solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Solution Architecture \& Design**
* Define enterprise\-wide architecture and roadmap for ManageEngine platforms.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-availability ManageEngine deployments.
* Architect end\-to\-end ITSM, IT Operations, Endpoint Management, Identity Management, and Monitoring solutions.
* Conduct architecture reviews and recommend best practices for ManageEngine implementations.
* Ensure alignment with enterprise architecture standards and governance policies.


**ManageEngine Platform Leadership**
* Lead implementation and optimization of:


 ServiceDesk Plus
   

  

 Endpoint Central
   

  

 OpManager
   

  

 ADManager Plus
   

  

 ADAudit Plus
   

  

 PAM360
   

  

 Applications Manager
   

  

 ServiceDesk Plus MSP (where applicable)
   

  

* Design service catalogs, workflows, SLAs, approval processes, and automation frameworks.
* Define platform standards, configuration strategies, and operational procedures.


**Integration \& Automation**
* Architect integrations between ManageEngine and enterprise systems such as:


 SAP
   

  

 Oracle
   

  

 Salesforce
   

  

 Workday
   

  

 Active Directory
   

  

 Azure AD
   

  

 SIEM platforms
   

  

 Monitoring tools
   

  

 Cloud platforms
   

  

* Design API\-led integration frameworks using REST APIs, SDKs, webhooks, and middleware.
* Lead automation initiatives for incident management, service requests, asset lifecycle management, and user provisioning.


**Security \& Compliance**
* Design secure access models and role\-based access controls.
* Ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory requirements.
* Implement audit, monitoring, privileged access management, and security controls.
* Collaborate with cybersecurity teams to strengthen platform security.


**Stakeholder Management**
* Engage with business leaders and technical teams to gather requirements.
* Translate business needs into technical solutions and architecture designs.
* Present architecture recommendations to senior leadership.
* Provide technical guidance to developers, administrators, and implementation teams.


**Governance \& Best Practices**
* Establish architecture standards, governance frameworks, and operational guidelines.
* Conduct solution reviews, performance assessments, and optimization exercises.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across the ManageEngine ecosystem.
* Create architecture documentation, solution blueprints, and implementation roadmaps.


**Mandatory Skills**
* 10\+ years of IT experience with strong enterprise solution architecture expertise.
* 7\+ years of hands\-on experience implementing and architecting ManageEngine solutions.
* Deep expertise in ServiceDesk Plus, Endpoint Central, OpManager, ADManager Plus, ADAudit Plus, and PAM360\.
* Strong understanding of ITSM, ITIL, IT Operations, and Enterprise Service Management.
* Extensive experience with REST APIs, SDKs, web services, and enterprise integrations.
* Strong knowledge of Active Directory, Azure AD, Identity and Access Management (IAM), and Endpoint Security.
* Experience designing high\-availability and scalable enterprise architectures.
* Strong understanding of network infrastructure, servers, cloud platforms, and security architecture.
* Experience with workflow automation and orchestration platforms.
* Strong SQL and database management skills.


**Preferred Skills**
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code, and automation frameworks.
* Experience integrating with SIEM, monitoring, ERP, CRM, and HRMS platforms.
* Familiarity with enterprise middleware and integration platforms.
* Knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks and compliance standards.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* ITIL Foundation / ITIL Managing Professional
* ManageEngine Product Certifications
* TOGAF Certification
* Microsoft Azure Certifications
* AWS Solutions Architect Certification
* Security Certifications (CISSP, CISM, etc.)


**Educational Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related discipline.
* Master's degree preferred.


**Key Competencies**
* Enterprise Architecture
* Solution Design \& Governance
* Technical Leadership
* Stakeholder Management
* Problem Solving \& Decision Making
* Strategic Planning
* Communication \& Presentation Skills
* Team Mentoring and Leadership


**Responsibilities In Leadership Capacity**
* Lead architecture discussions and technical decision\-making.
* Mentor developers, administrators, and implementation teams.
* Review technical designs and ensure adherence to architectural standards.
* Drive innovation and platform modernization initiatives.
* Act as the subject matter expert for all ManageEngine\-related solutions and integrations.


**Skills**
 solution architecture,manageengine,itil management,solution architecture,

f689381d.title: Cloud Solution Architecture IC4
f689381d.description:
****Overview****
 With a vision to "Build and sell Microsoft AI, Cloud applications, services, and devices with partners, empowering people and organizations to achieve more," SME\&C Channel Partner Sales (CPS) is responsible for driving revenue outcomes with partners through innovative solutions–at scale. The Global Channel Partner Sales team delivers SME\&C growth and market share across AI Business Solutions, Cloud \& AI Platforms, and Security within GPS by capturing total addressable market (TAM) and accelerating cloud growth at scale through our top Channel Sales partner. Our approach is grounded in Cloud Solution Provider acceleration, co\-sell precision, and performance accountability—executed consistently across all solution areas and every stage of the MCEM Win Formula. We are committed to delivering on our segment and revenue accountabilities by aligning execution with measurable impact, fostering partner transformation, and enabling scalable, outcome\-driven growth.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
 As a Cloud Solution Architect, you will guide the development of business solutions, provide deep technical insights and accelerate the growth of Microsoft Tech priorities. you will work closely with partners to understand their technical requirements and business objectives, and guide them through architectural design sessions, developing proof of concepts, and help them transition from legacy systems to modern cloud environments, ensuring that their solutions are optimized for performance and cost\-efficiency.
   

  

 Join our team as a Cloud Solution Architect and play a pivotal role in guiding our most significant partners to designing and implementing innovative scalable, secure, and efficient cloud architectures that meet market needs. By leveraging your skills in technical leadership, cloud computing, software development, problem solving and systems architecture, you will drive business impact by enabling digital transformation, optimizing performance, and driving innovation through the effective use of cloud technologies.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

 As a Partner Solution Architect (PSA), You Will Serve As The Deep Technical SME To Partners’ Technical Force \& Own The Partner’s Technical Strategy Plan For Their Cloud Solution Area (CSA). Withing Your Responsibilities Are:
   

  

* Guide Solution Development \& Activation \- You’ll lead the development and activation of new or enhanced partner offerings that align with Microsoft Cloud priorities. Your focus will be on ensuring these solutions are robust, scalable, secure, and tailored to meet evolving customer needs.
* Empower Innovation \- You’ll run technical innovation workshops, tech briefings, and envisioning sessions to build technical intensity across partner teams. By collaborating with engineering and product teams, you’ll help accelerate the adoption of emerging technologies and shape partner offerings that align with both business goals and technical requirements.
* Strategic Sales Enablement \- You’ll play a key role in activating transformational deals by providing architectural guidance, resolving technical blockers, and enhancing solution design. Your work will directly contribute to workload consumption and revenue impact.
* Champion Technical Excellence \- You’ll guide partners through architecture design sessions, proof\-of\-concepts, and MVP builds. You’ll ensure that solutions follow Microsoft’s Cloud and AI best practices and are optimized for performance, scalability, and security.
* Thought Leadership \& Stakeholder Management \- You’ll build long\-term engagements with strategic partners, influencing their adoption of Microsoft technologies. You’ll develop deep technical relationships with CXOs and foster executive alignment to support joint success.
* Partner Enablement \& Business Acumen \- You’ll coach broader partner technical teams to ensure pre\-sales, deployment, and consumption are embedded in solution development. You’ll help partners build resilience to technical challenges, navigate competitive landscapes, and translate technical concepts into business value.


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related field AND 4\+ years experience in cloud/infrastructure technologies, information technology (IT) consulting/support, systems administration, network operations, software development/support, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting
* OR master's degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business or related field AND 3\+ years technical consulting, technical consultative selling, product development, or related
* OR equivalent experience.
* Proven experience in cloud architecture, solution design, and partner enablement, particularly in large\-scale or global engagements
* Demonstrated ability to lead technical innovation workshops, architecture reviews, and build\-to\-consume engagements with partners
* 6\-10\+ years of related experience in technology IP solutions or services development, with a deep understanding of digital transformation business drivers, cloud platforms, and emerging cloud trends like generative AI (ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE) and SaaS (Software as a Service) services
* Strong background and in\-depth knowledge of cloud technologies, with a focus on Microsoft's cloud offerings (Azure, Dynamics 365, Microsoft 365\)
* M365 tenant management , ADFS, Teams, Copilot Studio, Copilot Cowork
* Security, governance, and data access best practices
* Adoption and Change management (Prosci)
* Build Copilot extensions or Windows virtualization – W365 \& AVD
* EXCELLENT Command over Copilot, creation of agents, publishing agents and large scale adoption


**Preferred Qualifications (PQs)**
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related field AND 8\+ years experience in cloud/infrastructure technologies, information technology (IT) consulting/support, systems administration, network operations, software development/support, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting
* OR Master's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related field AND 6\+ years experience in cloud/infrastructure technologies, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting
* OR equivalent experience
* 4\+ years experience working in a customer\-facing role (e.g., internal and/or external)
* 4\+ years experience working on technical projects
* Technical Certification in Cloud (e.g., Azure, Amazon Web Services, Google, security certifications


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

5ef59f88.title: Senior Delivery Manager
5ef59f88.description:
**About 66degrees** 




 66degrees is an end\-to\-end AI transformation partner that helps enterprises solve complex business challenges through cloud, data, artificial intelligence, analytics, and modern application development. Built through the convergence of several industry\-leading organizations, we combine deep technical expertise with consulting excellence to help businesses transform data into strategic assets, simplify complexity, and accelerate AI\-driven innovation.
 



 Our vision is to enable every organization to become an intelligent enterprise by unlocking the full potential of autonomous systems and human ingenuity.
 



 At 66degrees, we believe in
 **Thriving Through Challenges** 
 and
 **Winning Together** 
 . These values shape our culture and drive our commitment to innovation, collaboration, and continuous professional growth.
 



**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for an experienced
 **Delivery Manager** 
 with a strong background in Agile delivery and Scrum to lead the successful execution of customer\-facing technology programs across Cloud, Data, AI, Analytics, and Application Development initiatives.
 



 This role is ideal for professionals who have evolved from Software Engineering, Technical Leadership, Solution Architecture, or Engineering Management into Delivery Management and Agile Leadership positions.
 



 The ideal candidate combines technical expertise with strong delivery leadership and is comfortable collaborating with clients, architects, product teams, and engineering teams to deliver complex technology transformation programs while ensuring exceptional customer outcomes.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Delivery Management** 



* Lead the successful delivery of software, cloud, data, AI, and digital transformation programs aligned with customer objectives.
* Define project scope, delivery plans, timelines, milestones, resource requirements, and success metrics.
* Manage delivery risks, dependencies, resource constraints, and escalation paths.
* Monitor project health, delivery milestones, financial performance, team velocity, and customer satisfaction.
* Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and meet quality expectations.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery processes and operational efficiency.
* Manage multiple concurrent projects across geographically distributed teams.



**Agile Delivery \& Scrum Leadership** 



* Coach teams on Agile principles, Scrum practices, and delivery excellence.
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies including Sprint Planning, Daily Stand\-ups, Sprint Reviews, Backlog Grooming, and Retrospectives.
* Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* Remove delivery impediments and proactively resolve execution challenges.
* Drive Agile maturity across teams and support adoption of best practices.
* Partner closely with Product Owners on backlog prioritization and sprint planning.



**Technical \& Consulting Leadership** 



* Collaborate with clients, architects, product teams, and engineering leaders to translate business objectives into execution plans.
* Participate in technical discussions, architecture reviews, solution planning, and delivery strategy sessions.
* Understand technical challenges and work with engineering teams to identify practical solutions and mitigation strategies.
* Balance delivery commitments with scalability, quality, security, and maintainability requirements.
* Provide delivery oversight for enterprise cloud modernization, AI, analytics, data, and application development initiatives.



**Client \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Build trusted relationships with customers, business stakeholders, and executive sponsors.
* Lead governance meetings, executive reviews, steering committee discussions, and project status updates.
* Communicate project progress, risks, issues, dependencies, and mitigation plans effectively.
* Manage stakeholder expectations and ensure alignment between customer and internal teams.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for delivery\-related activities throughout the engagement lifecycle.
* Support account growth by identifying opportunities for process improvements and additional services.



**Operational Excellence** 



* Establish and promote delivery governance frameworks, reporting standards, and delivery metrics.
* Drive best practices in Agile delivery, project execution, and team collaboration.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of organizational delivery methodologies.
* Support resource planning, capacity management, and delivery forecasting.
* Mentor delivery teams and encourage knowledge sharing and professional development.



**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 10\+ years of overall experience in Software Engineering, Technical Leadership, Project Delivery, or Program Management.
* Minimum 3\+ years of experience as a Delivery Manager, Technical Delivery Manager, Program Manager, Scrum Master, or Engineering Delivery Lead.
* Strong technical foundation with prior experience as a Software Engineer, Technical Lead, Engineering Lead, or Solution Architect.
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale software, cloud, data, analytics, or AI programs in consulting or professional services environments.
* Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, Scrum, SDLC, and modern software delivery practices.
* Experience managing distributed cross\-functional teams and multiple concurrent projects.
* Ability to understand system architecture, APIs, microservices, distributed systems, and cloud platforms.
* Experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AWS, or Microsoft Azure.
* Experience working with engineering teams delivering cloud\-native applications, analytics, AI/ML, or data platform solutions.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile project management tools such as Jira or Azure DevOps.
* Excellent leadership, communication, stakeholder management, negotiation, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working in consulting, professional services, or customer\-facing delivery organizations.
* Experience delivering cloud migration, AI/ML, Generative AI, analytics, data modernization, or digital transformation programs.
* Scrum certifications such as CSM, PSM, SAFe Scrum Master, or equivalent.
* Exposure to Google Cloud technologies and AI\-driven solutions.
* Experience managing globally distributed teams and enterprise customers.
* Strong customer consulting and executive stakeholder management experience.



*66degrees is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, national origin, age, marital status, sexual orientation, veteran status, disability, or any other protected characteristic.*

813207b8.title: Senior IT Delivery Manager - Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals
813207b8.description:
We are seeking a strategic and delivery\-focused
 **Senior IT Delivery Manager** 
 with expertise in managing technology portfolios within regulated pharmaceutical and life sciences environments. The ideal candidate will have strong leadership skills, extensive experience in IT project delivery, and the ability to build and sustain senior stakeholder relationships.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of a diverse portfolio of IT projects, driving timely and quality outcomes within budget
* Establish delivery roadmaps, resource plans, and performance metrics across multiple workstreams
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams, ensuring accountability and resolving issues proactively
* Ensure compliance with project governance frameworks, SDLC/Agile methodologies, and regulatory requirements such as GxP
* Promote adoption of AI capabilities to enhance the software development lifecycle
* Identify and mitigate project risks to ensure continuity and predictable success
* Serve as the main point of contact for client stakeholders, nurturing trust and credibility
* Align solutions with client business needs, industry challenges, and strategic objectives
* Deliver executive presentations and provide clear, business\-oriented insights on complex technical deliverables
* Provide leadership to diverse project teams, fostering collaboration and a culture of high performance
* Support capability development, talent planning, and team motivation across distributed teams
* Manage portfolio budgets, forecasts, and financial controls, ensuring efficient resource utilization
* Oversee vendor and partner performance, ensuring adherence to contracts, service levels, and quality standards







**Requirements** 



* 15 to 18 years of experience in Information Technology
* 10\+ years of experience managing IT projects or programs, including complex, multi\-project portfolios
* 7\+ years of experience in Life Sciences or Pharmaceuticals
* Qualifications in enterprise technologies including digital transformation, cloud migration, and data platforms
* Strong competency in SDLC, Agile/Hybrid methodologies, and IT governance frameworks
* Advanced capability in client stakeholder management and executive communication
* Background in working with cross\-functional global delivery teams
