9713bdaa.title: Solution Expert Architect
9713bdaa.description:
* Enterprise Infrastructure Architecture Network, compute, storage, virtualization On‑prem, cloud, and hybrid environments 2\.Cloud \& Modernization Cloud adoption strategies (AWS / Azure / GCP concepts) Hybrid cloud design, migration, and modernization Automation and infrastructure transformation 3\.Resilience \& Availability


 Role: Infrastructure Architect.
   

  

* Possess strong, in\-depth knowledge of enterprise infrastructure including network, compute, storage, virtualization, cloud, and hybrid environments.
* Define and govern end\-to\-end infrastructure architecture aligned with operational stability, scalability, security, and performance requirements.
* Provide architectural guidance and technical leadership to customers and internal IT Operations teams.
* Translate business requirements into sustainable and cost\-effective infrastructure solutions.
* Develop and present a future\-ready infrastructure roadmap, covering modernization, cloud adoption, automation, and technology transformation initiatives.
* Ensure infrastructure architectures adhere to industry best practices, security standards, and compliance requirements.
* Act as a design authority for infrastructure changes, enhancements, and major transformation programs.
* Support complex troubleshooting and act as a technical escalation point for high\-impact operational issues.
* Drive standardization, optimization, and continuous improvement across the infrastructure landscape.
* Evaluate emerging technologies and platforms to improve resilience, availability, and operational efficiency.
* Provide guidance on DR, high availability, capacity planning, and performance management strategies.
* Demonstrate strong communication and stakeholder management skills, effectively engaging with both technical and business stakeholders. Job Description:Solution Architect. Possess strong expertise across enterprise infrastructure domains including network, compute, storage, virtualization, cloud, and hybrid environments. Engage with customers to understand business drivers, technical requirements, constraints, and success criteria. Define end\-to\-end infrastructure solution blueprints and architectures tailored to customer needs and industry best practices. Lead solution design activities for RFPs, RFIs, and proposals, including technical responses, assumptions, and solution narratives. Translate customer requirements into scalable, secure, resilient, and cost\-effective infrastructure solutions. Develop high\-level and detailed solution architectures, diagrams, and design documentation for on\-prem, cloud, and hybrid models. Collaborate closely with sales, pre\-sales, delivery, and operations teams to ensure solution feasibility and operational readiness.BOM, sizing, costing, and solution trade\-offs during proposal and deal shaping phases. Customer requirement analysis and discovery RFP / RFI / proposal solution design Effort estimation, sizing, BOM, costing Trade‑off analysis and cost optimization Creating architecture diagrams and design documentation Value proposition articulation (business \+ technology)

b2707a0f.title: Cloud Architect
b2707a0f.description:
**Job Summary**
 Synechron is seeking an experienced Cloud Architect to lead the design, implementation, and management of scalable, secure, and highly available multi\-cloud platforms supporting enterprise applications. This role is essential in driving organizational cloud strategy, ensuring operational agility, and optimizing costs across cloud environments. The ideal candidate will architect and refine cloud solutions across AWS, GCP, and hybrid cloud environments, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver robust cloud ecosystems aligned with business and technical objectives.
   

  

**Software Requirements**
*Required Software Proficiency:*
* Cloud Platforms: AWS, GCP, or Azure — extensive experience in designing and managing enterprise cloud architectures supporting mission\-critical workloads (supporting a 10\+ year background in cloud support/architecture)
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform (preferred), CloudFormation, or similar — demonstrated ability to automate cloud environment provisioning and management
* Containerization \& Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes (2\+ years) — deep experience in containerized deployment, scaling, and orchestration of cloud applications
* Monitoring \& Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch — solid track record in system health monitoring, alerting, and incident response support
* Network \& Security: Cloud networking, firewalls, IAM policies, encryption — for establishing secure, compliant cloud environments supporting enterprise standards


*Preferred Software Skills:*
* Hybrid and multi\-region cloud architecture design supporting high availability and disaster recovery strategies
* Cloud security tools and compliance frameworks supporting standards like PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA
* DevOps automation: Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitLab for CI/CD pipelines supporting infrastructure automation


**Overall Responsibilities**
* Lead the architecture, deployment, and management of scalable and secure multi\-cloud and hybrid cloud solutions supporting enterprise applications and data workloads
* Develop cloud strategy frameworks supporting agility, operational efficiency, and cost management aligned with organizational objectives
* Collaborate with product, engineering, security, and DevOps teams to implement cloud\-native solutions supporting high performance and security compliance
* Drive automation initiatives for infrastructure as code, deployment, configuration, and continuous integration/delivery pipelines
* Support cloud migration projects, environment configuration, and ongoing optimization for large, complex enterprise systems
* Monitor cloud environment health, troubleshoot incidents, and implement performance improvements and security controls
* Conduct security assessments, compliance audits, and governance practices supporting industry or regulatory standards
* Provide technical leadership, mentorship, and knowledge sharing within cloud teams and across the organization
* Maintain comprehensive documentation including architecture diagrams, operational procedures, and security policies


**Technical Skills (By Category)**
* Cloud Platforms:
+ Essential: AWS, GCP, or Azure supporting enterprise cloud deployments (supporting multi\-cloud and hybrid architectures)
+ Preferred: Management of multi\-region architectures, cross\-cloud integration, and cloud service orchestration


* Infrastructure as Code:
+ Essential: Terraform (preferred), CloudFormation supporting automated, repeatable environment setup


* Containerization \& Orchestration:
+ Essential: Docker, Kubernetes supporting scalable deployment supporting high availability and disaster recovery


* Monitoring \& Security:
+ Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch for operational visibility
+ Security: IAM, encryption protocols, security policies aligned with industry standards (PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA)


* Networking:
+ VPC design, traffic routing, firewalls, VPNs supporting enterprise security architectures


**Experience Requirements**
* 10\+ years of enterprise cloud architecture and implementation experience supporting large\-scale, secure, and compliant multi\-cloud and hybrid environments
* Proven track record designing, deploying, and managing cloud\-native solutions supporting mission\-critical enterprise systems and applications
* Extensive experience automating infrastructure and deployment processes using IaC tools (Terraform, CloudFormation)
* Strong knowledge of cloud security, governance, and regulatory compliance frameworks supporting regulated industries (preferably finance, healthcare)
* Demonstrated leadership in managing cloud strategies, designing scalable architecture, and mentoring technical teams


**Day\-to\-Day Activities**
* Architect and deploy scalable, secure cloud infrastructure supporting enterprise applications and data workflows
* Lead cloud migration, modernization, and multi\-region deployment projects
* Automate infrastructure provisioning, deployment, and configuration across cloud environments using IaC tools and pipelines
* Monitor system security, performance, and availability, proactively troubleshooting and resolving issues
* Conduct security reviews, risk assessments, and compliance audits supporting enterprise standards
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to optimize architecture, implement best practices, and ensure security standards
* Maintain detailed architecture diagrams, operational procedures, and security policies
* Evaluate new cloud features, tools, and industry trends, recommending strategic improvements


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field
* 10\+ years of enterprise cloud architecture and deployment expertise supporting complex, regulated, and high\-availability environments
* Certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect, Azure Solutions Architect (preferred)
* Proven experience supporting large\-scale cloud infrastructures that meet security, compliance, and operational excellence standards


**Professional Competencies**
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills supporting complex, high\-availability cloud environments
* Leadership in guiding cloud architecture strategies, mentoring teams, and driving cloud adoption best practices
* Excellent stakeholder communication and documentation skills
* Adaptability to evolving cloud technologies, security standards, and regulatory requirements
* Strategic thinking for optimizing performance, security, and costs across multi\-cloud and hybrid platforms
* Effective organizational skills to manage multiple initiatives in dynamic, fast\-paced environments


***S***
***YNECHRON’S DIVERSITY \& INCLUSION STATEMENT***
 Diversity \& Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps build stronger, successful businesses as a global company. We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds, race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender, sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower our global workforce by offering flexible workplace arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and development programs, and more.
   

  

 All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.
   

  

 Candidate Application Notice

08b02bdb.title: Solution Architect Specialist
08b02bdb.description:
Job Title: Solution Architect Specialist
   

  

 Req ID: 60324
   

  

 Job Function: Architecture Solution and Design
   

  

 Posting Start Date: 08/07/2026
   

  

 Posting End Date: 12/07/2026
   

  

 Division: Digital
   

  

 Job Location: IND\-Bengaluru\-RMZ Ecoworld
   

  

 Advertised Salary: Competitive
   

  

**Recruiter: Seema Shivakumar**
**Hiring Manager: Dilip N**
**Career Grade: D**
**About The Role**
 The Solution Architect Sepcialist supports the execution of the Solutions strategy and roadmap that supports BT’s commercial strategy through cross functional project and technical delivery and the participation of a team that pursues innovation as well as engineering \& architecture excellence.
   

  

 The role is to work with business and operational stakeholders, software engineers, architects to provide compelling E2E Solution, helping build and integrate with backend systems and APIs; and contributing/aligning to business needs/delivery timeline.
   

  

 The role is key to providing outstanding service to our customers by maintaining and improving the products we supply them with.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Applies specialist technical expertise to develop and advise approach on a range of complex, high impact and high risk customer solutions and define the architectural strategy for the Service domain
* Accountable for defining and maintaining the architectural roadmap for the respective domain
* Creates, owns and implements the technical solutions and inputs into the roadmaps for the respective domain
* Liaises with CFU, Operational, Architectural and customer stakeholders, ensuring business needs are met through assurance of the design
* To work with programme managers and colleagues across BT to ensure programmes /projects are successful
* Supports inlife issues and supports knowledge management across the team.
* Manages and works to deliver in Agile environment
* Explore, propose and consider AI driven solutions


**Essential Skills / Experience**
* TMF implementation experience and knowledge of other equivalent Frameworks
* Solution Architecture \- You can drive the implementation of the E2E solution framework in collaboration with senior business and operations stakeholder
* Product and service knowledge \- You demonstrate subject matter expertise in complex telecom infrastructure, products and services. Specially in the fixed networks area and Ethernet products. Understanding of the Network design. You develop scalable and re\-usable solutions to address business requirements
* Be agile \- You lead collaborative ways of working and continuous improvement. You encourage their adoption where necessary to deliver the best results for the customer
* Technology excellence \- You maintain a deep expertise in emerging technology trends. You use specialised skills and knowledge to guide the business and develop content to support the sharing of complex technical information. Experience of solutions using Salesforce, Vlocity, Ciena BluePlanet
* Improvement focus \- You collaborate to identify how work activities across teams are related and highlight inefficiencies. You help to remove barriers and find the resources or support needed to improve processes
* Exposure to AI Tools and Implementation experience in any domain will be added advantage/preferred.


 BT Group is the UK’s leading communications group and the holding company behind some of the country’s most recognised brands – including BT, EE, Openreach and Plusnet. Our purpose is as simple as it is ambitious: we connect for good. Our customers include consumers, small, medium and large businesses, public sector organisations and other communications providers.
   

  

 BT Group’s role is about setting direction, unlocking value and creating the conditions for our brands and businesses to thrive.
   

  

 Having come through the most capital\-intensive phase of our fibre investment, our focus now is on what comes next – simplifying how we operate, using technology and AI to work smarter, and organising ourselves to serve customers better and grow sustainably. Group teams shape strategy, policy, brand, capital allocation and transformation, helping the whole organisation perform at its best.
   

  

 We have a singular culture that unites all our people: we are customer\-first challengers, who are committed, clear and connected. These behaviours unite us as one team to deliver for our colleagues, our customers, our stakeholders and the country. Joining BT Group means working at the heart of a business that matters to the UK, with the opportunity to shape decisions, influence outcomes and help set the future course of one of the country’s most important companies.

83dd16d1.title: SAP Cloud ALM Engineer
83dd16d1.description:
Role Description:

We are looking for a meticulous and driven **SAP CALM cum Release Engineer** to join our team. You will be responsible for the end\-to\-end management of SAP transport and release processes, ensuring the stability and integrity of our complex SAP landscape while supporting our mission to provide seamless services to various projects in FIntech

 **B.Responsible**

* **Efficiency Focused**: Naturally oriented towards improving release cycle efficiencies and reducing deployment lead times.
* **Accountability**: Seeking accountability from themselves and others for the integrity of the production environment.
* **Collaborative**: Compassionate collaborator with a deep sense of comradery, working closely with functional consultants, developers, Program and BASIS teams.
* **Cross\-functional**: Willingness to be cross\-functional, pick up new skills (like automation in SAP), and cover new ground for the team.
* **Quality Driven**: Striving for continuous improvement and high quality in release documentation and deployment procedures.
* **Problem Solver**: Keen to understand and solve real\-world deployment challenges through technical expertise and process optimization.

 **B.Skilled**

* **Experience**: They have at least 7\+ years of experience in SAP Basis, Change Management, or Cloud Application Lifecycle Management (CALM).
* **Education**: CS, Engineering, or similar university background is a MUST HAVE.
* **CALM Experience:** Hands\-on configuration or administrative experience specifically with SAP Cloud ALM (CALM)
* **Technical Knowledge**: Understanding of SAP ABAP objects, version control, and conflict resolution (retrofitting).
* **Methodology**: Experience working in a scrum/agile environment and understanding of DevOps principles within SAP.
* **Compliance:** Understanding of SoX Compliance and audit trails during cloud\-based release cycles
* Implementation\- CALM implementation for SAP RISE Transformation Projects

 **Competencies and Skills :**

* Naturally oriented towards improving efficiency.
* Seeking accountability from themselves and others.
* Compassionate collaborator with a deep sense of comradery.
* Willingness to be cross\-functional, pick up new skills and cover new ground with/for the team.
* Striving for continuous improvement and high quality in their work.
* Strong work ethic and high spirit.
* Keen to understand and solve real world problems through technology.

 **What will we provide you with?**

* Contributing to a high scale, complex, world renowned product and seeing real\-time impact of your work on millions of travelers worldwide
* Working in a fast\-paced and performance driven culture
* Opportunity to utilize technical expertise, leadership capabilities and entrepreneurial spirit
* Promote and drive impactful and innovative engineering solutions
* Technical, behavioral and interpersonal competence advancement via on\-the\-job opportunities, experimental projects, hackathons, conferences and active community participation
* Competitive compensation and benefits package and some great added perks of working in the Booking Holdings.

4ed54964.title: SAP Architect - MDG Technical Consultant
4ed54964.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking a highly experienced **SAP Architect \- MDG Technical Consultant** specializing in the Customers and Business Partners stream. The role requires strong expertise in MDG Customer/Vendor domains along with technical proficiency in SAP MDG frameworks and integrations.

**Responsibilities**

* Design, configure, and extend SAP MDG data models and UI models
* Develop and manage workflows, validations, and derivations in MDG
* Implement SMT mappings and ensure seamless integration with external systems
* Work with BRF\+ and SAP MDG APIs (Governance, Context, External APIs)
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to ensure accurate governance of customer/vendor master data
* Provide technical solutions and enhancements using ABAP and OOP methodologies
* Support integrations with SAP S/4HANA, Snowflake, and non\-SAP applications via APIs, OData, IDocs, and events

**Requirements**

* 14\-18 years of strong hands\-on experience in the SAP MDG Customer/Vendor domain
* Expertise in FPM, UIBB, BRF\+, workflows, and MDG extensions
* ABAP development experience, including Core ABAP, OOP, CDS, and enhancements
* Exposure to SAP BTP services (CAP, Workflow Management, Integration Suite, Event Mesh, Business Rules)
* Knowledge of SAP Identity Authentication/Provisioning, Cloud Connector, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring tools (Alert Notification, SAP Cloud ALM)
* Excellent problem\-solving, stakeholder management, and communication skills
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher

**Nice to have**

* Experience with global or regional SAP implementations

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits

55a8ee45.title: SAP Architect - MDG Technical Consultant
55a8ee45.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking a highly experienced **SAP Architect \- MDG Technical Consultant** specializing in the Customers and Business Partners stream. The role requires strong expertise in MDG Customer/Vendor domains along with technical proficiency in SAP MDG frameworks and integrations.

**Responsibilities**

* Design, configure, and extend SAP MDG data models and UI models
* Develop and manage workflows, validations, and derivations in MDG
* Implement SMT mappings and ensure seamless integration with external systems
* Work with BRF\+ and SAP MDG APIs (Governance, Context, External APIs)
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to ensure accurate governance of customer/vendor master data
* Provide technical solutions and enhancements using ABAP and OOP methodologies
* Support integrations with SAP S/4HANA, Snowflake, and non\-SAP applications via APIs, OData, IDocs, and events

**Requirements**

* 14\-18 years of strong hands\-on experience in the SAP MDG Customer/Vendor domain
* Expertise in FPM, UIBB, BRF\+, workflows, and MDG extensions
* ABAP development experience, including Core ABAP, OOP, CDS, and enhancements
* Exposure to SAP BTP services (CAP, Workflow Management, Integration Suite, Event Mesh, Business Rules)
* Knowledge of SAP Identity Authentication/Provisioning, Cloud Connector, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring tools (Alert Notification, SAP Cloud ALM)
* Excellent problem\-solving, stakeholder management, and communication skills
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher

**Nice to have**

* Experience with global or regional SAP implementations

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

61185287.title: Cloud Data Migration Engineer
61185287.description:
Role: Your Impact and Ownership
   

  

 Propel is looking for a
 **Data Migration Engineer** 
 with experience in
 **database technologies, scripting, and cloud data migrations** 
 . The ideal candidate will lead end\-to\-end migration projects, including data mapping, extraction, transformation, and migration execution, while collaborating closely with customers to deliver accurate, scalable, and efficient migration solutions.
   

  

* Lead end\-to\-end data mapping and migration across client implementation projects, ensuring timely and successful delivery.
* Serve as a technical SME for data imports into Salesforce, Propel, and integrated systems.
* Analyze source systems, define data mapping and transformation rules, and execute migrations.
* Develop migration scripts, perform data cleansing, and ensure data accuracy and integrity.
* Collaborate with customers and internal teams throughout the migration process.
* Maintain project documentation, status updates, and migration records.
* Contribute to team enablement, process improvements, product feedback, and onboarding initiatives.


 Key Responsibilities at this Role
   

  

 Skill: The Expertise RequiredMust\-Haves for this Role
   

  

* 5\+ years of experience in end\-to\-end data migration, including data mapping, extraction, transformation, validation, and cloud migrations.
* Strong expertise in SQL, databases (SQL Server/Oracle), ETL tools, CSV/Excel, and data quality management.
* Hands\-on experience with Python, Java, and familiarity with AWS services (Lambda, EC2, S3\).
* Good understanding of data modeling, application design, and data security during cloud migrations.
* Experience with Salesforce (Apex, SOQL, Data Loader, Bulk APIs) is an advantage.
* Strong project management, stakeholder communication, and documentation skills.
* Excellent attention to detail with the ability to identify and resolve data quality issues.


 Skills: cloud,transformation,data migration,data,data mapping

7c59e804.title: Kubernetes Platform Architect (India, Bangalore, Remote))
7c59e804.description:
**Job Description:**
 The VKS Application Engineering team is responsible for enabling enterprise success with VMware Kubernetes Service (VKS) as part of VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF). Our mission is to accelerate adoption of VKS as the enterprise\-grade Kubernetes platform for modern applications in private cloud.
   

  

 As a VKS Application Engineer, you will be on the front lines with enterprise customers, driving the successful adoption of VMware Kubernetes Service (vKS) on VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF). This is a hands\-on, customer\-facing role focused on designing and validating solutions, running proof\-of\-concepts, and guiding customers through their modernization journey.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
* Act as a trusted advisor for enterprise customers, guiding them through the design, validation, and deployment of vKS solutions on VCF.
* Collaborate closely with field account teams to align solution architecture with customer priorities and drive successful engagement outcomes.
* Lead technical discovery sessions, workshops, and proof\-of\-concepts to validate vKS architectures and demonstrate business value.
* Partner with sales to jointly develop customer proposals that address modernization goals, workload placement, and operational transformation.
* Provide prescriptive guidance on Kubernetes adoption, DevOps/CI\-CD integration, and enterprise requirements such as scalability, security, and disaster recovery.
* Build and share reference architectures, deployment patterns, and technical assets to accelerate customer adoption of VKS.
* Deliver clear, compelling technical presentations to diverse audiences, from architects to executive decision makers.
* Stay current on industry trends, competitor offerings, and evolving enterprise requirements to position VKS effectively.
* Collaborate with product management and engineering to provide field feedback that influences roadmap direction.


**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Experience in application engineering or technical sales for enterprise IT, cloud, or application platforms.
* Strong expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and VMware Cloud Foundation (vSphere, vSAN, NSX as foundation).
* 10\+ years in technology\-related roles, with depth in enterprise IT architecture, application modernization, or cloud\-native platforms.
* Demonstrated success working directly with enterprise customers to deliver technical solutions and drive platform adoption.
* Excellent communication, storytelling, and presentation skills with the ability to engage both technical and business leaders.
* Strong collaboration skills, able to work hand\-in\-hand with sales teams to advance customer opportunities.
* Proven ability to identify challenges, design solutions, and articulate value in business terms.
* Enthusiastic self\-starter with curiosity, drive, and the ability to thrive in dynamic environments.
* Ability to travel up to 50% of the time


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field; or equivalent experience.
* Deep knowledge of VMware Cloud Foundation and Kubernetes platforms.
* Certifications in cloud\-native or public cloud technologies (AWS, Azure, GCP, Red Hat OpenShift, etc.) are highly desirable.


 R026233

8b42a9f1.title: DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure Engineer (AWS HIPAA Specialist)
8b42a9f1.description:
**Company Description** 




 DentTracks Software LLC is a cutting\-edge, cloud\-based platform designed to revolutionize dental practice management. It empowers dental professionals and office staff with advanced technology and actionable insights tailored to optimize workflows. The software enhances efficiency, streamlines daily operations, and improves profitability, helping dental professionals achieve their goals seamlessly. DentTracks is fully customizable to meet the unique needs of each dental business, setting the foundation for operational success.
 



  





 Position Summary:
 



 We are seeking a DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure Engineer (AWS HIPAA Specialist) to architect, implement, and maintain DentTracks’ HIPAA\-compliant SaaS infrastructure. This role ensures the platform is secure, scalable, resilient, and optimized for cost and performance. The engineer will be hands\-on in building AWS infrastructure with automation, working closely with developers, security, and product teams.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 


* Design and manage HIPAA\-eligible AWS infrastructure (EKS, EC2 H200, S3, CloudFront, ElastiCache, Secrets Manager, VPC networking).
* Build and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Argo Rollouts) for microservices and front\-end deployments.
* Configure security guardrails: IAM least privilege, KMS encryption, WAF, Shield Advanced, GuardDuty, Security Hub.
* Manage multi\-region, high\-availability architecture with failover and disaster recovery plans.
* Support monitoring and observability (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, Datadog).
* Optimize cost efficiency through autoscaling, reserved instances, and capacity blocks (for GPUs).
* Collaborate with Security Engineers to ensure HIPAA, SOC 2, and BAA compliance across infrastructure.
* Provide operational support, troubleshooting, and on\-call rotation for critical systems.



  





 Qualifications
 


* 2\+ years in DevOps, SRE, or Cloud Infrastructure roles.
* Deep experience with AWS HIPAA\-eligible services and security best practices.
* Strong knowledge of Kubernetes (EKS), Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Terraform.
* Familiarity with MongoDB Atlas, PrivateLink, and VPC networking.
* Experience with HIPAA/SOC 2 security controls and audit requirements.
* Scripting skills in Bash, Python, or Go.
* Strong problem\-solving, documentation, and communication skills.

1b7c541d.title: CLOUD ARCHITECT - VOIS
1b7c541d.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking an experienced Cloud Architect to govern, review, and continuously enhance the local market’s application and cloud architecture landscape. This role plays a critical part in shaping cloud\-native adoption and application modernisation, ensuring solutions are scalable, secure, resilient, cost\-efficient, and aligned to business needs. Working across multiple delivery teams, the individual will provide architectural leadership with a strong focus on AWS, containerisation, and Amazon EKS, while influencing engineering standards and long\-term technology direction.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Assess existing applications and cloud implementations to identify technical debt, architectural risks, and modernisation opportunities
* Define and drive application modernisation strategies, including refactoring, re\-platforming, and re\-architecture
* Review and approve High\-Level and Low\-Level Designs, ensuring alignment with architectural standards and best practices
* Design and govern enterprise\-grade architectures across monolithic and microservices\-based systems
* Define, validate, and assure Non\-Functional Requirements such as scalability, availability, performance, and security
* Review API designs, including REST standards, versioning, security, and integration patterns
* Guide containerisation standards and validate Kubernetes and Amazon EKS deployment models
* Ensure production\-ready Kubernetes configurations, including autoscaling, namespaces, and resource management
* Provide architectural oversight for CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, and DevSecOps practices
* Design and validate scalable, secure, and resilient AWS solutions, including disaster recovery and high availability
* Recommend cost optimisation and performance improvement strategies across cloud platforms
* Own final architectural decisions, including patterns, service decomposition, and integration approaches
* Collaborate with engineering, DevOps, platform, cloud infrastructure, and security teams, and contribute to SAFe PI planning and architectural runway discussions


**Who You Are**
* An experienced application and solution architect with deep expertise in cloud\-native and distributed system design
* Highly skilled in AWS architecture, including services such as EKS, EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, ALB/NLB, and WAF
* Proficient in Kubernetes, Docker, and container lifecycle management within enterprise environments
* Knowledgeable in Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform and/or CloudFormation
* Experienced in reviewing CI/CD pipelines, automation strategies, and observability frameworks
* Comfortable working in large\-scale, cross\-functional, and Agile (SAFe) delivery environments
* Confident influencing stakeholders and technical teams without direct authority
* An effective communicator with strong documentation and presentation capabilities
* Qualified with a bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field, with extensive overall IT experience and significant exposure to AWS architecture
* AWS Solutions Architect and Kubernetes certifications are preferred, with SAFe certification considered an advantage


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* The opportunity to influence large\-scale cloud and application architecture within a global organisation
* Exposure to complex, enterprise\-level AWS and Kubernetes environments
* Collaboration with diverse, highly skilled teams across multiple markets
* A role with clear architectural ownership and strategic impact on technology direction
* An environment that supports continuous learning, innovation, and professional growth


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced cloud governance and architectural decision\-making at enterprise scale
* Deeper expertise in cloud cost optimisation, resilience engineering, and security\-by\-design
* Enhanced stakeholder engagement and architectural leadership within SAFe environments
* Broader exposure to modern DevSecOps, GitOps, and platform engineering practices


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media**
* LinkedIn – VOIS
* Facebook – VOIS Global
* Instagram – VOIS Global
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: Connect with VOIS teams

08d4004d.title: PLM Cloud Specialist
08d4004d.description:
**Role Description**
 We are looking for a PLM Cloud Specialist with strong PLM \& Cloud experience to join the Product Data Digitalization (PDD) Services team at ASSA ABLOY.
   

  

 This role is responsible for the design, operation, and modernization of enterprise PLM/PDM/xCAD services running in cloud and hybrid environments, with a strong focus on infrastructure reliability, scalability, security, and operational excellence.
   

  

 You will work closely with the Global PDD Competence Center, IT infrastructure teams, and external vendors to ensure that PLM/PDM/xCAD services supporting global R\&D and manufacturing operate as production grade, cloud enabled services, as applicable.
   

  

 The role reports to the Product Team Manager – Applications.
   

  

**APPLICATION \& SERVICE CONTEXT**
 ASSA ABLOY operates a highly decentralized, globally distributed engineering IT landscape supporting a portfolio of enterprise applications used for physical product design and lifecycle management.
   

  

 Rather than monolithic services, we operate a diverse and evolving ecosystem that includes:
   

  

* Enterprise PLM/PDM/xCAD services
* Cloud hosted and hybrid PLM deployments
* CAD, Simulation, and Engineering authoring tools
* PLM integrations with ERP, MES, and downstream manufacturing systems
* Emerging technologies such as Knowledge Graphs and AI/LLMs based product data solutions


 This role plays a key part in operating, stabilizing, scaling, and evolving these services, with cloud infrastructure and service reliability as the foundation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities \& Deliverables**
* A specific PLM technology is designed, delivered and supported in compliance with customer and IT security requirements, IT infrastructure standards, service management processes and company policies
* Design, implement, and operate cloud and hybrid infrastructure for PLM/PDM/xCAD service and integrations
* Own the infrastructure and service lifecycle of PLM/PDM/xCAD environments (prod / non prod)
* Execute PLM/PDM/xCAD deployments, upgrades, patching, and maintenance activities
* Provide end to end service support including incident resolution and problem management
* Perform root cause analysis (RCA) for recurring PLM/PDM/xCAD services and infrastructure issues
* Drive continuous improvements related to performance, scalability, availability, security, and cost efficiency
* Evaluate new PLM/PDM/xCAD vendor releases and cloud capabilities from an operational readiness standpoint


**PLM SERVICEs \& CLOUD OPERATIONS**
* Support cloud based and hybrid PLM/PDM/xCAD solutions in compliance with IT security, ITSM, and governance standards
* Execute deployments and cutovers across multiple environments
* Monitor PLM/PDM/xCAD service health and proactively address stability or performance risks
* Provide support for end user tickets relating to infrastructure area
* Providing expertise and support for the configuration and knowledge management of the service
* Maintain documentation, runbooks, Knowledge Base articles, and CMDB accuracy
* Support PLM/PDM/xCAD application teams during upgrades, integrations, and change activities
* Collect and analyse operational metrics to drive data driven improvements
* Build, configure, and manage Kubernetes clusters on cloud platforms using best practices
* Enable seamless application deployment through CI/CD integration and container orchestration
* Ensure cluster security, networking, and access control in line with organizational standards
* Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting for observability and proactive issue resolution
* Optimize resource utilization, scalability, and cost efficiency
* Collaborate with development and platform teams to support cloud‑native architectures


**Operational Expectations**
* Production deployments typically occur on weekends (approx. once per month)
* Availability required during P1 / P2 incidents as per support procedures


**QUALIFICATIONS – MUST HAVE**
* 5\+ years of hands\-on experience supporting PLM/PDM/xCAD services in enterprise environments
* Proven experience operating PLM/PDM/xCAD systems in cloud or hybrid infrastructures
* Strong understanding of PLM/PDM/xCAD service architecture (application, database, integrations, infrastructure)
* Solid Linux administration skills
* Experience with at least one major cloud service (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Experience with containerized or modern deployment services (Docker, Kubernetes, or equivalent)
* Strong troubleshooting skills across application, infrastructure, and integration layers
* Ability to work effectively in distributed, cross functional, global teams


**PLM DOMAIN EXPERTISE (REQUIRED)**
* Hands\-on experience supporting Teamcenter or similar enterprise PLM/PDM/xCAD systems
* Experience with PLM/PDM/xCAD integrations (CAD, ERP, MES, or manufacturing systems)
* Understanding of PLM/PDM/xCAD release management, upgrade cycles, and production support models
* Willingness to learn and grow deeper in different PLM/PDM/xCAD technologies on the job


**DESIRABLE (NICE TO HAVE)**
* Solid experience with PLM/PDM/xCAD cloud implementations or migrations or modernization initiatives
* Infrastructure as Code or automation experience
* Working knowledge of ITSM tools (e.g., ServiceNow)
* Working knowledge of SQL for data analysis and troubleshooting
* Cloud or service certifications (AWS / Azure)
* Foundational understanding of AI concepts and their practical applications


**LOCATION \& WORKING MODEL**
* Chennai, India
* Occasional international travel may be required
* Working hours aligned with IST / CET overlap


**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

1aeda29c.title: Consultant, Managed Services
1aeda29c.description:
**We Breathe Life Into Data**
 At Komodo Health, our mission is to reduce the global burden of disease. And we believe that smarter use of data is essential to this mission. That’s why we built the Healthcare Map — the industry’s largest, most complete, precise view of the U.S. healthcare system — by combining de\-identified, real\-world patient data with innovative algorithms and decades of clinical experience. The Healthcare Map serves as our foundation for a powerful suite of software applications, helping us answer healthcare’s most complex questions for our partners. Across the healthcare ecosystem, we’re helping our clients unlock critical insights to track detailed patient behaviors and treatment patterns, identify gaps in care, address unmet patient needs, and reduce the global burden of disease.
   

  

 As we pursue these goals, it remains essential to us that we stay grounded in our values: be awesome, seek growth, deliver “wow,” and enjoy the ride. At Komodo, you will be joining a team of ambitious, supportive Dragons with diverse backgrounds but a shared passion to deliver on our mission to reduce the burden of disease — and enjoy the journey along the way.
   

  

**Leadership At Komodo Health**
 Mavens is a Komodo Health company focused on delivering Salesforce\-based solutions that drive workflow and digital engagement across the life sciences industry. The Mavens Managed Services team partners closely with our customers post initial implementation to support long term success with our solutions. Our managed services team serves as trusted advisors who understand both the evolving technology and the business challenges our customers face.
   

  

 Managed Services Consultants are the primary long\-term partners for our customers, acting as a fully integrated extension of the customer’s IT team. They balance day\-to\-day administrative support with complex release management, ensuring that applications are functioning properly to support business\-critical processes. They play a strategic role in building and maintaining strong customer relationships and continuously seek opportunities to further assist customers with their evolving needs.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a goal\-oriented and self\-motivated individual who is comfortable working in fast\-paced work environments. They demonstrate strong collaboration skills by working effectively across internal teams and with customers to drive shared outcomes. They hold themselves accountable to commitments and follow through with a high degree of ownership. They bring creativity and resourcefulness to problem\-solving, finding practical solutions in ambiguous or complex situations. They approach interactions with empathy, fostering trust with both customers and colleagues.
   

  

**The Opportunity at Mavens**
**Communications \& Project Management**
* Lead Stakeholder Engagement: Lead weekly status calls, third\-party vendor alignments, and design reviews.
* Manage Project Documentation: Prepare status call content (dashboards, agendas) and manage the RAIL (Rolling Action Item Log) by creating and updating items in real\-time.
* Release Planning: Create and maintain release timelines and support customers with release candidate prioritization.
* Governance \& Business Planning: Provide technical recommendations and work in collaboration with customers to define a clear roadmap.
* Internal Collaboration: Maintain clear and proactive communication with internal stakeholders \- including practice leads, consultants, developers, architects, and QA \- to share customer context, coordinate delivery activities, and surface risks or escalations through the appropriate channels.


**Requirements \& Build**
* Analyze Business Needs: Prepare for and lead requirements gathering sessions.
* Technical Implementation: Assess Level of Effort (LOE) for functional items and complete or delegate build/configuration changes.
* DevOps \& Deployment: Manage repositories and promote completed build to higher environments.
* Maintain Documentation: Manage requirements, test cases, functional and technical guides, integration specifications, and other application documentation.


**Testing \& Quality Assurance**
* Validation: Perform System Integration Testing (SIT) and provide guidance/support for User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
* Spot Checks: Validate deployments by checking changes in higher environments.


**Ongoing Support \& Maintenance**
* User \& Data Management: Handle user lifecycle (creation, deactivation, permissions) and maintain data integrity (duplicate management, record updates).
* Issue Management: Investigate reported issues, monitor error reports, and triage/escalate problems as needed to ensure resolution.
* Reporting: Create and update reports and perform data extractions/exports for the customer.


**Competencies**
* Platform Expertise: Strong knack for understanding how applications work and envisioning solutions on the Force.com platform.
* Functional Advisory: Ability to provide "how\-to" technical assistance and advise customers on product features and enhancements.
* Communication Skills: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to seamlessly connect and translate between technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Documentation Mastery: Experience authoring requirements, system specifications, and application guides.
* Project Management: Understanding of core project management concepts, including timeline management and LOE assessment.
* Industry Knowledge: Life Sciences or Pharmaceutical experience is a significant plus.
* Education \& Certification: Bachelor’s degree preferred; Salesforce Certification is required.


**Values**
 If you are wondering if this is the right role for you, ask yourself if you are already a Maven:
   

  

* A Maven is open to saying yes and shows good judgment in ambiguity
* A Maven takes accountability and is constantly learning
* A Maven is fearless, resourceful, and scrappy
* A Maven communicates with integrity, empathy, and humility
* A Maven brings energy into the room and gives more than they take
* A Maven in an entrepreneur who creates opportunity and momentum
* A Maven is a craftsman who uses technology to solve business problems
* A Maven makes our customer the hero


**Komodo's AI Standard**
 At Komodo, we're not just witnessing the AI revolution – we're leading it. This is a pivotal moment in time, where being first to market with AI transforms industries and sets the bar. We've already established industry leadership in leveraging AI to revolutionize healthcare, and we expect every team member to contribute. AI here isn't optional; it's foundational. We expect you to integrate AI into your daily work – from summarizing documents to automating workflows and uncovering insights. This isn't just about efficiency; it's about making every moment more meaningful, building on trust in AI, and driving our collective success.
   

  

***Join us in shaping the future of healthcare intelligence.*
 Where You’ll Work**
 Komodo Health has a hybrid work model with hubs in San Francisco, New York City, and Chicago. Roles vary — some can be performed from anywhere in the country, others are scoped to a specific region, and some are based near one of our hubs. For hub\-based Dragons, we're building intentional in\-office rhythms alongside the flexibility that's core to how we work. Whatever your setup, expectations will always be clear before you join.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**
 Komodo Health provides equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any type with regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.
   

  

 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and understand Komodo Health’s Privacy Notice for Employees and Contractors.
   

  

*This notice explains how we collect, use, and retain applicant data.*

5bd472f5.title: Associate Program Manager
5bd472f5.description:
Profile – PMO \[IN] / Program Delivery Expert \[PDE]


Primary Job Responsibilities:
  

The Program Management team is responsible for managing the development of Global Marketing Campaigns by a variety of teams. The Digital Marketing Campaign Manager (hereafter Campaign Manager) will create project plans and facilitate cross\-functional efforts to help marketers design and launch end to end digital marketing campaigns through email, onsite and other channels. The primary job responsibilities of the Campaign Manager include:


* Work with marketing managers from inception of marketing campaigns in a consultative manner to lead and guide marketing managers in the roll out of the marketing campaign(s).
* Partnering with Marketing Manager, the Digital Marketing Program Manager is responsible for the end to end management of marketing program across all channels and touch points.
* Maintain and open channel of communication with Marketing managers throughout the life of the program to define and document campaign requirements within the internal marketing resource management (MRM) solution
* Gather the campaign requirements and work with cross functional team and involve domain experts where required while project managing all aspects of the campaign milestones and deliverables.
* Help Marketing Managers define the general vision of the program, and ensure that all teams involved understand their deliverables and due dates.
* Develop a master project plan to coordinate all of the activities of the teams.
* Create segmentation plans that support marketing campaigns and for the Marketing Operations team to execute and automate those segmentation plans
* Manage the Creative Development process (where required) to ensure that the creative teams understand the direction of Marketing, that communications between the teams are conveyed in a timely fashion and that Legal, Brand and other pertinent teams have input
* When relevant, ensure that cross functional teams/domain experts are involved in setting up relevant metrics and ensure that results of the campaign are reported in a consistent manner.
* Keep abreast of ad\-technology, marketing technology and developments.
* Should understand email marketing, performance marketing.
* Understanding of social media marketing a plus.

General Position Requirements / Scope
  

* At least 7\-10 years’ experience in marketing of which 4 years should be in project management across cross\-functional teams for multi\-channel digital campaigns
* Experience in direct marketing or database marketing a plus.
* Demonstrated ability to handle multiple simultaneous programs
* Experience in creating project plans that range upwards to 100 tasks in either Microsoft Project
* Ability to work with cross\-functional teams and Marketing in\-person and over the phone.
* Excellent process flow management capabilities
* Excellent attention to detail
* Excellent interpersonal skills
* Excellent problem solving and organization skills
* Strong written and oral communication skills
* Proficient with basic office applications such as Excel and PowerPoint
* Bachelor’s degree
Shift (APJ / EMEA / US / Any combination) : APAC/General/EMEA

af1fa6ad.title: Delivery Manager
af1fa6ad.description:
**Job Description Summary**
 The Delivery Manager is accountable for end\-to\-end delivery execution and people leadership for a cross\-functional POD consisting of software engineers, quality engineers, and related technical contributors. This role owns delivery predictability, team health, execution quality, operational excellence, and talent development while partnering closely with Product Management and Architecture. The Delivery Manager ensures teams consistently deliver high\-quality software aligned to business priorities, engineering standards, and customer outcomes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead a cross\-functional delivery POD with accountability for delivery execution, engineering quality, operational stability, and team performance.
* Manage and develop engineers, quality engineers, and other technical contributors through coaching, feedback, career development, and performance management.
* Own sprint execution, delivery predictability, release readiness, and dependency management across the POD.
* Partner with Product Management to translate roadmap priorities into executable delivery plans.
* Drive continuous improvement in engineering practices, testing strategies, automation adoption, and release quality.
* Ensure operational excellence through monitoring of delivery KPIs including throughput, defect escape rate, cycle time, reliability, and team health metrics.
* Identify and remove organizational, technical, and process impediments impacting delivery velocity or quality.
* Promote accountability, collaboration, and ownership within the POD.
* Support hiring, onboarding, succession planning, and workforce planning activities.
* Collaborate with peer delivery leaders to standardize delivery practices and improve cross\-team coordination.
* Champion adoption of AI\-assisted engineering and quality tools to improve developer productivity, test automation, delivery velocity, and operational efficiency.
* Ensure teams effectively leverage AI capabilities within development workflows while maintaining engineering standards, security, compliance, and code quality.


**Education**
* 7\+ years of experience in software engineering, quality engineering, or technical delivery leadership.
* 3\+ years of people leadership experience managing cross\-functional technical teams.
* Strong understanding of Agile delivery models, SDLC practices, CI/CD, quality engineering, and release management.
* Experience managing delivery risks, dependencies, capacity planning, and operational metrics.
* Demonstrated ability to lead engineers and QA professionals within a unified delivery model.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience operating in SaaS or healthcare technology environments preferred.


**Every Team Member Exhibits Our Core Values**
* Team First
* Lift Others Up
* Share Openly
* Set and Crush Goals
* Delight the Client


 Equal Opportunity Employer
   

  

 This employer is required to notify all applicants of their rights pursuant to federal employment laws. For further information, please review the Know Your Rights notice from the Department of Labor.

f2b981c2.title: Event Program Manager , AWS Global Events
f2b981c2.description:
**Description**
 The Event Program Manager will execute end\-to\-end operations and delivery of specific event workstreams or programs within AWS's event portfolio. This role requires strong program management skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities while ensuring high\-quality delivery. You will be responsible for implementing event strategies across various disciplines (e.g., content, operations, platforms, live event production, online events and specialized audience programs) and playing a key role in onsite execution.
   

  

 Impact \& Scope
   

  

* Drive successful execution of key event workstreams
* Ensure high\-quality delivery of program elements
* Contribute to process improvements and best practices
* Support delivery of AWS's largest events
* Build expertise in specific event disciplines


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Program Management \& Execution
   

  

* Support the end\-to\-end delivery of assigned event workstreams or programs (examples: content operations, platform management, expo areas, audience\-specific programs, online events)
* Manage day\-to\-day program activities, including timeline development and stakeholder coordination
* Create and maintain project documentation and status reporting
* Coordinate with vendors and internal teams for successful delivery
* Own specific onsite responsibilities during live events


 Event Planning \& Delivery
   

  

* Implement standardized processes from the Global Event Centre of Excellence
* Coordinate event logistics within assigned workstream
* Ensure consistent delivery quality across program elements
* Support budget tracking and reconciliation
* Manage onsite teams and vendors during event execution
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues during live events


 Stakeholder Coordination
   

  

* Act as primary liaison between stakeholders, vendors, and internal teams
* Manage regular communications and status updates
* Coordinate with regional teams to ensure local relevance while maintaining global standards
* Gather and incorporate stakeholder feedback
* Support stakeholder needs during onsite execution


 Operations \& Measurement
   

  

* Implement standard operating procedures and best practices
* Support data collection and reporting for program metrics
* Lead post\-event analysis and documentation
* Contribute to process improvement initiatives
* Maintain program documentation and playbooks


 A day in the life
   

  

 As our Event Program Manager, you'll be at the heart of AWS's event execution — coordinating across multiple teams, vendors, and stakeholders to deliver world\-class experiences. Your day might involve managing project timelines for an upcoming Summit, coordinating with platform vendors on registration setup, aligning content operations with speaker management teams, preparing onsite run\-of\-show documents, or conducting post\-event debriefs to capture insights and drive continuous improvement.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The AWS Events team is at the forefront of delivering world\-class experiences that bring the cloud community together. From large\-scale Summits and re:Invent to executive programs and online events, our team manages the full spectrum of event workstreams — including content operations, platform management, expo areas, live event production, audience programs, and event registration. As an Event Program Manager, you will be a critical driver of operational excellence, ensuring seamless execution across multiple event disciplines. You'll collaborate with cross\-functional teams and external partners to deliver innovative, high\-impact experiences that inspire customers and showcase AWS's leadership in cloud and AI. This is an opportunity to grow your expertise in a fast\-paced, global environment where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience with strong project management skills and the ability to thrive in a fast\-paced environment
* Experience prioritizing and handling multiple assignments at any given time while maintaining commitment to deadlines
* Experience communicating clearly and concisely with leadership, stakeholders, and cross\-functional teams
* Bachelor's degree in a relevant field or equivalent work experience
* 5\+ years of experience in event management or related field
* Experience supporting live event execution
* Experience with event management tools and technologies


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with technology industry events (3,000\+ attendees)
* Understanding of specific event disciplines (content, operations, platforms)
* Experience with virtual and hybrid event formats
* International event experience
* Knowledge of event registration and marketing automation platforms


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Karnataka
