You will be responsible for providing technical leadership and guidance to the team, ensuring the successful delivery of projects. Roles \& Responsibilities:  Understand Data \& AI business requirements and convert them into technology requirements  Define application architecture diagrams from Data ingestion to Data consumption  Align D\&A technology components with application architecture  Create ADM effort estimates based on scope \& inventory  Work with Data \& AI Capability SMEs and leads for estimation sign offs  Create staffing plans based on recommended on/off ratios, pyramid guidelines  Create solution plan decks as a common understanding document for sales and delivery teams  Conduct solution reviews with Global sales leadership /account leads/commercial directors  Conduct delivery reviews with Global, ATCI delivery leadership/ DoDs  Act a bridge between sales and delivery teams  Provide inputs to client facing proposal documents \- Why this solution, Why this tech component, Why our organization for this solution etc.  Defend the solution in various internal and external forums \- Client presentations, Capability/delivery/sales MD reviews  Provide solution inputs to legal team for SOW/contracting  Provide solution hand over to delivery team after winning the deal  Professional \& Technical Skills:  Data Architecture principles or any D\&A skills.  Experience in designing and implementing scalable and secure solutions  Knowledge of cloud platforms and services such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud  Proficient in Microsoft Excel.  Good To Have Skills: knowledge in Microsoft Power Point for leadership reporting  Experience in working with cross\-functional teams  Excellent communication and presentation skills Additional Information:  The candidate should have a minimum of 12 years of experience.  This position is based across India  A 15 years full\-time education is required.,
   

  

 TBD

283983d0.title: Technical & Solution Architect
283983d0.description:
Equifax is seeking creative, high\-energy, and driven software engineers and technical/solution architects with hands\-on development and cross\-system design skills to work on a variety of meaningful projects. Our software engineering positions provide you the opportunity to join a team of talented engineers working with leading\-edge technology. You are ideal for this position if you are a forward\-thinking, committed, and enthusiastic architect and developer who is passionate about technology, translating business needs into high\-quality technical vision, and hands\-on execution.
   

  

****What you’ll do****
* Demonstrate a deep understanding of cloud\-native, distributed microservices\-based architectures across complex, integrated systems.
* Deliver solutions for complex business problems through software standard SDLC and robust end\-to\-end architectural design.
* Build strong relationships with both internal and external stakeholders including product, business, and sales partners.
* Demonstrate excellent communication skills with the ability to both simplify complex problems and also dive deeper if needed.
* Build and technically lead strong technical solutions that scale.
* Guide and influence teams with cross\-functional skills that include software, quality, reliability engineers, project managers, and scrum masters.
* Provide deep troubleshooting skills with the ability to lead and solve production and customer issues under pressure.
* Leverage strong experience in full\-stack software development and public cloud like GCP and AWS.
* Mentor, coach, and develop junior and senior software, quality, and reliability engineers.
* Lead with a data/metrics\-driven mindset with a maniacal focus towards optimizing and creating efficient solutions.
* Ensure compliance with EFX secure software development guidelines and best practices and responsible for meeting and maintaining QE, DevSec, and FinOps KPIs.
* Define, maintain, and report SLA, SLO, SLIs meeting EFX engineering standards in partnership with the product, engineering, and architecture teams.
* Collaborate with architects, SRE leads, and other technical leadership on strategic technical direction, guidelines, and best practices.
* Drive and author up\-to\-date technical documentation including system design specifications, detailed technical diagrams (e.g., architecture, sequence, data flows), and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
* Support and guide Sprint planning, Sprint Retrospectives, and other team activity from a technical perspective.
* Responsible for cross\-system implementation architecture decision\-making associated with Product features/stories, refactoring work, and EOSL decisions.
* Create and deliver technical presentations to internal and external technical and non\-technical stakeholders communicating with clarity and precision, and present complex information in a concise format that is audience\-appropriate.


**What Experience You Need**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
* 7\+ years of software engineering and system architecture experience.
* 7\+ years experience writing, debugging, and troubleshooting code in mainstream Java, Angular (18 or newer), Angular Material, SpringBoot, Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
* 7\+ years working with PostgreSQL or other relational databases.
* 7\+ years experience with Cloud technology: GCP, AWS, or Azure.
* 7\+ years experience designing and developing cloud\-native solutions.
* 7\+ years experience designing and developing microservices using Java, SpringBoot, GCP SDKs, GKE/Kubernetes.
* 7\+ years experience deploying and releasing software using Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, understanding infrastructure\-as\-code concepts, Helm Charts, and Terraform constructs.
* AI Assisted Development: Strong experience leveraging modern AI developer tooling (e.g., Gemini Code Assist, GitHub Copilot) to accelerate coding, testing, and system prototyping.
* AI Application Engineering: Hands\-on experience designing or developing AI\-powered application features, integrating Generative AI/LLM APIs, or working with orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex) and vector databases.


****What could set you apart****
* Self\-starter that identifies/responds to priority shifts with minimal supervision.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Strong leadership qualities and cross\-system architectural vision.
* Demonstrated problem\-solving skills and the ability to resolve conflicts.
* Experience creating and maintaining product and software roadmaps.
* Experience aligning technical architecture with yearly as well as product/project budgets.
* Working in a highly regulated environment.
* Experience designing and developing big data processing solutions using Dataflow/Apache Beam, Bigtable, BigQuery, PubSub, GCS, Composer/Airflow, and others.
* UI development (e.g., HTML, JavaScript, Angular and Bootstrap).
* Experience with backend technologies such as JAVA/J2EE, SpringBoot, SOA, and Microservices.
* Source code control management systems (e.g., SVN/Git, Github) and build tools like Maven \& Gradle.
* Agile environments (e.g., Scrum, XP).
* Relational databases (e.g., SQL Server, MySQL).
* Atlassian tooling (e.g., JIRA, Confluence, and Github).
* Developing with modern JDK (v1\.7\+).
* Automated Testing: JUnit, Selenium, LoadRunner, SoapUI.

7b1fc252.title: Principal IT Solution Architect
7b1fc252.description:
**Job ID** 
 2025\-13610
 **Date posted** 
 04/05/2026
 **Location** 
 Bengaluru, India
 **Category** 
 IT
   

  

**Job Description**
 Are you looking for an exciting new chance to build on your experience working on business\-led change initiatives? Arm is changing the future of computing across multiple sectors from mobile clients and automotive through to Hyperscalers and embedded devices. And we're doing this together with our broad ecosystem of partners and for the benefit of everyone!
   

  

 You will be part of Arm’s Enterprise IT Business Applications Architecture practice and work across the portfolio of projects to provide architectural guidance and solutions to business challenges that are aligned to strategy and EIT roadmaps. You will also be responsible for technical leadership and direction to development and delivery teams, ensuring delivery of your designs is adequately stewarded and also collaborating across teams to find opportunities for new technologies.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Interpret Business Needs**
* Collaborate with senior leaders to identify future technology innovations and evolutions that have potential to address business ambitions
* Develop solutions designs (HLD) and roadmaps aligned to the Domain target
* Maintain mapping between Capabilities, Applications and Data


**Assess and Apply Technology**
* Be creative in the use of existing technologies
* Work with members of the technical communities to develop and establish reference patterns for Platforms and Solutions
* Look ahead for opportunities with new technologies and applications


**Technical leadership**
* Supports change initiatives and technical communities, guiding and helping teams and partners to align with the overall enterprise architecture
* Ownership of solution pattern and approach, responsible for sign\-off on High\-Level designs and ensuring alignment to target and roadmaps
* Ensure quality of Architecture design artefacts and present at governance forums


**Practice Development**
* Develop and evolve Architecture principles, governance, materials and ways of working
* Guide and mentor teams on architecture principles, governance, and standard practices
* Drive innovation by researching and evaluating emerging technologies that align with business needs


**Required Skills And Experience**
* At least 8 years of experience in a Solution Architect role.
* Strong experience with Salesforce, SAP, and integration platforms (e.g., Mulesoft, event\-driven architectures, MS Power Platform, Automation Anywhere).
* Good knowledge of LoB applications (e.g., ServiceNow, HCM, CMS, CLM) in commercial and operational domains.
* Expertise in cloud services (multi\-provider, AI, cloud\-native development).
* Experience with DevSecOps, SRE, and cybersecurity practices.
* Ability to balance long\-term vision with short\-term needs and define multiple solution options.
* Familiarity with Business Analysis, Programme Management, and application development methodologies.
* Ability to quickly learn new technologies
* Demonstrable experience in project governance, leadership, and architecture team development.


**“Nice To Have” Skills And Experience**
* Formal qualifications in development languages or application platforms
* Experience of the semi\-conductor industry or other Engineering based organisations!


**In Return**
* This is a new team, and there is plenty of opportunity to shape its future, and your own growth and progression.


**Accommodations at Arm**
 At Arm, we want to build extraordinary teams. If you need an adjustment or an accommodation during the recruitment process, please email
   

  

**Hybrid Working at Arm**
 Arm’s approach to hybrid working is designed to create a working environment that supports both high performance and personal wellbeing. We believe in bringing people together face to face to enable us to work at pace, whilst recognizing the value of flexibility. Within that framework, we empower groups/teams to determine their own hybrid working patterns, depending on the work and the team’s needs. Details of what this means for each role will be shared upon application. In some cases, the flexibility we can offer is limited by local legal, regulatory, tax, or other considerations, and where this is the case, we will collaborate with you to find the best solution. Please talk to us to find out more about what this could look like for you.
   

  

**Equal Opportunities at Arm**
 Arm is an equal opportunity employer, committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal opportunities are available to all applicants and colleagues. We are a diverse organization of dedicated and innovative individuals, and don’t discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran.

2aac5b30.title: Architect - Senior
2aac5b30.description:
Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\-to\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.  

Job Title: Senior Architect\- DLP  

Position: Software Engineer  

Experience: 8\- 10 Years  

Category: Software Development/ Engineering  

Shift: 10Am – 7PM
  

Main location: Chennai  

Position ID: J0726\-0343  

Employment Type: Full Time  

Education Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field or higher with minimum 3 years of relevant experience.  

Position Description: We are looking for an experienced Senior Architect\- DLP to join our team. The ideal candidate should be passionate about coding and developing scalable and high\-performance applications. You will work closely with our front\-end developers, designers, and other members of the team to deliver quality solutions that meet the needs of our clients.  

\#LI\-MP14

**Your future duties and responsibilities**

* Own solution and enterprise architecture direction across discovery, design, vendor evaluation, and implementation readiness of DLP solution.
* Translate business, technical, security, compliance, operational, and integration requirements into fit for purpose architecture.
* Develop and govern solution options, architecture principles, high level designs, low level designs, and technical design artifacts.
* Define network architecture, integration points, data flows, policy enforcement logic, infrastructure standards, environment requirements, software installation approach, and configuration guidance.
* Review vendor proposed solutions and provide architecture assessments, technical recommendations, risks, assumptions, and readiness findings.
* Lead architecture reviews and support completion of required governance checkpoints.
* Maintain architecture decision records, design traceability, review outcomes, technical risks, dependencies, and approval evidence.
* Partner with engineering, security, operations, business, sourcing, and vendor teams to confirm technical feasibility and implementation readiness.
* Support pilot, proof of concept, build, deployment, handover, and operational readiness planning from an architecture perspective.
* Secure required architecture review board signoffs and ensure designs meet enterprise standards, security controls, compliance requirements, and operational needs.
* Provide technical guidance to implementation teams and vendors during design elaboration, environment setup, installation, configuration, and readiness activities.

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**


Must\-Have Skills:  

* Extensive experience in enterprise, solution, security, and infrastructure architecture within large scale environments.
* Strong knowledge of DLP, cybersecurity, enterprise integrations, and regulatory compliance requirements.
* Proven expertise in architecture governance, vendor evaluation, solution design, and enterprise technology implementations.
* Excellent stakeholder management, technical leadership, and communication skills.
* Excellent communication, reporting, and organizational skills in complex enterprise environments.
* Proven leadership, stakeholder management, risk mitigation, and executive communication skills.
* Experience with agile development methodologies and DevOps practices
* Excellent problem solving and analytical skills
* Strong communication and collaboration skills


Good\-to\-Have Skills:  

* Experience with cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS or Azure
* Familiarity with machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies


CGI is an equal opportunity employer. In addition, CGI is committed to providing accommodation for people with disabilities in accordance with provincial legislation. Please let us know if you require reasonable accommodation due to a disability during any aspect of the recruitment process and we will work with you to address your needs.**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**  

  

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.  

  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.  

  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
  

  

That same commitment to fairness extends to how we use technology. To support our recruitment team, AI tools may be used to help assess applications though they never replace human judgement. All hiring decisions remain entirely in the hands of our recruitment professionals.  

  

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.
